Vahchoiyun Pakai

chapters.text: Migiloute thumop banga chon louva, Michonsete lamlhah a jong dingle lou, Mi jontai nomho jong toukhompi lou michu Mi nun nom ahi.
Hitobang mi hin Pakai danthu jenga bou kipana aneiyin, Pakai danthu chu sun le janin agel geljie.
Amahi luipanga thingphung kiphut tobang ahin, Aphat phat cha hung gaji thingphung tobang ahi; Hitobang thingphung hi ado jong agopji pon, Hitobang mi jong chu atohlam lama akhangtouve.
Migiloute vang chutobang ahipoi; Huilah a changvai kithea alhoh mangsoh bep ahiuvin ahi;
Hijeh a chu migiloute vang thutanna dingjou lou diu, Midih ho kikhopna jong chonsete lhathei lou diu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin midih ho lamlhah ahetpeh nan, Migiloute lampi vang manthahna lut ding ahibouve.
Ipi dia namtin vaipi lah a kitomona lenga, Pannabeiya idia mitin vaipi kidou hiu vam?
Leiset lengte atoukhom’uvin, Vaihom thuneite jong kihoutoh din akikhom’uve, Pakai le Pakai thaonupa Dou nan akihousom’uvin hitin aseiyui;
“Eikan nau thih khaoho hi tumtan jengu hitin, Pohgih hahsa eipohsah-u jong hi sep lhau hite,“atiuve.
Alaltouna vana toupan anuisat’in, Pakaiyin amaho chu nuijat nan aneitai.
Pakaiyin ajah uva lungsan thu aseiyin Lung hang tah-in ahoh kicha gamin hitin aseiye,
“Keiman kalhendoh lengpa chu Kei dia lhang theng Ziona kapansah-e,” ati.
Pakai thugahna chu keiman phongdoh inge: Aman kajah a, “Nang hi kachapa nahin, Keiman tuni nikhoa Kahin nahi.
Kahenga thumin namtin vaipi hi gouva kalosah ding nahin; Van mong geiya leiset pumpi nalo ding ahi.
Nangman namtin vaipi hi thihjol’a najep cheh a, Beldengpa bel kivochip banga navoh chip ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun tuhin ching theiyun vo leng ho, Vo leiset vaihomte kiging phauvin.
Pakai kin bol’uvin ama jeng ginguvin, Kihot hot’in

akengphang teni chop-peh-uvin; Achutilou leh Pakai lung hangin tin, Nang hon manthahna nanei diu ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai lunghan hi Hetman louhel’a hung deujah jengji ahi. Pakai henga kisel jing jengte chu Anun nom ahiuve.
O Pakai, eidou ding mi atam cheh cheh jenge! Keima dou din mihem tamtah aki-pantauve.
Mi tamtah-in kachung chang thu aseiyun, “A-Pathenpa koma jong ama dia kithopina ding aumpoi,” atiuve. Selah
Hijongleh vo Pakai nang hi kadinga luma kisung nahin, Kaloupina nahi, nangin khodah ngama neikoi jing ahi.
Keima Pakai henga othong leuvin ka-taovin, Hijeh chun aman jong alhang thenga konin eihin houve: Selah
Keima kalumin ka-ihmu jin, Pakaiyin eihoidama eivah jeh-in ka hung thou kit’e.
Mihem sang som sang ja kakimvel’a hung kigol’u hen Keima dou din hung jeng jonguleh kaging tapoi.
O Pakai hung thouvin, Vo ka-Pathen, neihuhdoh loiyin! Ajeh chu nangin kamelma hijatpi hi Akhalhang guu naveichip peh soh jin; Migiloute hahem tah jong chu Nangman ahau navo pul soh jie.
Mihuhdohna hi Pakaiya ahi; Namite chunga naphatthei boh hung lhung hen! Selah
Kadihna dia eipanhu vo Pathen, Kahin koutengleh neihouvin! Genthei kathoh tengleh Nangman neikhoto jin ahi. Keima neilungset’in lang Kataona ngaiyin.
Vo mihem chate, ichan geiya neijum souva, Itih chan geiya pannabei thu kiseiho na-ngailut’uva jou le nal nahol le diu ham? Selah
Hethem’uvin Pathen hethemte chu Pathenin ama din abungin akhendoh tai; Keiman kakou tengleh Pakaiyin angai teiye.
Lung hanguvin lang, chonset bol dauvin, Janteng nalupnaa nalungthimin kihou houvun Thip beh chan um’uvin. Selah
Lungdih pun kilhaina jeng bol’uvin lang, Pakai jenga lung ngaiyun.
Mi tampin aseiyuvin, “O kadeh, keihon jong thilpha pha-bep beh kamu diu ahi! Vo Pakai, keiho chunga hin Namaivah hinsal vah temin,” atiuve.
Pakai nangman kalungthima kipana nasa tah neipen, Mihon chang tampi aneiyuva lengpitwi neng jeng junga aneipet’uva akipa sangun kakipah joi.
Keima lung monga kalup’a ka-ihmut ding ahi; Ajeh chu Pakai nangbou lung monga eichensah nahi.
O Pakai kathuseiho nanan neingaipeh-in lang, Kathoh gimna gelkhoh tei teiyin.
Ka ka-gin hin ngaiyin Kalengpa leh ka-Pathen; Ajeh chu nangma henga Hung taova kap kahi.
Vo Pakai, jingkah le nangin katao gin na-ngaijin. Jingkah teng kenjong nakoma kilhaina ding gonsan kakoijin ka-ngah jinge.
Ajeh chu nang hi thilsea kipahji Pathen nahipon, Thilse chu nang to kilhon thei louhel ahibouve.
Namit mua jong mi kiletsah pang jou lou ding; Nangin thilse bolte aboncha nahot ahiye.
Nangman jou seite nasumang jin, Thisan sohatte jousei nomte chu Pakaiyin akidah-e.
Keivang nalungset natsat behseh jeh hin Nangma houin sunga hung lut tei nange; Nangma gin le janan kenvang Nahouin theng maiya boh khup’ing ting chibai kaboh ding nahi.
O Pakai, kemelmate jeh hin Nalamdih-a neipuiyin; Kei dingin kamasanga Nalampi hin lhung jang keiyin.
Ajeh chu miho kamsunga thudih apot tapon, Alungthimu jong suhmangna ding jeng ahi; Alolbuh-u jong lhankot kihong ahi-jengin, Lei nal hiu heuvin thu aseiyuve.
Vo Pathen, amaho hi amo nau kipoh sah-in lang, Athilgonu chu akipal lhuh nau hisah jon! Thil hijat suh khel aneijeh-uvin paidoh jengin, Ajeh chu nangma doumah mah jeng abol’uve.
Amavang nang lima kisel miho vang abonchan Kipa la sah-sah sah jengin lang; Nang vanga choisanga aum theina diuvin Namin ngailu jouse panpin, huh jingin.
Vo Pakai, midih phatthei bohji chu nang nahin, Nalungset chun midih chu lumin akhu bangin akhui.
O Pakai, lung phamo jongle chun talen neimatsah dan, Lungna lheh jongle chun nei-engbol hih-in.
Vo Pakai, neikhoton athabei pai ding kahitai; O Pakai, neidamsah-in, kagu kachang jousen eichip’e.
Kalhagao agenthei behseh jeng tai. O Pakai itih chan geiya hitia boldia neigot ham?
Vo Pakai, hung kile kit’ in lang hahinkho huhhingin, Neilungset jeh chun neihuhdoh tei teiyin;
Ajeh chu kithi leh nangma geldohna jong umpon tin, Noimigama chu kon nangma navahchoi ding ham?
Kagenthei thoh thoh nan abeipai ding kahitan, Jansim janseh leh kalhi along long jengin, Ka-kap kap jeng jin, Kajalkhun jeng jong kalhi akotsoh tai.
Kamit lhi lon lon nan kamit la achopai ding ahitan, Kamelma atam behseh phat’in kamit akham jen june.
Thilse bol mite, nabonchauvin kakoma konin potdoh jengun! Ajeh chu Pakaiyin keima ka-ogin ajatai.
Pakaiyin kathil thum chu einop peh tan, Kataona Pakaiyin asang tai.
Kamelmate abonchauva kijumsouva, Hatah-a hung genthei ding ahiuve; Hetman louhel’a hung kile heiyuva Mit phet kah louva jachat akimu diu ahitai.
Vo Pakai ka-Pathen, keima nanga kisel kahi; Eihin nungdel mitea konin neihuhhingin neihuhdoh-in;
Achutilouva ahileh amahon Sakei bahkaiyin mi akaimang banga eikai diu, Eichudoh ding beihel’a Eilhoh mang jeng diu ahi.
Vo Pakai ka-Pathen, keiman hitobang thilsekabol’a, Kakhut tenia hi thildih lou auma ahileh,
Kagol kapai jong thilpha aboljeh a thilse kabolpeh auma, Ajeh beiya kamelmate kachoma ahileh;
Melmapan eihindel del jeng hen, eiman hen, Tol’a eichil thang jeng hen; Kahinna katahsa jeng jong hi Leivui lah a chilthang den hen. Selah
Vo Pakai, lung hang pumin hung kondoh jengin, Kamelmate kitum let lut ho hitoh kidinten; Vo ka-Pathen hung thouvin, Nangman thu tanding nakoisa ahime.
Mitin vaipi nakimvela Kihon lel lulin hung kikhom jongu leh, Achunga nalaltouna Sangtah-in kidon touphan.
Pakaiyin mitin vaipi thu atanjin, O Pakai keijong kalungdet jeh leh Kadihna bangin, Kachunga thu tan jengin.
Migiloute gitlouna subei hel’in lang, Midih vang pandet sah jingin; Nangin mihem lungthim le alunggil nakhol jin, Hijeh chun Nangma Pathen dihtah nahi.
Kakiselna lum Pathen koma aumin, Milungdih chu Pathenin ahuhhinge.
Pathen chu dihtah a thutan ahin, Hijeh chun niseh a lung uljing Pathen ahiye.
Mihem khattouvin lung aheilouva ahileh Pathenin achemjam akinol hem ding ahi; Chujongleh athalpi akamsal’a Akap jengji ahi.
Pathenin thina thei thai-an akibeh-in, Athal chang ho jong meisi leng pahlah lah abange.
Ven, migilouvin thilse jeng naovop’in avop jin, Joule nal jeng a-oisunga Naokon akikoi jin Thujou jeng asunga konin naopenin apengdoh jeng junge.
Migilouvin kokhuh tong dengin alaiyin, Avang laiya chun amajoh alhalut jin ahi.
Thilse agon jouse ama chunga alechuh jin Thagol khatah a mi adenna achunga achuh loi.
Kenvang adihjal’a thangvah lom Pakai thangvah ing ting, Chungnungpen Pakai min vahchoi la kasah ding ahi.
O Yahweh ka-Pakaiyu, Leiset pumpia itobanga minthang nahi hitam!
Nalal loupina hi van mun jousea jong lan akisan, Naosen ho le chapang hon jong akambem bemin asauve. Namelmate douna dingin nangman kulpi nakaiyin, Melmate leh phulah nomte suhnem din nagel e.
Keiman nakhutsoh nasemsa van mun jouse kavet’a, Nangin nagoldohsa lha le ahsi jouse kavet leh;
Mihem hi ipi hiya nangin hibanga nagel khoh a, Mihem chapa hi ipi ham hibanga nakhohsah?
Nangin ama hi Pathen sanga themcha neojon nakoiyin, Loupina lal lukhuh nakhuhpeh-in jana napei.
Nakhutsoh thil jouse chunga lengvaipoa thu neina napen, Thil ijakai abonchan Ama kengto te ni noiya nakoisoh tai.
Kelngoi jouse le bongchal jouse jong, Gamjang a gamsa jouse jong ahiuvin;
Chunga leng vachate leh Twikhanglena nga namkim ahiuvin; Ipi hijongleh Twikhanglen lam jon’a kitol jouse jong ahiuve.
O Yahweh ka-Pakaiyu, Leiset pumpia itobanga minthang nahi hitam!
Keiman kalungthim pumpin Pakai thangvah-ing ting, Pakai nathilbol kidang tah tah hi abanchan seiyinge.
Nachunga kipah-ing ting, Nangjenga kichoi-an inge; Vo Chungnungpen Pakai, Namin vahchoi la sange.
Kamelmate anung jam teng jongleh Na-angsunga akisep lhu’uvin amangthah jiuve.
Ajeh chu nangin ka themna naching jingin, Laltounaa natouvin adih dih-in thu natanjie.
Nangin namtin vaipi naphoh jin Migilou vang nasumang ji tai; Amin jengu jong tonsot tonsot geiya din Nanoi mangsohjin ahi.
Melma chu thou kit louhel dingin athigam tauvin, Akhopi jouseu jong nangin abul abal’a nakaldoh ahitai; Amaho melchih theina jouse jong, Akihepha tahih hel jenge.
Ahin Pakai vang tonsot laltouna atou jingin, Amatah-in thutanna din laltouna akidotai.
Pakaiyin vannoi leiset thu adih tah-in a tan jin, Mitin vaipi jong kitoh tah-in thu atanpeh jie.
Bolgentheiya umte dinga Pakai chu kiselna kulpi ahin, Lung gim lungdon pet’a kiselna kulpi ahi.
Nangma min hesa jousen Nanga kisonna anei cheh-in ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh nangma lha-ngaite chu O Pakai, nangin nadalha ngaipoi.
Ziona chengpa Pakai vahchoi la sauvin; Athilbol anatoh jouse hi mitin vaipi lah a seiphongun.
Thisan phulaa pangpa Pakaiyin miagel khoh cheh-in. Bolgentheiya umte ka-gin asumil poi.
O Pakai, neilungset’in! Vetan, eihot bolte khut’a genthei hahsa kathoh ahi; Thina kelkot phung geisa keima Nangin neinung kaidoh kit tai.
Nangma vahchoi la kasah thei kit’a, Zion chanu kelkot phung dunga navahchoi la ka sah-a Chutengleh nangman neihuhdohna Kakipapi ding nadei ahi.
Namtin vaipi chu amaho khuh kilaisaa alha lut gamun, Akamsau thanga chun akengphangin a-ohsoh tauve.
Pakai chu acham chamin ahung kiphongin, Thu ahung tan tai; Migiloute vang chu amaho kamsa Thangkol sunga a-oh den soh tauve. Higgaion. Selah
Pathen sumil namtin vaipi abonchan, Migilou jouse noimigama chesoh keidiu ahi.
Ajeh chu neh le chah ngaite jong suhmila kikoi koi louva, Vaichate kinepna jong aitih a suhmila um jing lou ding ahi.
Hung kipatdoh jengin Pakai, Mihem kijosah hihhel’in; Nangma angsung laitah a chun Namtin vaipi thu kitan hen!
Vo Pakai, miho hi abonchan hoh dalsoh-in, Mihem mai mai ahiu hi namtin vaipi kihetdoh sah-in! Selah
Vo Pakai, ibol’a kidal khin khin nahiya, Genthei hesoh kom leh kisel mang nahim?
Kiletsah tah-in migilouhon vaichate savevun adelun, Amaho hi athilgon ma mauvah kipalsah jengin.
Ajeh chu migilouvin adeichat alunga atup chu Kiletsah nan aneiyin, Neh le chah kilosea jong chun, Pakai ataitom jin ahousei.
Mi kiletsah chun amai atlet lut’in apun, Pathen aholsin sin poi; Alungthim ngaito jousen jong “Pathen aumpoi,” tin aseiye.
Alamlhah jouse, aphat tin anitinin akhang touvin, Nangma thutanna jong asang behseh tan amu phapoi; Akidoupi jouse jong chu Amut mang hel jin ahi.
Alungthimin, “Eikisuling jou ponte, akhang khanga keiman kidoupi kanei lou ding ahi,” ati.
Akamsunga la gaosapna, joulhepna, bolgentheina ding adimin, Aleigui jong joule nal thujeng sei nan adimtai.
Khotin vengtina mi changlhi din atoule len, Mi muphah louna ding lai laiya themmona bei mi athat’in ahi.

Panpi beiho chu amit te nin ave-lhi geh jengin, Sakei bahkai bangin Guhthim chan thingle lea akisel’in, Mivaichate akimat tan theina dingin achang pange; Athangkama chu mivaicha a-okhah teng, Apum changin akimat jeng jin ahi.
Panpi bei chu anoigepjin ahileh akital heljie; Migilou thahatpa koma alhun alum denji tai.
Aman alungthimin agel’in, “Pathenin ima jouse asuhmil ahitai, Amai jong aselmang tan, Imacha mupha taponte,” tin agel’e.
Vo Pakai, Pathen kipatdoh jengin naban hinjah-in, Bolgenthei hesoh thoh te hi sumil loujenin.
Ipi dinga migilouvin Pathen ataitoma, Chule alungthim sunga, “Nangman imacha neilesah sah pon nate,” ati ham?

Nangin phatah a namu ahin, Gentheina le thoh gimna nangin namel chih mongnai; Hitia hi vet’a chutengleh nakhut laiya matchom ding nagon, Panpi bei mi-chun nang bou nahin bel’e; Pabeiya um chagate dingin jong Nang bou apanpia pang jing nahiye.
Nangman thilse bolte leh agilou bolte Banjang jouse vohboh peh-in lang, Agitlouna chengse chu ‘Naholmo hel kahsen hol hol jengin.
Pakai chu atonsot tonsot’in aleng chang tai; Agamsunga kona namtin vaipi mangthah diu ahi.
Vo Pakai, nangin mi lung nengte deichat naphal peh jin. Alungthimu natilkhou jin ataonau na-ngaiye.
Hitia chu pabei chagate leh bolset toh ho Adih lam jenga thu tanpeh ding nati ahin, Chutengleh leiset’a kisema hung pengdoh mihem hin Mi abol genthei kit louhelna ding nati ahi.
Keima Pakaiya kiselji kahin, I-atileh nang hon keijah a “Vacha tobangin Molsang dunga nung len tan;
Ven, migilouten thalpi akamtauvin, Thalchang jong thai pi khao toh atotauve; Jan muthim tengleh Mi lungdih ho kap gam din agouve;
Aki-ngaina bulpi jouse akisuh mang teng, Midih chun ipi aboljou nah lai ding ham?” natiu ham?
Pakai chu ahouin thenga achengin, Pakai laltouna vana akidoi; Amit te nin ahinve jin, Mihem chate hi amit lhep jin ahi.
Pakaiyin midih jong migilou jong apatep jin, Pumhat jenga natong nom mi chu alungin ahotbole.
Pakaiyin migiloute chunga Mei-al tampi le katsong meikou gojuh a ajuh sah ding, Khopihui savevu pi chu Twidona adon diu achan diu khon ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai hi adih jingin, Adih jenga thil kibol chu angailui; Koi koi hijeng jongleh Midih chun Pakai mai amutei ding ahiye.
Pakai huhhing loiyin, Ajeh chu Pathen hepha mihem aumtapoi; Ijeh-inem itileh mihem kitah jouse Mihem chate lah a konin abeisoh tai.
Amitakip’in aheng akom jah a thujou jeng aseiyin, Lungtho nei leh kam nal hiu heuvin thu aseiyui.
Mihem kam nal hiu heuva thuseiho hi Pakaiyin sugam soh bel hen; Kiletsah thuseina dinga Lei kilehpel jouse sugam hen.
“Eihon kamhat’in kinel khup jouvin tin, Kikam them cheh na, Koipen ham eiho chunga Apipua pang jou ding?” tia seiho sugam hen.
“Mivaichate akisuhset soh a Nelou chalouten genthei athoh jeh hin, Tua keijong kakipat’a Phu kalah ding ahi,” tin Pakaiyin aseiyin; “Aman adeichat angaichat laitah hin Lung mongin koi nange,” ati.
Pakai thutep jouse hi thutep theng jeng ahin, Dangka kisou jolsel meiphunga kiloidoh le Avel vel’a vel sagi vei Kisou thengsel tobang ahi.
Vo Pakai, nangin keiho neihuh-uvin, Hiche khang mitea kon hin nei-ngah jinguvin.
Jet le vei muntina migilou jeng avah len, Mihem chate lah a pannabei mijeng akichoi sangui.
Vo Pakai, nangman itih chan geiya neidonda ding hiya, Itih chan geiya vet louva neikoi ding ham?
Itih chan kahinkhoa genthei hesoh kathoh a, Nilhum lhuma kalungthima hibang gimna kathoh ding ham? Itih chan geiya kamelma hi Kachunga kichoi sang sang jeng ding ham?
Vo Pakai ka-Pathen geltoh-in neidonbut’in. Kamit teni hasah jingin ajo le kijam ingting thi-mit kasin pai thei ahi;
Chujongleh kamelma pan, “Kajouve kajouve,” eitilo ding ahin; Hitobanga keima lhahsam jeh a hi Kakidoupipa kipa thanop lo ding ahi.
Ahivangin keiman nalungset longlou katahsan jingin, Na mihuhhingna a kalungthim kipah jing ding ahi.
Pakaiyin phatah-a eiboljeh-in Keiman avahchoi la sange.
Pakaiyin vana konin mihem chate ahinven, Ching theiya natong thilbol uma Pathen hol um nam, tin ahinvei.
Mihemte hi avahmang ahitauvin, Kibang cheh a amonsoh ahitauve; Thilpha bol’a pang khat jong aumpon, Mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong aumpoi.
Hiche thilse bol miho hin hetna aneilouvu hiya, Kamite kivahnaa neiya bahgam get gut miho hin; Hitobang tah a Pakai him him
Amaho hi kichat tijat’a mah thah-uva, Ajeh beiya jong kihot lhul gam diuahi; Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen chu Midih khanga mite toh apangkhom jinge.
Nang hon mivaichate thilgon vang sunoh-uvin natin, Ahinla vaicha kiselna chu Pakai ahijinge.
Ohe, Ziona kona Israel kihuhdohna hung kondoh ding hihen! Pakaiyin chutia amite hamphatna asemphat tengleh Jacob jong kipah thanom intin, Israel jong kipah ding ahi.
Vo Pakai koiham nahoubuh a vah le thei? Koiham Pakai nalhang thenga cheng ding?
Mihem koiham achondan alamlhah nolnabeiya vah lea, Thildih jeng jeng bol’a pang, Alungthima kona jong Thudih jeng seidoh thei;
Thu alep’a seina dia aleigui jong kileh lou, Agol apai koma jong thilse bol louva um, Aheng akom chunga jong Engset lethuh louva um thei;
Amit te nia jong kivetdana kilahdoh sah ngailou, Pakai gingte jabol tah a neiya, Ama le ama thohgimna dia kihahsel ngamjenga, Akitepna khel kit lou thei;
Asum neijong akan muna dinga phaldoh lou, Themmona beite douna nehguh kilah ngailou. Hitobang tah a chona thilbol vang chu Koi koi hijeng jongleh iman asuh long jou lou ding ahi.
O Pathen nei hong jingin, Ajeh chu nanga kisel kahi.
Keiman Pakai koma, “Nangma ka-Pakai nahin, Nangma kom tailouva thilpha kaneipoi,” kati.
Gamsunga mithengte vang milen milal jeng ahiuvin, Kakipa thanopna abonchan achunguva aum cheh-e.
Pathen donlouva achom khat kisemthuho khun Gim genthei akiboldoh be beuvin; Thisana kilhaina abol’u jong kasun lhah peh lou ding, Aminu jong kakamsunga kaphah poh lou ding ahi.
Pakai hi kei dia kalhensa kachan ahitan, Kadeitah kadonna khon ahi; Hijeh chun Pakai nangin Keichan ding neituh chah peh jingin.
Gamgi kite-naa keima ding munpha pha akitedoh-in, Hijeh chun keiman goulo phatah kaneiye.
Eithumop jing Pakai chu kapah chai; Jan teng jongleh kalungthim hin eihil hiljie.
Keiman kamaiya Pakai kamu jingin, Hijeh hin kathapi jetlamin apangin suh ling hoi hiponge.
Hichejeh hin kalungthim akipah-in, kalhagao athanome; Katsahsa jong mongtah-in akho sai.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin noimigama neison lhapon, Nang dia Pathen geljing ho jong kokhuh a nalhahsah poi.
Nangman hinna lampi neihil’in, Nang umna jousea kipana alhingset jin ahi; Nukhut jetlama Tonsot tonsot’a lung lhaina jeng nachoiye.
O Pakai adih a kataona hi ngaiyin lang, Kahung ka-tho teng leh khohsah-in; Joule nal toh melouhel’a kataona hi Nanabeng hinsungin ngai tei teiyin.
Nanga konin kadihna phongdoh-in, Adih kiti chu namit te nin vetemin!
Nangman kalungthim kholin lang, Jan tengleh neihung ve-lhin Neipatep jongle chun Kachunga gitlouna mudoh deh pon nate; Kakamsung hin Thu kaseikhel hih laiye.
Nakamsung thusah-a mihem natoh thudol ahin Keiman pumhat thu sei ding kapeldoh jinge.
Chondoh louhel’in nalampi jousea kakal kasep jingin, Hijeh chun kakengphang teni jong kalho nal khapoi.
Vo Pathen, nangma kakou teng, Neihou tei teiyin natin; Hijeh chun kahenga nanabeng hinsungin, Kathusei abonchan neijah peh-in.
Kidangtah-in nalungset longlou neimusah-in, Kiselna neidia naholte din Huhhingpu nahin, Akidoupiteuva konin Nakhut jetlam in nahuh jie.
Namit chang bangin neichingin, Nalhaving teni noiya neisel’in;
Migiloute suhset dia eiboltea kon leh, Ei-umchan kheh a mi that that dia kilom kamelmatea kon hin.
Ama ho hin dip damna him him aneipouvin, Akamsunguvin kiletsahna thujeng aseiyui.
Ama hon eichon lhu uvin, ei-umkimvel soh tauve; Tolsena nei dingin bou eive ve jenguve.
Mi botel jeng dia goa sakei bahkai lung hangpet abanguvin, Sakei bahkai goldong chang pang le tobang ahiuve.
Hung kipatdoh jengin Pakai, Kidintepin lang akhup athal’in leh jengin! Nachemjam panin lang Migiloupaa konin kahinkho huhhingin.

Vo Pakai, mihemtea konin nahan thahat in neihuhhingin, Vannoi leiset ngailu mitea konin neihuhhingin. Amaho nehsah dinga nakhol jing chu Amaho hi oiva van khumpeh jengin; Achate atuteuvin jong aval val’in neu hen, Acha atute diuvin jong phabep beh khenpeh-uhen.
Kenvang mona beiya nangma mai kamu tei ding, Kathodoh teng na-mel kamuleh lung nachim tange.
Vo kahatna Pakai, Keiman nang ka-ngailui;
Pakai chu keidia kakiselna songpi, Kakul pile Eihuhhingpa ahin; A-angsunga kiselna kaneiji ahin; Kalumdal’a pang, Eihuhhinga pang maicham saki tobang, Chule kakul pi dettah ahi.
Vahchoi dia lomtah Pakai henga kataovin, Kamelmatea konin eihuhhingtai.
Thina khaovin eikanchalsoh tan, Manthahna lui hohtwi longin eilonvuh tai;
Noimigam khaovin eihelchahsoh tan, Kamasanga thina ding thang akikamsoh tai.
Kagenthei hesoh phat’in Pakai jeng kakouvin, Eipanpi ding ka-Pathen henga kataove. Ahouin sunga konin Pakaiyin ka-ogin a jan, Kataona ogin chu anabeng te nia alut tai.
Chutah chun leiset akilingin ling akihot’e; Leiset bulpi jouse leh molsang jouse jong akithinge; Pakai alunghan phat chun Ling akihot jengin ahi.
Pakai nah-homa konin meikhu ahung kitungdoh jen junin, Akamsunga koninjong mi leuvam hel thei meikou ahung koudoh-e; Hiti hin akoma konin Mei-al al-leng lungin ahung kitungdoh-in ahi.
Pakaiyin van jengjong asonkunin ahung kumlhai; Meibang lhangkhal kihehpi jong ahinchot phan ahi.
Pakai cherub chunga atouvin alenge; Khopihui jong lhavingin amangin ahung loi jenge.
Meilhang muthim lah a ahungin akimvel jing chet-in abole; Aloupina meibang lhangkhal kihehpi chu twito akihal’in ahi.
Amasang vahpem pum lai meilhang lah a konin Meikong ahungpah lah lah-in gel ahung lhai.
Pakaiyin van mun jousea van akithinsah-in, Hatchungnung chun a-ogin thongin alhai; Meikong ahung pah lah lah jin Gel ahung lhan ahi.
Pakaiyin thalpi ahinkap doh jin, Mitin anojam jie; Kol aphetsah jin Mitin vaipi athecheh soh hel jie.
Kol aphet tengleh twikhanglen to gei geiyin akimun, Leiset bulpi jouse jong akeovin aumjie; Vo Pakai nangin naphoa Nanah nakhon khumteng chutia chu umdoh ji ahi.
Pakaiyin chung lama konin jong eihin sangjin,Keima eituhjin eikaidoh jie; Twipi kinong lai jenga jong chun Pakaiyin keima eikaidoh jin ahi.
Pakaiyin kamelma hat tah koma konin jong eihuhdoh jin, Ahat behseh jeh-uva thoh lel’ a umtea Kon jengin jong Pakai chun Keima eikaidoh-in, eihot boltea konin eikaidoh-e.
Hitobang miho chu hamset kato nikhoa eilonvuh a pangji ahiuvin, Ahivangin kei dingin Pakai bou kapansatna ahi.
Pakaiyin gam-ong len lai laiya eipuidoh jin, Kachunga akipa jeh-in eihuhdoh jie.
Keima kadihna jeh-in Pakaiyin kipaman eipen, Kakhut’a thilse kabol loutoh kithuhin eibol peh nai.
Ajeh chu keiman Pakai chonchan jouse kanit jingin, Ka-Pathen koma konin giloutah-in kapotdoh khapoi.
Pakai chondanna jouse chu keima maiya akilang jingin, Achonna dan jouse jong donlouvin kanei khapoi.
Pakai angsunga nolnabeiyin kaumin Themmona beiyin kaum jing theiye.
Hijeh chun kadihna dungjuiyin Pakaiyin eibolpeh jie; Amitmua kakhut’a thilse bol lou kahijeh chun Pakaiyin keima hi Akitoh bep’in eibol jinai.
Mi kitah chu nangin jong kitah-in naboljin, Nolnabei mi chu nolnabeiyin nabol pehjie.
Alung theng jong athen bangin naboljin, Mi lungkon jong chu akon bangin naboljie.
Ajeh chu nangin nam kinemsah te nahuhdoh jin, Mittol le lua mi vele ho vang chu nasonlha jie.
Pakai nangman kathaomei nei vah peh jie; Pakai ka-Pathenin kei dia muthim lah jeng jong nasalvah soh tai.
Nangma panpi jal’a sepai hon khat jong kanoigoi ding, Ka-Pathen thahat vanga palvum jong kachop khup ding ahi.
Hiche Pathen hi alampi jong nolnabei ahin, Pakai thutep chu adih monge, ti akiphochen e. Ama kisonpia ahenga kisel jouse dingin Pakai chu luma pang jeng ahitai.
Ajeh chu Pathen kiti chu koi dang ham Pakai hilou ham? Songpi sun’a kisung jeng chu eiho Pathen hilou ham?
Hiche Pathen hin kei jong athahat’a eihon jinga, Kalamlhah jouse jong athetngim jing ahi.
Pathen chun keima kengphang teni jong sajuh kengphang tobangin asemin. Munsang lai laiya jong dettah-in eidinsah theiye.
Pakaiyin kakhut teni jong galsat din ahil hil’in, Hijeh chun kabanjang jengjong sumenga kisem thalpi jen akijetheiye.
Nangman mi nahinsona ji huhhingna chun Lum kidal khum bangin neidal chun, Nakhut jetlam in eipanpi jing jengin, Nangma kithopi hin thupi tah eisoi.
Nangman kakalsotna ding jeng jong ong lentah tah neipen, Hijeh chun kakengphang teni jong kalho-nal poi.
Kamelmate nung kadel’a ahileh Abonchauvin kaphan kamansoh tai; Abonchauva kasuh gamhel kahsen Kahung kile kit ji tapoi.
Abonchauvin melmate chu kasat chap jin akithou tapouve; Apumpin kakengtoa akijamtauve.
Ajeh chu nangin galsatna muna din, Thahatna jouse kong chen kichen banga neichenpeh a, Eidelkhumte jong chu Kanoiya nakijam chap sah ahiye.
Nangin kamelmate chu kamasanga nale heiyin najam sah jin, Thet le hot’a eibolte chu kasugamjin ahi.
Amaho chu akap’uvin kithopi ding akou kouvun, Koimacha akithopi diu aumpoi; Pakai henga ataovun, Amanla adonbut pouve.
Ken amaho hi khohui masanga leivui kithing bangin Kathing ngimsel’in, Kholai dunga bonlhoh kiphet ngim bangin Abonchauvin kaphet ngim sel’e.
Mitin vaipi kidouna lah a jong Nangman neihuhdoh jin; Namtin vaipi lah a keima hi Apipu penin neisemjie; Keiman kahet phah louhel mite jong Kei din lhachan ahung panguvin ahi.
Amaho hin kathu ajah jah uleh, Kathun anung jeng jiuvin; Gamdang miho jeng jong Kineosah tah-in kahenga ahunguve.
Gamdang mite chu akipha lam behsehuvin, Lungthim mansah hel theiyin kitihot hot’in ahungui.
Pakai ahing jinge, kasongpi tobang Pakai nun nom hen; Kei dia huhhinga pang ka-Pathen chu choi-at’in um hen.
Kei dia phula pang Pathen chu, Mitin vaipi kanoiya sonkun Pathen jong ahi.
Aman kamelmatea konin jong eihuhdoh tan, Hitobang hin nangin kakidoupite chunga neichoisange; Pumhat jenga mi no-le letea konin jong Nangin keima neihuhdoh tai.
Hijeh hin vo Pakai namtin vaipi lah a nachoi-an inge; Chutengleh nangma minin vahchoi la sange.
Pakaiyin alenga atunpa nasa tah-in gal ajosah-in, Thao anusa lengpa chu long louvin alungset’e; Hiti hin David le ason achilhah te chu Tonsot tonsot geiyin alungset jing jenge.
Van mun jousen Pathen loupin aphongin, Vanthamjol hin Pathen khutsoh athilsem aseidoh-e.
Ani anin thu kisei chu twi kisunglha abangin, Ajan janin hetna akiphongdoh doh jenge.
Thu kiseiya jong abeitan, Athu athun jong akijapoh tapoi; Hitobang miho chu A-ogin ahusau jeng jong akijatapoi.
Ahivangin a-oginu chu leiset pumpia hi vah chen soh ahin, Athuseiyu jong vannoi kolmong geiya kithechansoh ahi. Pathenin chunga nichang din, Ponbuh khat asonpeh-e.
Hiche nichang chu aji kipui nikhoa Ajinu umna indana hung kondah pa bangin avah chanthe thui; Chujongleh pasal hat tah Thanoma kikhosal teh a lhai tobang ahi.
Ahung sodoh jong Van mong lang khat a hung kipan ahin, Van mong lang khatma jona kitol kimsoh keiyah ahi; Nichang hitobanga asat tengleh Thil imacha akisel thei aumpoi.
Pakai danthu hi achamkimin, Hinkhoa kisuh hal jing jeng theina ahi; Pakai thutep hettohsah jong thonlou ahin, Miching tah a kisei jong milham asodeljie.
Pakai thugahna jouse jong adih cheh-in, Lungthima kipa pana thei cheh ahi; Pakai thupeh hi athengin, Mit te nia vet dinga jong vetnom nom um ahiye.
Pakai gin hi thil theng ahin, Tonsot kumkhon abang ahijinge. Pakai chondan jouse jong, Abonchan adih-in akitah soh keiye.
Hicheng hi sana sanga jong deichat ding, Sana thengsel simjou lou tojong tekah thei ahipoi; Khoiju sangin alhum jon, Akhoiphang dunga kilhoh lhatil sang in alhumjoi.
Nalhacha keima hi hicheng hin eihil chah a, Hicheng nit themjeh a hi kipaman lentah kamu ahi.
Ahinla mihem koi hin ama themmona ahetdoh jouvam? Thepmona kisel chengsea konin neisil ngimin.

Hetoh louva kiletsah kabolna chengsea konin Nalhacha keima hi neihoidoh jingin lang, Hitobang chonsetna chengse chu Kei chunga vaihom sah dan! Chutileh keima nolnabeiyin umthei ying ting, Suh khelna nasa tah tah a jong mo kachan lou ding ahi.
Vo Pakai kasongpi le eilhatdampu, Kakamsung soh kathusei jouse leh Kalungthima nathu kagel chengse hi Nangma mitmun santhei hisah tei teiyin.
Genthei hesoh nato ni leh Pakaiyin nahin houji ji hen! Jacob Pathen min chun nahong jing hen!
Pathenin muntheng phunga konin Nangma kithopi ding hinsol hen lang; Zion lhanga kon chun Napanpi ding napetei tei hen!
Pathenin nathilto abonchan geldoh jing hen, Pumgo thilto nato jong nalung lhaipeh hen. Selah
Pathenin nalunga nadei chan nape hen lang, Nathilgon natup jouse jong bulhit peh hen!
Nagaljo kipapi nan keihon lhang sam’ uving ting, I-Pathenu mina ponlap jouse kadop sang diu ahi! Pakaiyin nadei na-ngai nathum jouseu Abonchan nape lhingsoh keiyu hen!
Tun kahetai, Pakaiyin athaonusa lengpa akithopi tei ding, Van mun thenga kona ahinhou ding; Akhut jetlama apanpia Kidang tah tah a gal jouse ajopeh ding ahi.
Mi abang bangin kangtalai ho Sakolte pou kison nan aneiyun, Keiho vang Pakai i-Pathenu mina Kisong kahiuve.
Hitobang miho chu kisep lhu’uva kijam den diu ahin, Keiho vang kipatdoh-uving ting kadin jang diu ahi.
Vo Pakai, lengpa hi gal josah teiyin, Nahenga kahung tao tenguleh neihouvun.
Vo Pakai nangma thahat’a lengpa akipah thanome, Itobang tah a nangma panpi chun kichoisangna anei hitam!
Nangin alungthima adeichat pen napen, Akama athum jong na-itpeh tapoi. Selah
Nangin ama chu phatthei nan nalamdot’ in, Alua sana thengsel lal lukhuh nakhuhpeh tai.
Lengpan nahenga hinna athumin, Nangin jong nape jenge; Tonsot tonsot geiya hing dingin Nangin athum chu naphalpeh tai.
Nangma panpi jal’in aloupina anasa lheh jengin, Lal loupina le minthanna achunga nakaisah tai.
Nangin ama hi tonsot geiya phatthei boh changpen nahisah-in, Naumpin nakipa thanop sah jing jenge.
Ajeh chu lengpa hin Pakai jenga kisonna aneiyin, Hatchungnung pen lungset long louva kona kitolmang louhel ding ahi.
Nakhut’in namelmate amatkhomsoh ding, Nahot bolte chu nakhut jetlama naholdoh soh ding ahi.
Abonchauva lhumsung meikong tobang nahisah ding ahi, nangma nahung kilah tengleh; Pakaiyin alungsat teng aboncbauva abahgam soh a, Abonchauva meiyin aleovamsoh hel ding ahiuve.
Ason achilhah jouseu jong leiset’a kona nasuh bei ding, Mihem chate lah a kona achateu nasuh bei ding ahi.
Nang douna thilse agon’uva joule nal asemthuu jong leh, amolso theilou diu ahi.
Ajeh chu nangin nadeljam soh a, Nathal chang jousea amaichang lai laiyu nadoi ding ahi.
Vo Pakai nathahat chun kichoi sangin! Nathahat chu keihon la kasah-uva kavahchoi diu ahi.
Ka-Pathen, ka-Pathen, Ibol’a neidalhah hitam? Ibol’a hichan gama nauma neikithopi phah lou ham? Ibol’a genthei hesoh kathoh a kathusei jouse najah phah lou hitam?
O ka-Pathen, sun teng nangma kakou jin Nangin neihouji poi; Jan khovah vah-in katao jin, Kicholdo thei louvin kaume.
Hijongleh nangma Atheng nahin, Israelte vahchoi dia laltouna touvah nahi.
Kapu kapateuvin nangma kisonna naneiyuva,
Amahon natahsan jeh-uva kisonna nanei jeh-un nangin amaho nahuhdoh jin ahi. Kisonna nanei jeh-uvin lung himona lung thoina aneipouve.
Hinla keivang hi mihem tithei hilouva lungtol bep kahin, Mihemin eihousen mipi not thap’a umdoh kahitai.
Eimupha chanin tot nop nan eineiyun, Akam bem bemin eihouvun alu eithin khum khum’ui.
“Ama hi Pakaiya kisong hichu me, Pakai chun huhdoh nante; Kipa thanopna anei hichu me, Pakaiyin huhdoh jeng tante!” atiuve.
Pakai nangma hi naobu sunga eiloidoh jong nahin, Kanu pheichunga anoi te nia neivah a mong tah a neikoi ahi.
Kahung penlhah a pat napheichunga eikoi jingu ahin, Kanun eihindoh a pat nangma kaPathen nahi jinge.
Gentheina ahung naiye, neidalha hih hel’in, Keima panpi ding hi adang koima aumpoi.
Bongchal tampin eium kimsoh tan, Bashan phaiya bongchal hattah hon eium kimsoh tai.
Akamhom let let’in eihouvun, Sakei bahkai kisen sen tobang ahiuve.
Kei hi twi kisung lha banga eikisung lha ahitan, Kaguchin kachang chin akikhensoh ding ahipaitai. Kalungthim jong khoilu tobangin Ka-op lhang sunga ajolsoh paitai.
Kathahat abonchan leibel kivogoi ahalsi kiphougo abangin, Kalei jong kadang te nia abeh den tai; Nangin thina leivui lah a neijamin Neidalha dentan ahi.
Uichaten eiumkimvel’in, Thilse boljing mihon khat’in eiumtauve; Amaho hin kakhut le kakeng Asunchen soh tauvin ahi.
Keiman kagu kachang jouse jong kasim theiyin, Amahon eimit lhep lhep’uvin nehgam ding bangin mit lhalouvin eiveuve.
Kavon jouse akihom’uvin, Kaponsil jouse jong avangpha pha chang hen, tin vang akisantauve.
Vo Pakai, nangin neidalha loujenin, Eikithopi jing nangman neihin naiyin neihun!
Chemjam masanga kahinkho huhdohin lang, Uicha tinhem kah a konin neihuh-doh-in!
Sakei bahkai kamsunga konin neihuhdoh-in lang, Bongchal ki teni kah a konin kahinkho genthei huhdoh tan!
Keiman kasopite henga namin seichoi lenge; Houbung sunga nangma kavahchoi ding ahi.
Pakai ging miten Pakai chu vahchoiyun! Nang ho Jacob chate jousen loupi tah-in choian un! Israel chate jousen Pakai ging cheh-in, Akoma hung ding soh keiyuvin.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin vaicha bolgenthei thoh te chu Donlou leh kidah-in akoipon, Hitobang genthei hesoh chu vet louvin akoipoi; Ahenga atao tengleh angaipeh jobouve.
Houbung tampi kikhopna jenga jong Nanga konin bou vahchoina kabol’in, Nangma ginga natongte mitmun Kakitepna thil pejing jeng inge.
Bolgenthei thoh a um jong chun, Neh le chah akimua vaset ding, Pakai holten jong avahchoi cheh diu ahi! Nalungthim uva mang louvin cheng jing hen.
Leiset kolmang geiya chengten jong ageldoh-uva Pakai henga hung kile kit diu ahi; Chutengleh namtin vaipi insung jousen jong a-angsunga chibai aboh cheh diu ahi.
Ajeh chu vaipo thuneiya Pakai amabou ahin, Namtin vaipi chunga aman vai ahome.
Ama henga leiset’a hiletsah jouse kun cheh-uva, Leivui soh ding jouse a-angsunga kunsoh diu ahi; Amale ama kihinsah theilou miho chu Ama angsunga kun cheh diu ahi.
Mite son le pah-in Pakai kinbou abol’uva, Khangthah hunglhung kit ding mite jah a Pakai thu aphongdoh diu ahi.
Pakai thilbol anatohsa hi apeng loulai mite jah a jong Ahinphon jal soh hel diu ahinalaiye.
Pakai chu kelngoi chin’a eichingpa ahin, Keima lhasam ponge;
Aman hamhing dum lah lah a kelngoi kol’in eikolsah jin, Kiling louhel’a twi veina pang dunga eipui lei.
Pakaiyin kahinkho akiledoh sah kit jin, Ama min khohsah jal’in lampi dih jenga eipuiye.
Keiman thina phaicham lim jotpa jongleng, Thilse kaging tapoi; Ajeh chu nangman neilhonpin, Natenggol le namoljol chun neihong jingin neilhamon nai.
Kamelmate masang jenga jong Nangman kaneh ding ankong dokhanga neiluipeh-in, Kalua thao neinujol peh soh keiyin, Kadon ding jong kakhon alet lha jenge.
Thon louhel’a phatna le hepi nan Kahinkho lhum keiya eijui jing ding ahi; Chule keijong tonsot tonsot geiya Pakai insunga kachen jing ding ahi.
Leiset le asunga um thil adimset’a kikoihi Aboncha Pakaiya a hin; Vannoi pumpi le asunga cheng jouse jong Aboncha Pakaiya ahiuve.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin leiset hi twikhanglen chunga atundoh a, Noilam twipi chunga aluiya aphudet ahi.
Pakai lhangvuma kaldoh thei koi hiya, Pakai munthenga ding thei ding koi ham?
Hitobang mi hiding chu Akhut’a thilse bol khalou alungthim theng, Thil dih lou bolna dinga Ahinkhoa kimang kha louhel mi. Jou le nal thu jeng seilouva, Jouva kihahsel louhel mi hi ding ahi.
Hitobang mi hin Pakaiya kona phattheina akimu ding, Ahuhhingpa Pathena kona them channa akimu ding ahi.
Pakai hol jingte chu akhangu chuti chu ahin, Jacob Pathen mai vejinga holte chu chuti ahiuve. Selah
Vo kelkot jouse naluu khangsangun; Vo khangluiya kisemsa kotpi ho kikhang sanguvin. Loupina lengpa chu Ahung lut theina dingin!
Koi ham hiche loupina lengpa hi? Pakai tha nei tah le hangtah, Galmuna thaneipen Pakai ahi.
Vo kelkot jouse naluu khangsangun! Vo khangluiya kisemsa kotpi ho kikhang sanguvin! Loupina lengpa chu Ahung lut theina dingin!
Hiche loupina lengpa hi koi ham? Thaneipen Pakai, ama hi loupina lengpa ahi! Selah
Vo Pakai nangma koma kalhagao kachoi sangin kapei.
Vo ka-Pathen keima nachunga ki-ngai kahi, Neijumso loujenin, Kachunga kamelmate Kichoisang sah hih hel’in.
Nangma ngah jinga umte hi Mihem khat cha jong jumso hih-in; Panna beiya akaleh akalouva chonte vang Jumson lang jachatsah soh keiyin.
O Pakai nalampi jouse kahet theina din neihil’in, Nangma lamlhah jouse neiseipeh tan.
Nalamdih a neipuiyin lang neihil jin. Ajeh chu nang hi eihuhhing Pathen nahijinge; Keiman nang hi Nilhum lhuma ka-nga jing jeng nahi.
O Pakai namikhoto chu geldoh-in khohsah tan. Ajeh chu namihepina leh nalungset longlou hi Gol lui lai khanga hung umsa jing ahilhone.

Kakhangdon laiya kachonset jouse geldoh ta hih-in, Kasuh khel jouse jong geldoh dan; Lungset longlou nanei jeh chun Keima neihin geldoh jingin; Nangma phatna khoh sah jeh chun Neisumil loujenin, Pakai!
Apha le adih kiti chu Pakai ahin, Hijeh chun aman chonna dola jong chonsete ahilchah jie.
Mi kinemsah ho jong chu lamdih a apuiyin, Hitobang mi kinemsah te chu achon chan ahil hiljie.
Pakai lamlhah kitiho chu Lungsetna longlou le kitahna ahi; Pakai kitepna le athupeh chengse nit jingte chu Lungset longlou le kitahnaa um ahiuve.
Vo Pakai kathemmona anasa behseh tai, Namin khohsah jal’in nei ngaidamin.
Pakai ginga mihem chu koipen ham? Ama chu Pakaiyin ache-na ding lampi ahil ding ahi.
Ama chu ahinkho sunga hao theiya Achaten jong gamsung hi alo diu ahi.
Pakaito kijolna thei hi ama gingten bou aneiyui; Amaho hi Pakaiyin akitepna ahetsah jin ahi.
Kamit te nin Pakai lamjeng avejingin ahi; Ajeh chu Pakaiyin thangkol’a ohsa kakengphang teni asut lhai.
Kahenga hung kihei yin lang neilungset’in, Ajeh chu kachangbou kahitan genthei hesoh kathoh-e.
Kalungthima kagimna hi subeiyin, Hesoh genthei kathohna kon hin neipuidoh tan.
Kahesoh gentheina le kagimna neigelpeh-in, Kachonset jouse jong ngaidamin.
Kagalte ijat phauvam geldoh temin, Itobang tah a amaho hin eivetdau hitam!
Kahinkho hi ngah jingin lang neihuhdoh tan, Nanga kisel jing kahi, neijumso hih hel’in,
Themmona bei le lung dettah-in neikoiyin neihoi damin, Ajeh chu keiman nang jeng ka-ngah jinge.
Vo Pathen ahesoh gentheinaa konin Isreal hi lhatdamin.
Vo Pakai them neichanin, Ajeh chu lung dettah-in kavah len, Lungni lungthum tilouvin Pakai jenga lung ka-ngaiye.
Vo Pakai, neipatep’in lang kathem kamo ven; Kalungthim gilsung hi patep mong mongin.
Ajeh chu nalungset longlou chu kamit kamaiya akilang jingin. Keijong nang din kitah tah-in kavah lei.
Keima mijou toh katoukhom ngaipon, Mi phalhem ho tojong kaleng khom ngaipoi;
Thilse bolte kiloikhomna chu kahot bol’in, Migiloute toh katoukhom ngaipoi.
Themmona beiyin kakhut teni kasop thengin, Vo Pakai namaicham vel’a kavah lei.
Thangvahna oging tah-in la kasan, Nathilbol kidang tah tah chu kaseilei.
O Pakai, nachenna in chu ka-ngai chan, Naloupina ngah mun chu ka-ngai chai.
Chonsete chutoh neitheh mang tha dan lang, Thisan sohat mite toh kahinkho suh mang tha hih-in;
Akhut te nia thilse bol ding dimsette, Akhut jetlam’uva nehguh jeng kilah te chutoh neitheh mang tha lou jenun.
Keivang lung dettah-in kavah len ahi; Neilhatdoh-in neilungset’in.
Leitol chamdeng laiya kadingin, Houbung khoppi len kikhopnaa Pakai choian inge.
Kei din Pakai hi khovah a vah chule huhhingna ahi; Ken koipen kagin ding ham? Kahinkho dinga Pakai hi kulpi ahin, Koipen kakichat ding ham?
Thilse bolten eihin delkhum’uva, Keima douna thuse jeng aseiyu jongJeh, Kaki doupite leh kagalte chu Kipal lhusoh hel’uva kijam chap diu ahi.
Sepai hon khat’in kidoupi din eium’u jong leh, Kalungthim kicha deh ponte; Keima dou din gal hung kon jeng jongleh Kisong tah a kapan nah lai ding ahi.

Keiman Pakai henga thil khat kathum jingin, Hiche thil khat chu bou kahol jing jeng ding ahi. Hichu kahinkho lhum keiya hi Pakai insunga kachen theiya, Pakai mel-hoi kavet jing ding, Ahouin sunga amatoh kihou hou ding kati ahi.
Ajeh chu genthei hesoh nikho jongleh Pakaiyin alim noiya eisel jingin tin, Aponbuh noiya eikoiya eikhu khum jing ding, Songpi chunga sangtah a eikhandoh ding ahi.

Hijeh chun tunvang kavel’a kamelmate chungvuma Kaluchang doh vel vol ding ahitai; Chule Pakai houbuh sunga thilto kapeh a Kipah thanoma kilhaina tampi kapeh ding; Pakai henga keiman O-ngeiya la kasah ding ahi.
Vo Pakai othonga kahin kouteng neihouvin, Neilungset’in neidonbut tei teiyin!
Nahenga kalungthim in aseiyin, “Kamai hinhol’in, tin aseiye” ati. “Vo Pakai keiman Nang mai kaholnai,” ati.
Kei dingin namai selmang loujen in. Nalhachapa hi lung hanga kihei mang khum din neigo loujenin; Nangma bou eikithopia pangjing nahin, Neipaidoh dan, neidalha hih-in, Vo Pathen Eihuhhinga!
Ajeh chu kapa le kanun jong eidalha lhonin, Hijongle Pakaiyin eiching nante.
Vo Pakai nalampi neihil’in, Kamelmate jeh hin lamphei lama neipuiyin.
Kakidoupite deilam lamin neipedoh jeng hih-in, Ajeh chu jouthua eihehse sea mi atamtai; Hitobang miho hin Hutot jengin thu eisei khum’uve.
Keiman mihing gamsunga Pakai phatna kamutei ding katahsane.
Pakai chu ngah hat’in, Thaphan lang nalungthim in hangin; Ahi nai, ngah hat’in Pakai!
Vo Pakai nahenga kahung taove, Kasongpi nahin kijahmo sah hih hel’in; Chutilouva nangma thip beh a nauma ahileh, Keijong lhan sunga kijot lut ho tobang kahi ding ahi.
Nahenga panpi ngeh a thumna kahin neitengleh Ka-ogin nei ngaipeh teiyin; Muntheng chungnung lam Kakhut te nia kasana kathum teng.
Migiloute chutoh neikai mangtha hihin, Thilse jeng jeng bolte chutoh; Alungthim uva lhep lhahna jeng dimset’a Ainheng agalveng koma thu ngei ngei chamna thu seiho chu.
Hitobang migiloute chu athilbol dungjuiyun lethuh-in, Thilse aboljat dungjuiyun lethuh tan; Akhut’uva athilbol bang banguvin lethuh-in lang, Achan diuva kilom thilpeh chu pen.
Ajeh chu amahon Pakai natoh jouse iman agel pouvin. Pakaiyin akhut’a abol jouse anahsah pouve; Hijeh a chu Pakaiyin avohlhuh soh-uva Athah phoh doh kit louhel diu ahi.
Pakai chu nun nom hen! Ajeh chu thil kathumna ogin eijah peh tai.
Pakai hi kahatna le kaluma pang ahin, Kalungthim amaa ki-ngai jing ahi; Hi tobang hin eipanpin Kalungthim jong akichoi-an tai; Keiman kabolsa la kasan, Pakai chu kathangvah-e.
Pakai hi amite dia thahat’a pang ahin, Athaonusa lengpa dia huhhing thei kiselna ahi.
Namite huhhingin lang Nagoulu tah hi phatthei boh tan; Nang amaho din achinguvin pangin lang, Kelngoi chinin chingin, abonchauvin polen ton sot’ in!
Pathen chaten Pakai jabol chehuvin, Loupina le thaneina Pakai jeng peuvin.
Pakai chu amin loupina peuvin, Ahouin muntheng sunga Pakai chibai boh-uvin.
Twipi chunga Pakai ogin akijan, Loupina Pathenin van akithinsah-e; Twi tamtah chunga khun Pakai atouve.
Pakai ogin chu thanei tah ahin, Pakai ogin chu minthang tah ahiye.
Pakai ogin chun cedar thing jouse jong atumbongin, Lebanon gama cedar thing jouse Pakaiyin aheh bongsoh tai.
Pakaiyin Lebanon lhang jong bongnou chop’in akichop sah-in, Sir’ion lhang chu gam bongnou abah sah-e.
Pakai ogin chun Meikong ahung pah lah lah-e.
Pakai oginin gammang lah jouse jong akilingsoh-in, Kadesh gammang lah chu Pakaiyin ahot lingsoh-e.
Pakai ogin in gangpi thing jouse jong akithingsoh-in, Gammang thing lah jouse akeovin akijam’e; Chujongle Pakai houina um hon jong “Loupi loupi,” tin asamtauve.
Twipi soh chunga khun Pakai laltounan atouve; Pakai chu tonsot leng chang din atoutai.
Pakaiyin amite thahat pehen! Pakaiyin amite chamna pehen phatthei boh hen!
Vo Pakai nangma choisang inge, Ajeh chu nangin neiphong dingin Kachunga hin kagalte kipah-in nalen sahpoi.
O Pakai ka-Pathen nahenga panpi ngeh nan kataove, Hijeh chun nangman neidamsah tai.
Vo Pakai nangin noimigama konin Kalhagao nahin puitouvin, Kokhuh sunga lutsa ho lah a Keima neicho hing tai.
Pakai mithengten avahchoi la sauvin. Amin theng thangvah soh keiyun.
Ajeh chu alunghan hi phat chom khat’a ding bou ahin, Alung lhaina vang hinkhoa ding ahi. Ka-na jan khat kal ahipon, Kipana jing kho ahung vah pai ji tai.
Kaneipet’in keiman kasei jin, “Imachan keima eisu long ponte,” kati.
Vo Pakai nangma lunglhaina hin, Molsang dettah bangin eitungdoh tan ahi; Namai nasel mang phat vangleh Kalung thoiji tai.
Vo Pakai nahenga kataove; Pakaiya kathum nom nom kathume.
“Keima thileng nang dia ipi phatchomna uma? Kokhuh sunga kakum lhah teng ipi phachom am? Leivuiyin nangma navahchoi ding hiya, Nakitahje chu leivuiyin aseidoh thei ding hinam?
Ngaiyin Pakai, neilungset’in! O Pakai eipanpin pang jingin!” katijie.
Pakai, kalunghem lamnan naheidoh-in; Lungkhama khaodip pon’a kong kagah chu, Nasutlhan kipanan kong neigah peh tai.
Hijeh a chu kalhagao umthim louva Navahchoi thei ding ahi. Vo Pakai ka-Pathen Tonsot’in na thangvah jing inge.
Vo Pakai nanga kiselna ding holjing kahi, Neijumso hih hel’in; Nadihna jeh chun neihuhdoh-in!
Kaheng lama nanabeng hinsungin lang Kintah-in neihuhdoh loiyin! Kei din kakiselna songpin hung pangin Eihuhhing dingin kulpi dettah-in pangin!
Nangma kakiselna songpi le kulpi nahi, Namin khohsah jal’in neilamkaiyin neipuilen;
Kei dinga guhthim cha kikam thangkola konin neihuhdoh-in, Ajeh chu nang kei kiselna nahiye.
Nangma khut’a kalhagao kapei, Vo Pakai, kitahjing Pathen nangin neilhatdam tai.
Pannabei milimdoi kisemthuho khohsah te chu Nangman nahot lheh jeng ahin; Kei vang Pakaiya ki-ngai kahi.
Nalungset longlou jeh hin keima kipah thanom inge; Ajeh chu kagenthei hesohna namun, Kakidoupite jong namelchih jinge.
Kamelma khut’a chun neipedoh hih laiye; Kapansatna ding mun jeng jong lentah neihoipeh-e.
Vo Pakai neilungset’in kagenthei lheh jeng tai; Kagim genthei behseh jeh-in kamit jong achopai ding ahitan, Kalhagao le katahsa geiya beipai ding ahitai.
Kahinkhon gim hesoh jeng kathoh-in, Kahin kumkho jong hahsatna jengin kamange; Kagenthei behseh phat’in katha abeipai tan. Kagu kachang alhong lhapai ahitai.
Kakidoupiten kidah dah-in eimu’uvin, Ka-inheng kagalvengte din jong lohso sokaume; Kakihetpi chengsen jong tijatnan eigel tauvin. Kholai dunga eitoh khahon eijamsan soh tauve.
Kalungthima athisa bang bangin kakigel’in, Leibel kivokehsa tobang kahitai.
Mi tamtah-in eihouset set jengu kajan, Jet le veiya tijat jatna jeng aseiyui! Kei douna dingin kithon thil agong gonguvin, Kei thana ding jeng thil angaitouve.
Vo Pakai nanga ki-ngai kahin, “Nangma ka-Pathen nahi,” kati.
Kaphat jouse nang khut’a um ahin, Kamelma eibol giloute khut’a konin neihuhdoh-in!
Nalhachapa chunga namai salvah-in, Nalungset longlouvin neihuhhing in!
O Pakai nahenga tao tao jeng kahi Neijumso hih hel’in; Migiloute vang jumso soh keiyin, Abonchauvin paomo hel’in noimigam jon’u hen.
Midih chunga ham hoitho jouse chu Paomo hel’in nephu go leuvin umu hen, kiletsah hoitho jouse chu.
Nangma gingte dinga kikhol naphatna chu Itobanga thalhingset’a um hitam! Mihem chate mitmu dinga Nanga kiselte dia naphatna kipodoh chu ijat pha hitam!
Nangin amaho chu nalim noiya nasel jingin, Mihemte suhlong louna dinga nakoiye; Mi houset thei louhelna mun nalim noiya nahoidam jingin ahi.
Pakai chu nun nom hen, Aman kidang tah-in alungset longlou eimusah-in; Galten khopi aum khum nauva kaumpet’in Kidangtah-in eilungset’e.
Katijat behseh phat’in kenjong kaseiyin, “Namitmua kona gamla tah a eidel mangu ahitai!” kati. Ahin nahenga panpina kathum phat’in Nangin kathum chan neijah peh kit nai.
Amitheng jousen Pakai ngailu’uvin, Mi kitah chu Pakaiyin ahoidamin, Kiletsah tah a chon vang chu Lhing keiyin alethuh jin ahi.
Hat’uvin nalungthim in hanguvin, Nang ho Pakai ngah jing mite!
Koi hileh asuh khel ki-ngaidama chu anun nom ahin,
Pakaiyin achonset achulnam peh chu anun nom ahi. Hitobang mi chu alhagao jeng jong joulhep bei ahi.
Kachonset kaphondoh lou tengleh Nilhum kei keiyin genthei hesoh kathoh jin, Katahsa pumpi jong hi Abeipai ding ahijitai.
Ajeh chu sun le janin kachunga Nakhut hamve vun akiphong jingin, Nipi lai nisa sat ham bangin Kathahat ago-lhasoh ding ahitai. Selah
Pakai nahenga kachonset kaphongin, Kathemmona jong kaselmang poi; “Pakai henga kasuh khel jouse phongdoh inge,” kati; Chutengle nangin kachonset themmo nei-ngaidam jie. Selah
Hijeh chun koi hileh Pathen hejing chun Nangma henga taona nei hen; Chutileh twi tampi ahung kitol’a agenthei pet jongleh Twipin aphah jou lou ding ahi.
Pakai kei dia kiselna mun nahin, Gim gentheina konin nangin neihoi jinge; Nangin huhdoh din bou neichangle lei. Selah
Ken nache-na ding lampi kahilchah a kaseipeh ding nahin, Kavet lhih jinga thu kamop jing ding nahi.
Hetna beiyin sakol le sakolpol tobangin um dan, Kamdal le thih kol bupeh lou bangin ngol hih-in, Ajo leh hicheng gentheina jouse chun Nahin nailut jeng ding ahiye.
Migilou din thoh hahsa natna adimset’in, Pakaiya ki-ngai jingpa din vang lungsetna longlouvin aum kimvel jinge.
Vo midih ho Pakaiya kipah thanom’uvin, Milungdih jousen kipana kholhang sam’uvin!
Vo midih ho Pakaiya kipah thanom’uvin, Milungdih chun vahchoina anei lomtah ahi.
Semjang saiyin Pakai vahchoiyun, Thihjang jangsom kibat Selang dah ngeitah-in Pakai din sai ginguvin!
Pakaiya lathah khat sauvin lang, Ogingtah-in thihjang jouse themtahin sai gingun.
Ajeh chu Pakai thusei adih jing jengin, Anatoh jong aboncha kitahna neitah a kibol jeng ahi.
Pakaiyin thildih le thu adih a kitanbou angailun, Leiset jeng jong hi Pakai lungset longlou dimset ahi.
Pakai thusah-a van mun jouse jong kisemdoh ahin, Akamsung soh ahusa vanga van loupina jouse kisem ahi.
Haisung khat’a kikhum bangin Pakaiyin twikhanglena twipi hijat hi alhei khomin, Twi thuh lai jouse jong hi Akholna a akholsoh keiye.
Leiset pumpin Pakai ging cheh hen, Vannoiya chengte Pakai ja nan ding chehhen!
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin hihen tia aseileh ahijengin, Aman thu apeh a agah chah leh aumden jenge.
Namtin vaipi ngaito lung gel jouse Pakaiyin manmo asopeh soh keiyin, Mitin vaipi hijat thilgon jouse hi Pakaiyin asuhmo peh soh hel’e.
Pakai lung ngaito vang chu tonsot’in ading jingin, Alunga agel jouse jong akhang khang in apang jinge.
A-Pathenu Pakai hikha nam mite chu anun nom ahiuvin, Pakaiyin agoulo dia alhendoh mite chu anomuve!
Pakaiyin vana konin noilam ahinven, Mihem chate abonchan amusoh keiye.
Pakaiyin alaltouna konin ahinven, Leiset chung chengte amusoh keiye.
Pakaiyin mihemte lungthim jouse agongtoh-in, Anatoh athilbol’u abonchan amelchih-e.
Lengpa chu asepai tamjeh a huhhinga um ahipon, Gal-hat mihangjong athahat’in ahuhdoh ahipoi.
Galjona dia galsatna sakol jong kinepna bei ahin, Sakol thahat chun koima huhhing deh ponte.
Ven, Pakaiyin ama gingte chu ave-lhi jingin, Alungset longlouva kinem jingte chu ave-lhi jinge.
Thinaa kona alhagaovu huhdoh peh din agel’in, Kel lhah teng jongleh hinso tei din agoi.
Kalhagaovun Pakai-angah jingin ahi; Ama chu keiho panpi le luma pang ahiye.
Keiho jong Pakaiyah kalungthimu akipah jin ahi, Ajeh chu keihon amintheng katahsan’ui.
Vo Pakai, nalungset longlou chu kachunguva koi jingin, Ajeh chu keiho nang jenga kinem kahiuve.
Keiman aphat jousen Pakai vahchoi ying ting, Avahchoina kakamsung toh kichat ponte.
Kalhagao Pakaiya akithang-at atjengin, Bolgentheiya umten jauhen kipah cheh-u hen.
Khaiye Pakai choi-an cheh uhitin, Tha khat tah-in amin choisangu hite.
Pakai kahol len aman eihoutai; Kagin jousea konin jong eihuhdoh tan ahi.
Ama jeng veuvin namaiyu vahseh ding ahin, Chutengleh namaiyuva jum beh lou ding ahi.
Hiche mitah lelpa hi ataovin ahileh Pakaiyin ataona angaiye; Agenthei hesohna jousea konin ahuh hingtai.
Pakai ging geh a umte chu Akimvel’uva Vantil’in ngahmun asan ahuhdoh jiuve.
Pakai hi itobanga pha hitam patep’in veuvin! Pakaiya kisel jing mi chu anun nom ahi!
Amithengten Pakai jeng ginguvin; Ajeh chu ama gingten lhahsamna aneipouve.
Sakei bahkai golpaiho jeng jong alhasamin agil kel jin, Ahin Pakai holjingte vangin thilpha chanlel aneipouve.
Hunguvin chate ngaiyuvin, Keiman Pakai ginje nahil’uving kate.
Hin ding deicha mihem koipen um am? Chule nikho sot tah thilpha anei ding ngai cha koiham?
Thilse sei nan nalei leh hih-in, Lhepna thusei nan jong namuh phunsah hih-in.
Thilsea jamdoh loiyin thilpha boljon, Chamna hol’in lang deljing jengin.
Pakaiyin midihte ave-lhi jingin, Anan jong ataonau angai lhi jinge.
Thilse bolte chu Pakaiyin avetdan, Leiset’a suhmila aumna diu agel’e.
Midih chu panpi ngaiya atao tengu Pakaiyin ahou jin ahi; Agenthei hesoh nau chengsea konin ahuhdohjie.
Lungthim kisihte henga Pakai ahung naiyin, Alhagao kigimbolte chu ahuhhing jin ahi.
Midih thoh gentheina tampi ahin, Ahinla Pakaiyin hichengsea kon jong hin ahuhdoh soh-e.
Pakaiyin agu achang jouse avet tup pehin, Agu khat cha jong akiheh bongpoi.
Thilsen migilou atha ding ahin, Midih hotbolte themmo chang diu ahi.
Pakaiyin alhachate hinkho alhatdoh peh jin, Ama lima kisel jouse themmo chang lou diu ahi.
Vo Pakai, eikinahpi ho chu kinahpin, Eikisatpi ho chu kisat pin;
Lum le pho kipat’in lang Eikithopi din hung kon loiyin!
Tengcha le tenglung hinleh-in lang, Eihindel le khu kidoupin! Kalhagao jah ahin, “Keima nahuhdoh a pangpa kahi,” tin.
Kei tha dinga eihol ho hi, Noisen bol’in jumso jengin; Kei douna thilse gong gong ho geiyin, Nung jamsah-in kisuh lung dong sah tan!
Abonchauvin khohui masanga changsi kithe bahsah-in lang, Pakai Vantil chun delmang soh hel’u hen!
Achena diu lampia muthim hen pansatna theilou lamnal sohhen, Pakai Vantil’in anungu del del jeng hen!
Ajeh chu ajeh beiyin ohlihna din thang akam’un, Ajeh beiyin kathina ding khuh alaiyuve.
Hetman louvin achunguva manthahna hung lhung hen, Athangkam u chun amaho khit hen, ohlih-u hen mangthah den jengu hen!
Chutengleh Pakaiya kalhagao kipah theiyin tin, Amihuhdoh jal’a kichoi sanga kaum ding ahi.

Kagu kachang jousen jong aseiyuva, “Vo Pakai nang tobang ding koiham? Mi thabei jong chu athatjo lou miho koma konin Nangman nahuhdoh jin, Alhasam ho le vaicha tahlel jong chu Achomgama abahgama pang khut’a konin nahuhdoh jie.
Ajou anal seiya hettohsah a pang miho apunguvin, Kahet phah lou thujeng eidonguvin ahi.
Thilpha kabol jongleh thilsen eilethuh uvin, Kalhagao alengvai behseh jeng tai.
Ahivangin amaho adammo aum tenguleh Akhohsah nan khaodip pon kasil jin; Adam theina diuvin an ka-ngolpeh jin, Kakun chah kheh jin kataopeh peh jengin ahi.
Kagol kapai mong kasopi mong bangin kakhohsah jin, Anu pul douva genthei lengvai mi bangin kavah len, Genthei lunghemin kakaiku le le jengin ahi.
Ahinla kipal lhuhna kaneiya ahileh Einuisat din kakimvela akikhom’uvin, Keima jumso teina dingin thuse se jeng eisei khum’uvin, Tang louhel’in kahet khah lou elbai hon eihouseuve.
Jum le ja helouvin eitot tot jengun, Ahau eigel khum khum jenguve.
Vo Pakai itih chan geiya navet vet jeng ding ham? Sakei bahkai ho banga kichepna einei mitea kon hin Ka-it tah kahinkho hi! Neichu lhahpeh loiyin!
Chutengle keiman Houbung ja-lah a nangma kathangvah a, Mipi kititna lah tah a kavahchoi ding nahi.
Hitobang miho khu kachunga kitai dau hen, Adih loubeh a eidouva kisemdoh mai mai ahibouvui; Ajeh beihel’a eihot bola mit satlhap lhap hokhu Kachunga kipa thanop sah dan.
Ajeh chu chamna thu him him aseipouve, Gamsunga umthim thimho dounan thujou jeng asemthu uve.
Amahon akambem bemin eihouvun, “Chi, Chi, kamit’in kamutauve,” eitiuvin ahi.
O Pakai, nangin namudoh ahitai, umthim din go-hih hel’in; O Pakai gamla neidalha loujen in!
Nangle nang kitildoh jengin kadihna neiseipeh-in, Vo Pakai ka-Pathen kei din hung pangin!
Vo Pakai ka-Pathen nangma dihna jeh chun Keijong them neichansah tei teiyin; Hitobang mite hi Kachunga kipah thanom in lensah hih hel’in.
Amaho hi acham chamin, “Aphai, keihon kadeichan kamutauve!” tin seisah dan. Amaho hi itih hijongleh “Hichepa hi ibahgamu ahitai,” tin seisah hih hel’in.
Amaho hi kisuh dong sah-in kijumso sah sohkeiyin, Kahamsetna chunga kipah thanomji ho hi! Jumna le jachatna ponsil’in kisil’u hen, Kei douna kichoi sang mite hi!
Kei them chansah ding deiho vang chu Kipah thanom tah-in lhang sam uhen, A-itih chan geiyin jong, “Pakai chu aloupi, Alhachapa phatnaa kipah thanompa chu!” tin seiyu hen.
Chuteng na dihna thu lei kileh pelin seiyin ting, Nilhum lhuma navahchoi la kasah sah jeng ding ahi.
Suh khelna hin migilou lungthima giltah-in thu aseiyin, Amit mu amaiya jong Pathen ginna aumpoi.
Ama le ama mitmun jong akijou lhep thei jengin, Athemmona kimandoh joupon tin ki hotbol thei ponte, tia agel ahi.
Akamsungin jou le nal thujeng aseiyin, Ching theiya na toh-a thilpha bol ding atangtai.
Ajalkhun sunga jong alep lep’in thil angaiton, Lamse laitah khat’a akitungin, thilse ahopoi.
Vo Pakai nalungset longlou hi Van mun jouse geiyin akitungdoh-in ahi; Nakitahna jong hin Vana meilhang lah aphai.
Nadihna jong hi Pathen lhang sang dung abangin, Nathu tanna hi lithuh tah tobang ahi; Vo Pakai, nangin mihem jong Sahem jong nahuhhing gel’in ahi.
Vo Pathen nalungset longlou hi itobanga manlu hitam! Nalhaving teni lim noiya mihem chate akisel’ui.
Na-insunga neh le chah neng jeng jung chun akivah-un, Nangin nadeitah twidunga konin twi napei.
Ajeh chu nanga kona hinna twinah hungput ahin, Nangma vah a keihon khovah kamu’-u ahi.
O Pakai nangma hethemte long louvin lungset’in, Milungdih te chu nami huhhingna pejingin.
Mi kiletsah chu akeng phangin eichot khah sah dan lang, Migilou chu akhut’in eijapmang sah hih-in.
Hikoma khun thilse bolte akitalden tauvin, Tolsena kinei ahiuvin akiphong ding thei tapouve.
Migiloute jeh-in nangle nang lungkham kisa hih-in, Thil dih lou bolte umchan jong thangset dan!
Ajeh chu amaho khu hampa banga gop lha loi diu, Hamhing na-eng banga pul lhaa gop loi ding ahiuve.
Pakai jenga ki-ngaiyin thilpha bol’in, Chutileh gamsunga chengin natin lung monga naum ding ahi.
Pakaiya kipah thanomin, Chutileh aman nalungthima nadei chan napeh ding ahi.
Nalampi Pakai jenga lhung lut’in, Amajenga ki-ngaiyin aman nabolpeh nante.
Pakaiyin nadihna chu khovah banga aphondoha, Nathemna jong sunlai nisa abahsah ding ahi.
Pakai masanga thip beh chan umin ama ngah hat’in, Midang akihei nalama ahaothei jehin nang le nang lung gimdan; Akiheina lam lama thilse bol mihem vangin Lungkham lunggim boldan.
Lunghan boldan lang lungsat jong bol hih-in, Nangle nang lunggim in umdan hichun thilse bou asoi.
Ajeh chu migiloute hi thingsat a kisat lha diu ahin, Pakai ngah jing ten vang gamsung hi alo diu ahi.
Phat chomkhat jouteng migilou beitan tin, Tua navet leh apha lheh lheh tobanga akimu vangin Aumna muna khun umtaponte.
Milung nengin vang gamsung alo ding, Haotah a uma neng jeng junga nom asah-uva kipah thanom diu ahi.
Migilouvin midih douna jeng abol jin, Midih vetda nan aha agel gel jin ahi.
Ahinla Pakaiyin migiloupa chu anuisat’in ahi, Ajeh chu amanthah nading nikho ahung naitai ti amupeh-e.
Migilouten chemjam asatdoh-uvin, Thalpi kamsan akidop soh keiyun; Vaichate le tahlel te suh gama, Lungdih tah a natongte thagam din angaitouve;
Achemjamu hi alung changuva kithil lut’a, Athalpiu aboncha kiheh bongsoh ding ahibouve.
Ipi hileh midih-in lhom cha anei chu Migilouten tampi anei sangun aphajoi.
Ajeh chu migiloute banjang kiheh bongsoh ding, Midihte vang Pakaiyin apanpia ahinso ding ahiuve.
Nolnabeite nikho hung lhunna ding Pakaiyin ahen, Chutengleh agoulou jong tonsot’a um jing ding ahitai.
Phat phat lou pet jongleh amaho hi kijumso deh lou diu, Kel lhah lai jongleh nengtuh a anei diu ahi.
Migiloute vang mangthah diu, Pakai douva pang te chu chomkah a hamhing dongpha bep hidiu ahibouve. Meikhu kitol’a leng mang banga Kitol manguva leng mang diu ahi.
Migilouvin bat’in thil alan alesah kit jou poi, Midih vang ahongphal’in ape pejie.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai phatthei boh changten Gamsung hi alo diu ahi; Pakaiyin agaosap te vang chu Thingsat’a kisat lha diu ahijenge.
Pakai vanga mihemin kal ason thei ahin, Ama deilama chonpa chu Pakaiyin aphudet ahiye.
Hitobang mi chu lhuta jongleh kital hel lou ding ahi; Ajeh chu aman akhut’in Pakai atuh jinge.
Keima kachapan laiya pat tu ka-upat gei hin Midih donlouva akikoilam kamupon; Achate khutdoa apanlam kamupoi.
Midih joh chun hongphal tah-in mi thil apen Bat dingin jong ahom hom joi; Achate jong phatthei nan aneijoi.
Thilse dalhan lang thilpha bol’in, Chutileh nahinsot ding ahi.

Ajeh chu Pakaiyin thu adih a kitanbou angailun, Amithengte jong adalhah louhel ding ahi. Midih chu a-itih a jong ahoidam jing ding ahin, Migiloute son le pah achilhah chu thingsat’a kisat lha ding ahiuve.
Midih ten gamsung alo’uva, Agamsunga chu tonsot’a cheng diu ahi.
Midih kamsunga chihna thu ahung potjin, Adih lama thutan din alei jong akileh pel’e.
Midih lungthima a-Pathen danthu acheng jingin, Akalsot jousen jong alho-nal khapoi.
Migilouvin midih chu achang lhi jin, Tha dingin ahol le lejie.
Ahinla Pakaiyin midih chu ama kihuh dia anganse lou ding ahin, Achung chang thu akhol teng uleh mo achan sah lou ding ahi.
Pakai chu ngah jingin lang, Alampi juiyin nit jing jengin; Chutileh Pakaiyin gamsung nalosah a Nangma nachoisang ding; Nangin jong migiloute kisuhgam chu Namit tah a namu ding ahiye.
Keiman migiloupa thoh lel’a aum kamun, Lebanon lhanga cedar thing huikai tobanga aum kamui.
Kahin jotpa kit’a ahileh vetan anabeitai; Kahol le le vangin kamudoh jou tapoi.
Nolnabei mi chu melchih-in, Milungdih khu vephan; Ijeh-inem itileh chamna deiyah mi chu Ahao theiyin aphathei lheh-e.
Ahin suh khel nei mite vang Abonchauva kisugam hel diu ahi; Migiloute haona jouse jong hi Thing kilham lha banga kisat lha ding ahi.
Midihte huhhinga aum nau vang hi Pakaiya hung kon ahin; Genthei hesoh tengleh Pakai hi Midihte dinga kiselna ahiye.
Pakaiyin jong midih te chu apanpin ahuhdoh jie; Ijeh-inem itileh Midih hon amabou kiselna aneiyu ahi.
O Pakai, nalunghan teng neiphoh hih-in, Nalungsat teng jongleh nei-engbol dan!
Ajeh chu nathalchang jousen katahsa adotpai soh tan, Kachunga nakhut ahung leng lhai.
Nangin hitia neibolset jeh hin Katahsa jong adammon manthei ahitapoi; Kachonset jeh-in Kagu kachang jouse jong adammon anasoh tai.
Ajeh chu kathemmona jousen eilonvuh tan, Kei dia pohgih hahsa tah bangin agih behseh tai.
Katina jouse jong amon soh tan anaikol soh tai, Ka-ngol jeh a hitia hi hung umdoh ahiye.
Kun chah kheh a kabokhup’a kijamden kahin, Nilhum lhumin lunghem in kavah lei.
Ajeh chu kakongjang dung jouse mei kah bangin asan, Katahsa kati chung adam kom abeihel’e.
Kei hi kapum changa kinoigoiya kisuchip kahitan, Kalungthima hijat genthei hesoh jeh hin kapeng penge.
Pakai nangin kadei jouse nahei, Kathoh gimna hi nakoma akiselpoi.
Kalung chang aphu phu jengin Katha la abeipai ding ahitai; Kamit te nia khovah kamu jeng jong hi Athim paiyah ahitai.
Hitobang hise kavei jeh hin Kagol kapai jousen jong eigalvet soh tauve; Ka-inkote jeng jong Kakoma akithah ngam pouvin ahi.
Keima tha dinga eiholten thang akam le leuvin, Suhset dia eiholten manthahna thujeng aseiyui; Nilhum lhumin joule nal jenga bol ding bou agel’uvin ahi.
Hijongleh keivang na-ngong banga kauma, Paomo banga kam keh louva umjeng kahi.
Khojalou mihem banga umah kahin, Miphoh theilou banga kam keh louva um kahi.
Ahin Pakai nang jeng ka-ngah jingin, O Pakai ka-Pathen eihou ding nang bou nahi.
“Amaho hi kachunga kipah hih hel’u hen,” tia katao ahi; “Kakipal lhuh teng kiletsah nan neidau hen,” kati ahi.
Ajeh chu alhupai ding kahitan, Kanatna jong kadam deh poi.
Kathemmona kaphongin, Kachonset hi kakisih lheh jenge.
Ajeh beiya eidoute khu athau ahat theiyin, Adih lou lama eihot bolte jong atam lheh jenguve.
Keiman thilpha jeng kaholjeh a Thilse jenga ei lethuh ho khu kakidoupi jeng ahiuve.
O Pakai, neidalha loujenin! O ka-Pathen, gamlaa neidalha hihin!
Neihung kithopi loiyin, O Pakai kei dia huhhingpa!
Keiman, “Kalampi kivet jing nange, Kakama jong chonset thu kasei louna din; Kakam kihup jing ing ting Kakoma migilou aum laisen kihong inge,” kati.
Paomon kaumin thip beh chan kaume, Phatchomna beihel’in kamoh umseh jenge; Kathoh gimla apungtul tul jenge.
Kasunga kalungthim akitum let lut jengin, Kalung gel gel nan meikong bangin ahung deujah jin, Chutah chun kenjong Kalei kaleh panin thu kaseitai.
“Pakai, kahinkho bei ding phat neihetsah-in, Nikho ijat kahin nah lai ding ham? Kahinkho chedan neihetsah-in!

Vetan, nangin kahinkho jong hi anikhojat Khut phang chanbou nahisah-in; Kahinkho lhum kei jong hi Nangma mitmun imacha kah nahisah poi. Adih tah mongin mihem jouse hi Hu kihaikhuma hingmai mai ahibouve. Selah
Adih tah a mihem hi nisa lim banga kitol tola, Panna beiya kisu lung jing ahibouve; Mihem in thil akhol kholjin Koipenin akichom ding ham ahephapoi.
“Vo Pakai, tua hi ken ipiba ka-nga nga ding ham? Nanga bou kinem jing kahiye.
Kasuh khel chengsea konin neihuhdoh-in lang, Mi-ngolte neihouset sah sah datan!
Keima pao louvin kaumin, kam kakeh poi; Ajeh chu hitia eibol’a hi nangma bou nahi.
Neijep jep datan; Nakhut’a neiden denna abeipai ding kahitai.
Nangin mihem hi achonset jeh a Engbol’a suhdih ding nagot tengleh; Aman a-it penjong chu Nget neh bangin nanen nabahgam jitai. Adih tah mongin mihem jouse hi Hu kihaikhuma hingmai mai ahibouve. Selah
“O Pakai kataona ngaiyin, Ka-kateng ka-ogin hin ngaiyin; Kalhi alon lon tengleh Donlouvin neikoidan; Ajeh chu keijong hi kapu kapate banga Nang dia kholjin le khopem bou kahi.
Kathia kakichaidoh kah a kipana kahet thei nadin Kihei mangin neivet vet datan,” kati.
Keiman thoh hat tah-in Pakai ka-ngah jingin, Aman jong eikhohsah jeh-in kataona asangtai.

Koima kithah khah louna kokhuh sunga konin Pakaiyin keima eikaidoh jin; Bolsunga bon-ngan lah a konin jong Eikaidoh jin ahi; Chuin songpi chung kakengto te nin eichotsah-in, Kakhoni chotmun jong dettah tah-in eisempeh-e.
Pakaiyin kakamsunga lathah khat eikhumpeh-in, I-Pathenu vahchoina la khat eikhumpeh-e. Mi tamtah-in Pakai chu mu’uvin tin, Aginsoh keiyuva ama jeng atahsan diu ahi.
Pakaiya ki-ngai jing mihem chu anun nom ahi, Kiletsah ngaito louva, Alim kisemthu pathena kibolthu ho pou juilea anunga vahle loupa chu anun nom ahi.

O Pakai ka-Pathen, Thil kidang tamtah keiho din neibolbe peh peh-un. Lung gel jeng jong neigelbe peh peh-ui; Hijeh chun nang to tethei ding koima aumpoi; Aboncha hi kaphondoh soh keiya kaseidoh ding hileh, Sima simjou jai hilou ding ahi.
Pakai nangin kilhaina le thilto iding natipoi, Ahin kasei chan kolsung geh-in nei ngai peh-e. Pumgo thilto le chonset jeh a thilto jong Nangman na-ngeh deh poi.
Hichun kenjong kaseiyin, “Ven kei kahunge: Lekhabu jol sunga chun kachung chang thu akisune;
Vo ka-Pathen nangma lungdei thil bol ding katha anome, Kalungthima nangma danthu acheng jingnai,” kati.
Keiman Houbung mipi tamtah lah a Namihuhdoh kipa nopna thu kaphongtai; Vo Pakai, neihet bang chun vetan, Kam thip manlouvin kasei sei jenge.

Nangin huhhing dia neipanpina chu Kalungthima ka-im mang deh pon; Nangma kitah thu le namihuhhing thu Keiman kasei sei jenge; Nalungset longlou le nakitahna thu hi Houbung mipi lah a jong ka-im mangpoi.
O Pakai, neihepina gui sutan hih hel’in, Nalungset longlou le nakitahnan tonsot’in eihoidamjo hen!
Ajeh chu simsenlou thilsen eium kimsoh tan, Kathemmonan eivuh behseh tan khojong kamu theitapoi; Kathemmona hi kalujang sam sangin jong atamjon, Kalungthim jong akisudong tai.
O Pakai, lung lhaiyin lang neihuhdoh loiyin! O Pakai, neipanpi loi jengin ong!
Tha dinga eiholte khu jumson lang Abonchauvin kisuh lung dong sah soh keiyin; Keima suhset dia eiholte chu nung jamsah-in, Mihem noise le vet tomin umsah jengin!
Ajachat man’uva kajah a “Hai hai,” tia sam ho khu Kichatsah soh keiyin!
Amavang nangma holte chu Nachunga kipah thanom jingu hen Namihuhhingna ngaichate chun, “Pakai bou aloupi,” tin sei sei jengu hen!
Keivang mivaicha neilou kahin, Ahinla Pakaiyin kei ding eigelpeh jingnai. Vo ka-Pathen, kho ngaisot loujenin, Nangbou eipanpia eihuhdoh a pang nahi!
Mivaicha khoto pa chu anun nom ahi! Genthei nikho leh Pakaiyin ama chu ahuhdoh teijin ahi.
Hitobang mi chu Pakaiyin ahong jingin ahing hoiye; Gamsunga ama chu mi nun nom akiti; Nangin ama chu amelmate kichepna dia Napeh doh louhel ding ahi.
Damlouva alupna jalkhun chung jenga jong, Pakaiyin avah jingin; Anat pet’in jong nangin A veiset jouse nadam thengsah jie.
Keiman kei din kaseiyin, “O Pakai neilungset’in; Nangma dounan kachonsetai, Neidamsah tei teiyin!” tin kataove.
Kamelmaten eithangset man’uvin aseiyun, “Itih leh thidoh a kiminphah lou ding ham?” atiuve.
Mi khattou eivea ahung jongleh Thu homkeo jeng tampi asei seiyin, Alungthima joule nal’a bol din eigon, Alunga agel jouse chu apotdoh teng athe thang sohjie.
Eihotbol jouse kajet kaveiya aphisa lhet lhut’uvin, Hanat’a kanat khoh chehna ding jeng ageluve.
Amahon “Thina thei mongin alhunden ahitai, Alupna konin kithou kit ta hih hel’inte,” tin aseiyui.
Kagol ngaitah achunga kaki-ngaina penin jong Kaneh kachah nea pangpa geiyin, Keima douna dingin Akhoto eilap khum khum jengin ahi.
Hijongle Pakai nangin neilungset’in, Hite ho kalethuh theina dingin neiphong dingin!
Chuti leh kachunga nalung lhaiyin Kamelman eijou tapoi, ti kahet ding ahi.
Kalungdet jeh a nangman neiphoh ding ahitan, Atonsot’a dia na-angsunga neitousah ahitai.
Pakai Israel Pathen chu Tonsot tonsot geiyin nun nom hen! Amen chule Amen!
Vo Pathen, sitwi long hiu heu lha ngaiya um sakhigol bangin Kalhagaovin nang jeng bou nalha ngai jinge!
Pathen hing jing chu ka-ngaiyin, Kalhagaovin twi duchat bangin Pathen chu angai chai. O Pathen itih tah leh kahunga Namai kamu ding ham?
An neh khel’in sun nilhum lhum le jan khovah vah-in, Kamit lhi along long jengin; Mihon la “Na-Pathen hoiya ba um hitam?” tin aseiyun, Kho ngai louhel’in eidong dong jeng tauve.

Keiman kacham tah a lung kagel leh, Thil hicheng hi kageldoh tai; Itobanga mihonpi chutoh kilhona Abonchauva kalamkaiya Pathen houin lam kajotpia, Kipa thanop’a thangvah la kasah-uva Mihonpin kut kibolji hitam!
Vo kalhagao idia lung lhadai nahiya, Ipi dinga kasunga thip beh a umthim theilou nahim? Pathen jenga kinem jingin, Ajeh chu ken Pathen kavahchoi kit tei ding ahi; Kei dia Eipanpi pa le ka Pathen chu!
Kalung sunga kalungthim alhachomtan, Hijeh chun Jordan gamsung le Hermon gamsunga kon, Mizar mol-sanga konin Pathen nangma kahin geldoh tai.
Na ogin kithong chun Komtong le komtong jong akithongton akikoutouve; Nangma twipi kidil leh natwipi kitol chun Keima eilonvuh soh tauve.
Sun tengleh Pakaiyin alungset longlouvin eihoiyin, Janteng jongleh alasah gin chu kanabenga aging jinge; Hiche hi kahinna Pathen henga Taona khat’ in a pang jinge.
Keiman kasongpi tobang Pathen jah a “Ipi dinga neisuh mil hitam? Melmate bolgimna thoh thoh a ibol’a lunghem a kavale hitam?” kati.
Kati chunga thina khop hel’a maha pu bangin, Eidouten eihouse se jenguvin ahi; “Na-Pathen hoiya ba um hitam?” tin Kho ngai man louhel’in eidonguve.
Vo kalhagao idia lung lhadai nahiya, Ipi dinga kasunga thip beh a umthim theilou nahim? Pathen jenga kinem jingin, Ajeh chu ken Pathen kavahchoi kit tei ding ahi; Kei dia Eipanpi Pa le ka-Pathen chu!
Vo Pathen, them neichansah-in lang, Pathen hephaloute sanga kadihna hi neihun; Mijou le adih louhoa konin Keima neihuhdoh tei teiyin!
Ajeh chu nangma kakiselna Pathen nahi, Ibol’a neipaidoh hitam? Ibol’a jong melman eibol gentheiya Hibanga lunghema kava le le jeng hitam?
O nangman navah chun hinsal vah-in Nathudih hinlensah jengin! Nakhovah le nathudih chun eipuile hen, Nachenna mun nalhang theng chunga eipui lut lhon hen!
Chutengleh Pathen maicham phung jon ing ting, Kipah thanom tah a Pathen heng kajot lut ding ahi; Keiman semjang kasaiya O Pathen ka-Pathen nang kavahchoi ding nahi.
Vo kalhagao idia lung lhadai nahiya, Ipi dinga kasunga thip beh a umthim theilou nahim? Pathen jenga kinem jingin Ajeh chu ken Pathen kavahchoi kit tei ding ahi; Kei dia Eipanpi Pa le ka-Pathen chu!
Vo Pathen keihon kanabeng tenin kajauvin, Kapu kapa teuvin jong eiseipeh tauve; Amaho khang lai gol lui laiya Nangma thilbol natoh jouse chu.
Nangman naban thahat’in namtin vaipi nadeljam in, Kapu kapateu joh chu chen mun napen thing phun naphuh-e; Namtin vaipi chu genthei hesoh-in nabolin, Kapu kapateu vang chu chamlhat napetai.

Ijeh-inem itileh amahon achemjam hem hat’uva Tepna gam chu anajou ahipon, Aban-gol hat man’uva jong gal anajou ahipoi; Nangma khut jetlam, naban-gol thahatjoh, Namaivah joh chun gal ajosah-a gam alosah-u ahibouve; Ajeh chu achunguva nangman kipana naneiye.
Nangma kalengpa le ka-Pathen nahin, Jacob dia gal jo jona jeng bolpeh chu nahi.
Nangma vanga keihon kagalte kasuh nemjiu ahin, Nangma min jal’a eidel khumteu jong kachotpeh jiu ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh kathalpi chang jong kison nan kaneipon, Kachemjam jong hin eihuhhing jou din kagelpoi.
Nangin vang kagalteuva konin nei huhhing uvin, Eihot bolteu abonchan kisulung dongin nalhatai.
Keiho Pathen jenga tang louvin kakisong uvin, Tonsot tonsot’a namin kathangvah jing diu ahi. Selah
Tua vang nangin neipaidoh-uva neijumsou ahitan, Kasepai teutoh kilhonin gal neikonpeh tapouve.
Galte masanga pangjou lou vin neinung jamsah-uvin, Kagalteuvin kathilkeovu akichom chomtauve.
Tha dia kikoisa kelngoi bangin neikoitauvin, Namtin vaipi lah a neithe cheh soh keitauve.
Nangin namite hi man baitah-in najoh mangtan, Aman lhomcha bou nasah-in ahi.
Kaheng kakomu houset din neikoiyuvin, Kavel’uva chengte houset le seithangin neikoi tauve.
Namtin vaipi lah a seichah din neisem’uvin, Mitin vaipi nuisat sat din neibol tauve.
Nilhum keiyin kahamsetna hi kamaiya akilang jingin, Mit le mai jumin kaumin ahi.
Hitobang hin ei house le eiphinse ho thuseiya kon, Melma le phu lanom mitmun kajum behseh tai.
Nangma kasuh mil dauva Nakitepna kapal keh loulai vangun Thilse hijatpi hi Keiho chunga ahunglhung tai.
Kalungthimu akinung hei hih laiyin Nalampia konin kakal kasep doh hih laiyuve;
Chutia nangin kamkeite lah a neisuh goiyuva, Muthim lhangkal jin khumsah theiyin kaum hih laiyui.
Keihon ka-Pathen min sumil’uvin, Hetphah lou pathen lim kisemthu kakhut’in sangu jongleng,
Hiche hi Pathenin ahetdoh mo deh ding ham? Ajeh chu Pathenin lungthim selguh jouse ahejing nai.
Ahipoi, nangma jal’in keiho nilhum keiyin eikithat’uvin, Tha dia koisa kelngoi bangin eikisimtauve.
Nang le nang hung thoudoh loiyin! O Pakai ipi dinga lum lum jeng nahim? Ihmut’a konin hung thoudoh loiyin, A-itih a donlou din neipaidoh hih hel’uvin!
Ipi dia namai nasel manga. Min eibol gentheinau eibol gim nau nasuhmil hitam?
Ajeh chu kalhagaovu leivuiya akison kunin, Katahsau jong tol’a akijamden tai.
Hung kipatdoh jengin neihung panhu uvin! Nalungset longlou jeh hin neihuhdoh teiyun!
Kalungthim hi thilphan alonvuh tan, Lengpa lam ngan keiman la kasai; Danthu lekha sunpan lekhamol gonsa akoi bangin Kaleigui jong hi la sa din akigotai.
Mihem chapate lah a nangma ahoi chungnung pen nahin, Nathusei abonchan lungset thujeng ahin, Hijeh chun tonsot’a din Pathenin phatthei naboh-e.
Vo Mihatpa, chemjam chu nakhel’a kikon, Naloupina leh nalal nan hung kivon temin!
Thudih jal le adih a pang din, Nalal loupinan hung kivonin lang Galjou dingin sakol chunga hung tou temin; Nakhut jetlam in kihilna thei thil nasa tah tah boldoh jengin!
Lengpa melmate din alung sunguva nathal chang ahem theiyin, Mitin vaipi nanoiya akijam chap tauve.
Pathenin nasempeh laltouna tonsot geiyin akidon; Naleng tenggol jong misucham tenggol ahi.
Nangin adih na-ngailun gitlouna nahoi; Hijeh chun Pathen, na-Pathenin Nang hileng chansah din thao nanun, Naloi nagolte jouse sanga chungnung jo din Kipa thanopna thaotwi nanui.
Naponsil jouse jong myrrh le aleo Chule thingthal gim anam ngui hiu heovin; Saihaa kisadoh leng inpi dunga konin jong Selangdah gin chun na kipa thanop sah jinge.
Lengpa chanute chu nang dia numei lal Ja umtah tah ho lah a apanguvin; Najet lama Ophir gam sanaa kijem lengnu adinge.
Vo chanu, phaten ngaiyin geltoh demin, Namite leh na-insung mite sumil jengin;
Chutileh lengpan namel hoijeh a nadeichat ding ahi. Lengpa chu napu jong ahijeh-in anoiya kunin;
Tyre chanu jong nalung lhaina din thilpeh kengin hung intin, Mipi lah a mihao lai laiyin jong
Anei agou jouseuva kona Nangma lung lhaina ding ahol diu ahi. Leng chanu jong chu aindan sunga khun Sana momkenga kijempah ponchol akisil’e.
Ponjem tamtah a kijem ponchol atho thon akisil’in Lengpa henga apuilut tauve; Athah lea pang anu-ngah chanpi ho jong chu Leng inpia kipah thanomin alut tauve.
Kipah thanomin min amaho chu apuiyuvin, Leng inpi sunga alut tauve.
Napu napate chu nachapaten akheldoh diu, Leiset chung muntina milen milal’a napansah ding ahiuve.
Akhang khanga nangma min miho kalemsah jing ding, Hijeh a chu mitin vaipin tonsot’a navahchoi diu ahi.
Pathen chu eiho dia kiselna le thahatna ahin, Genthei hesoh pet tah a eipanpi ahi.
Hijeh chun leiset pumpi kikhel hel ding hijongleh Eiho ikichat louhel diu ahi; Twikhanglen lailunga molsang jouse jong hi Kithinga kitol lutsoh ding hihen.
Twikhanglena twipi jouse ginglul lul in hung phuldoh jeng jongleh. Mol le lhang jouse kihot nemsoh hel jongleh ikichat lou diu ahi. Selah
Vadung khat alongin Avabah chengsen Pathen khopi chu Ning lhingsel’in alhai; Chungnungpen Pathen chenna khopi theng chu.
Akholai lunga Pathen apansa jingin. Khopi chu suh long hoi hilou ding ahi; Pathenin hiche khopi chu Aphat phat cha akithopi jing jeng ding ahi.
Namtin vaipi alung hanguvin, Lenggam jouse jong akilingsoh tauve; Pathenin lhang asap’a ahileh Leiset hi ajol lhasoh hel tai.
Thaneipen Pakaiyin eipanpi jingun, Jacob Pathen chu eiho kiselna ahijinge. Selah
Hunguvin lang Pakai natoh thilbol jouse hung veuvin. Leiset chunga itobang datmo um thil aboldoh hitam!
Leiset kol kim vel jousea Gal kisat avotang soh tan; Thalpi chang abonchan aheh bong gamin, Tengcha jouse jong avobong soh tai; Sakol kangtalai jouse jong chu Meiyin ahalvam soh hel tai!
“Umthim’uvin lang kei hi Pathen kahi heuvin! Namtin vaipi lah a keima choisangin kaumin, Leiset chunga Keima eikichoi sang tai!” ati.
Thaneipen Pakaiyin eipanpi jingun, Jacob Pathen chu eiho kiselna ahijinge. Selah
Mitin vaipin nakhut benguvin! Kipa ogin thongin Pathen koma la sauvin!
Ajeh chu hatchungnung pen Pakai hi Kichat tijat umtah ahin; Leiset pumpi chunga Leng loupi tah ahiye.
Aman mitin vaipi hi eiho noiya ason kunin, Namtin vaipi hijat hi ikengto chotphauvin akoiye.
Eiho goulo ding jong Pakaiyin lhendohsan akoiyin, Angailut Jacob lalna jong ama gonpeh ahi. Selah
Pathen chu ging lul lul’in akitol touvin, Sumkon ginin Pakai chu akitol touve.
Sauvin Pathen vahchoi la sauvin! Sauvin sauvin, ilengpau vahchoi la sauvin!
Ajeh chu Pathen hi leiset pumpi leng ahin, Hijeh chun la ngeiyin avahchoi la sauvin!
Pathenin namtin vaipi chunga lengvai apoi; Alaltouna theng chunga Pathen atouve.
Mitin vaipi lah a milen milal jouse jong Abraham Pathen mite hidin akikhom tauve. Ajeh chu leiset’a galsatna lum jouse Pathena ahin, Pathen hi loupi tah a choisangin aumtai.
Aloupi chu Pakai bou ahin, I-Pathenu khopi sunga loupi tah a vahchoi ding ahi! Amolsang theng jong hi
Kihuilip lep’a hoitah ahin, Leiset pumpi dia kipana ahi; Sahlam khopam chin’a Zion molsang, Leng loupi pen pa khopi chu!
Akhopi sunga insang kulpi dung jousea Pathen ama le ama galpal detpen kahi, tin akiphongtai.
Ajeh chu vetan leng jouse akikhom’uvin, Ahung kigoltoh soh keitauve.
Thil umdol amuchet phat’uvin adat mouvin, Alung gim’uvin kin le bonga jam ding agotauve;
Akihot lhul gam tauvin, Numei naoso nat bangin na asa thei lheh jenguve.
Nangin niso lam khohui namangin Tarshish lama kong innei jouse nathe chehsoh tai.
Keihon kajah bang banguvin mujong kamutauve; Thaneipen Pakai khopi sung, I-Pathenu khopi sunga thilsoh jouse Tonsot geiya dia Pathenin atundoh chengse. Selah
O Pathen, nahouin lailunga chun Nalungset longlou kageldoh tauve.
Vo Pathen, namin kithang bang bangin, Leiset kol kimvela nakivah choina athongsoh tai; Nakhut jetlam jong chu Gal jou jou din athalhingset’e.
Nangma thutan them jal hin Judah chate numei jouse Kipah thanom cheh-uhen lang Zion molsang jong kipah hen!
Zion kimvela kijot’uvin ajet avei gakhol leuvin. Ainsang jouse gasim soh keiyun;
Phate chan akhopi kulpi jouse simtoh uvin lang, Ainsang jouse jong gakhol toh-uvm; Chutileh khonunga khang mite naseipeh thei diu ahi.
Hichea ama hi Pathen ahin, Tonsot tonsot geiya eiho Pathen ahi; Akhang khanga amabou hi Eiho lamkaiya pang ding ahi, nati diu ahiye.
Mitin vaipin hiche hi ngaiyuvin! Leiset chung chengten na nan ngai cheh-uvin:
Milen hihen mineo hileh, Mihao hiuvin vaichate hijongleu chun!
Kakama hi chihna thu kasei ding ahin, Kalunga kagel hi het khen themna hi ding ahi.
Keiman thuchih kisei chu kanan ngai phang ting. Kathulem sei chu semjang kisaigin khutoh kitoh-in suitoh inge.
Genthei hesoh teng ibola kakichat’a. Eibol gentheite themmo nan eium kimsoh jongleh ipi kagin ding ham?
Aneile agouva kisong miho, Ahaona jouse aneng jeng junge, ti kiletsahpi ho chu?
Tahbeh mongin mihem koima ama le ama kilhatdoh theilou ding ahin, Pathen henga ahinkho manjat apeh theilou ding ahi;
Ajeh chu ahinkho mankhop hi atam val jengin, Itih hijongleh aman jat lhing joulou ding ahi;
