Ahin hinjingna dinga akichohdoh theiya. Thina lhankhuh mulouva aumna ding aumpoi.
Ajeh chu aman michingte jong athiu muntin, Mi-ngol le michavaite jong amanthah amuding, Anei agou jouseu jong Midang adalhah peh tauve, ti amudoh tei tei ding ahi.
Alhankhuh chengseu chu atonsot inpiu ahitan. Akhang khanga chenmuna anei diu ahitai: Tupet’in gamsunga anei le apun pangu jongleh.
Mihem hi ahaodoh tengleh angol jin. Gancha bangin angol thipi din aumdoh jie.
Anei anga chunga lung lhaiya Ngol hoitah a kisonna neite chu Amanthah nau akichaina ding Hitobang chu hi ding ahiye. Selah

Tha dinga koisa kelngoi banga Amaho jong hi noimigam jonsuh dia um cheh ahiuvin: Thina chun kelngoi chin’a akichin diu ahitai: Jangpet’a lhankhuh-a kumsuh uva, Alim amel’u jong kikhelsoh kei ding, Noimigam chu amaho in hi ding ahitai.
Keima lhagao vang noimigam thaneina kona Pathenin eilhatdoh peh ding Pathenin eina san ding ahiye. Selah
Mihem khat ahaodoh tengleh tijat nan neidan, Ama chu ainsung loupina akhantou jongleh ging hih-in.
Ajeh chu athi tengleh akipoh ding imacha aumpoi; Aloupina jong khu anunga kijotsuh theilou ding ahi.
Ahinlai dam sunga amajeng anom’a kigel’a, Thilpha aboldoh teng min apachat vang uvin;
Khovah mukha kit lou ding thina khang geisa Apu apate lah a chetei tei ding ahibouve.
Mihem hi ahaodoh tengleh angol jin, Gancha bangin angol thipi din aumdoh jie.
Thahat tah Pakai Pathen chun Nisoa pat nilhum geiyin Leiset hi akou kou jengin Thu asei seijenge.
Zion lhanga kon mel-hoi chamkimsoh Pathen chu khovah-in ahung vahdoh tai.
I-Pathenu ahungin, pao louvin aumpoi; Amasanga mihalvam jeng thei meikong ahung lengin, Ajet avei anung lam ama lama Huile go aojen junin ahung kithoi.
Pathenin amite thu atanpeh theina din gin Chung thangvan le noi leiset jong akou khomin;
“Kahenga hung kikhom’uvin, Kei dinga mi kitah ho; Kilhaina semjia keito Kitepna bol’a pangji miho!” ati.
Pathen dihna chu vanmun jousen jong aphongin ahi; Ajeh chu Pathen amatah thutana pang ahiye! Selah
“Ngaiyuvin kamite, keiman thu seiyinge Vo Israel, nangma douna thu kasei ding ahi. Keima hi Pathen kitipa Nangma Pathen chu kahi.
Kilhaina hijatpi nabol bol jeng jeh leh Ka-angsunga pumgo thilto hijatpi Tang louhel’a nabol jeh a Keiman them kachansah ding nahipoi.
Ken nangma insunga kon bongchal jong kasan lou ding, Nakel-hon lah a kona kelchal jong kalah lou ding ahi.
Ajeh chu gammang lah a sahem jouse keiya ahiuvin, Mol le lhang asang sang lah alhale gancha jouse jong keiya jeng ahiu ve.
Keiman chungaleng vacha jouse jong kahesoh keiyin, Tol’a vahle thei jouse jong keiya jeng ahiuve.
“Kagil akel jongleh nahenga thum ponge; Ajeh chu leiset pumpi le asunga cheng jouse keiya ahi.
Keiman bongchal ho sa hi kaneh hiya, Kelcha thisan hi kadon mong ham?
Pathen henga kilhaina khel’in thangvahna bol’in, Hatchungnung Pathena nakitepna molson;
Genthei nikhon keima henga hung taovin, Ken nahuhdoh ing ting, nangin neichoi-at ding ahi,” ati.
Migiloupa jah a vang Pathenin aseitai. “Keima chondan thu seidohna ding leh Kakitepna thu hi nakam sunga sodohna ding Nangman ipi tha nanei yam?
Ajeh chu nangin kagahna jong hot tah-in nabol’in, Kasei jouse jong nung lam se-nan naneitai.
Gucha nato khah leh nakijolpin, Midangto kijonbol bol ho toh nakiloiye.
“Nakamsung jong thuse jeng sei nan namangin, Naleigui jong joule nal sei nan akilehpel’e.
Natou munin nasopi douna jeng nasei seiyin, Nasopi nanu sung peng jeng jong nahehse sei.

Thil hichengpi hi naboltan, Ahivangin keiman limsah louva kakoi nah lai nahi; Keijeng jong hi nang tobang khattou Hi ding ham, tin nagel tai; Tua vang kapho nahin, Namit mu chang tah a themmo kachansah nahi.
“Ching theiyuvin Pathen nasumil tauve; Achuti louleh kabotel’uva nahuhdoh jouvu umlou ding ahi!
Thangvahna kilhaina thilto banga bolpan eijahol ahin, Alamlhah kisemtohpa chubou Pathen huhhingna kamusah ding ahi!” ati.
O Pathen, nalungset longlou ahin, Hijeh chun keima neikhoton; Namikhoto thalhingset ahijeh-in Kasuh khel abonchan theh ngimsel jengin.
Kathemmonaa konin neisil thengin lang, Kachonset’ a konin neisop thengsel’in!
Ajeh chu kasuh khel abonchan kahe jingin, Kachonset kamaiya akilang jinge.
Nangma douna mong monga chonse kahin, Namitmua hitobang thilse hi kabol ahitai; Hijeh chun kachunga thu natan jong nadih lheh jengin, Nathutanna nolna beihel nahi.
Vetan, themmosa saa min eihin ahin, Kanu oisunga jong chonsesa kijil kahibouve.
Vetan, nangin mi asung lam adih ding nadeiyin, Hijeh chun kalungthim gila chihna thu neihil’e.
Hyssop twiyin neisop le chun keima ngimsoh tange; Neisop’in, chutileh buhbang sangin bangjonge.
Kipana le thanopna lhingset’in neipen, Navoh bohsa gu le chang jouse jong kipah uhen.
Kachonset chengse hi neivetpeh dan lang, Kathemmona abonchan theh ngimsoh keiyin.
O Pathen, lung theng neipen lang, Kasunga lhagao thah, adih chu neikhumpeh-in.
Na-angsunga konin neipaidoh loujenin, Kachunga konin jong na-Lhagao Theng lamang hih-in!
Namihuhhingna kipa umtah chu neipe kit’in lang, Kalhagao kipah thanomin koijingin.
Chutengleh keiman suh khel neiho nalampi aboncha kahil ding, Chonse ho jong nahenga hung kile kit diu ahi.
O Pathen, thisan jal’a themmona konin neihuhdoh-in, Nangma kei dia huhhingna Pathen nahin, Namihuhdoh jal’a kenjong Lei kileh pel’a la kasah ding ahi:
Vo Pakai, kam kipeh pel’in neilhan, Chuteng kakamsunga nangma kavahchoi ding nahi.
Ajeh chu kilhaina thiltoa jong nangma lung kipah nahipon, Pumgo thilto kapeh ding hijongleh, lung lhai pon nate.
Lhagao lengvaiya kisih hi Pathen santhei dol Kilhaina gantha tobang ahin. Hijeh chun O Pathen, Lung lengvaiya kisihna nei chu nangin nahsah mon bolpon nate.
Nadei deiyin Zionlhang din thilpha bolpeh-in, Jerusalem kulpi jouse kaiphan;
Chutia nangin adih-a kilhaina nadei teng, Pumgo thilto kibol ho hi hen sapumgo thilto hijongleh, Nangma maicham phunga chu Bongchal tampi kigou ding ahi.
Mi thahatpa idinga nangma kiletsah nahiya, Pathen ngaisah te douna jou thil jeng nabol ham? Nilhum hel hel’in Nangman manthahna jeng nabol’in ahi.
Jou le nal jeng podoh a pangpa, Naleigui jong samchem hemtah bangin akileh pel’e.
Nangin thilpha sangin thilse naseijon, Thutah sei sangin thujou nasei nomjoi. Selah
Vo leiguiya lhep lhahna dimsetpa, Nangin mi bahgam thei thujeng nasei nome.
Hijeh a chu Pathenin thoukit louhel dia navoh lhuh ding, Naponbuh a kona nakaidoh a nabotel ding ahi; Mihing chenna gamsunga kona Nangma nabul nabal’a nakaldoh ding ahitai. Selah
Hiche hi midih hon amu’uva akichat diu, A mapa chu anuisat’uva asei diu;
“Vetan, mihatpa Pathena kisel loupa, Anei le agou nengjeng junga kisongpa Ama haona jeng jenga Kisel ding gopa pi khu!” ati diu ahi.
Keivang Pathen houin sunga Olive thing hing Dumsel bangin kaum jingin, Atonsot atonsot geiyin Pathen lungset longlouva kakisonge.
Hiche naboldoh jeh hin keiman nathangvah ing ting, Thilpha ahijeh a Pathen ngaisah te angsunga Keiman namin kaphonle le ding ahi.
Mi-ngol’ in alungthim sunga “Pathen aumpoi,” tin aseiye. Hitobang miho hi amonsa ahiuvin. Thet umtah thil jeng abol’uve; Thilpha bol’a khatjeng chajong aumpoi.
Pathenin mihem chate hi Vana konin ahinve ve jin, Miching a um khah-uva Pathen hol anungjui aum khat touvu leh, ati.
Abonchan akihei mangsoh tauvin, Aphatmo nau akibang soh keiye; Thilpha bol’a abeihel’in, Khat’a khat jeng cha jong aumpoi.
Pathen henga tao kha louhel’a, Kamite anneh a nea bahgam hel miho. Thilse jeng jeng bol’a pang ho hin Imacha cha jong ahet louhel’u hitam?

Amaho hi lungdon tijatna chukha ahitauvin, Hitobang tijat lungdonna hi aumkha hih laiye; Ajeh chu Pathen hephaloute hi Pathenin agu achangu achilgoi ding; Pathenin lah louva akoijeh-uva Jum le ja athoh diu ahitai.
Vo hi, Pathenin amite hamphatna apeh kit teng Zion lhanga kona Israel huhdoh ding umdoh thei hileh! Jacob kipah thanom intin, Israel kipah ding ahi.
Vo Pathen, naminin neihuhhingin, Nathahat’in them neichan tan.
O Pathen, kataona ngaiyin lang, Kakamsung soh thusei ho ngai nan nakol hindon.
Ajeh chu kei dou nan dan neiloute achungsoh-uvin, Dip damna neilouten tha din eihol’uve; Amaiyuva jong Pathen mel him him amupha pouve. Selah
Vetan, keima eipanpi chu Pathen ahin, Kahinkho hoidama chu Pakai amabou ahi.
Pakaiyin kagalte chu thilsea alethuh ding, Nakitahna chun amaho hi subei hel tan.
Keiman deichomin nahenga thilto hinchoiying ting. O Pakai, thilpha ahijeh a namin kathangvah ding ahi.
Ajeh chu nangin kagentheina jousea neihuhdoh tan, Kamelmate kajouvin kamit’in kamutai.
Vo Pathen, kataona ngaiyin lang, Thil kathum teng kisel mangji hih beh-in!
Genthei hesoh nan eijoutai. Nei khohsah-in lang neihou tei teiyin!
Melmapa husa kajah a Migiloupan eibolset tengleh abeipai ding kahitai. Ajeh chu amanin genthei hesohna eilhut khum lhonin, Lunghan manin keima douna jeng abol lhon tai.
Kalung sunga kalung ahesoh behseh jengin, Thi ding gin nan eilonvuh soh tai.
Kichatna le tijat nan eilhun khumin, Kiphat lam nan eivuh mange.
Hijeh chun keiman, “Ohe vakhu banga lhaving teni kanei hihen, Leng mang jeng leng kicholdo tange;
Chutileh gamla tah aleng mang ing ting, Gammang lah a gageh tange. Selah
Khopihui le vanpi nim masanga jong Kiselna ding kiholdoh loi tange,” kati.
O Pakai, athilgonu khu suhmang peh inlang, Aleiguiyu jong thusei mohel’in lhapeh-in; Ijeh-inem itileh khopi sunga khun Pumhat’a kinona leh kinah na jeng kamui.
Sun le janin khopi kimvel’a akitol le akitol leuvin, Apal dunga khun avah le leuve; Khopi sunga khun Kijoubolna jeng leh gentheina jeng adimset’e.
Kholai dunga jong manthahna jeng aumin, Kailhang mun dunga jong bolgen theina le lhep lhahna abei deh poi.

Kathoh khopset’a eihouse sea hi Melma jong ahideh sam poi; Melma hijo leh kathoh jou joh ding ahin, Kiletsah tah a eibolpa kakidou pipa jong ahipoi; Ama chu hijo leh Akoma kona kakisel mang theijoh ding ahi.
Kakibahpi, kakihetpi, kakiloipi sa Nangma ma ma nahibouve.
Thu ngei ngeiyin ikihoulimji lhonin, Pathen houin sungajong ikijot khomji lhon me.
Hiche miho hi thi nan lhunden jeng hen lang, Ahing changin noimigama kumsuh jengu hen; Kiphat lam pum pumin Alhankhuh sunguva kijotsuh jengu hen.
Keivang Pathen henga kataovin, Hijeh chun Pakaiyin eihuhhing nante.
Jingkah nilhah sunin kakiphinna thu kaseiyin, Hijeh chun Pakaiyin ka-ogin janante.
Keima dou dia mihem tamtah akigol vanguvin, Kakisatpi galmuna kona jong Pakaiyin lung mong tah a Kahinkho hi ahuhhing ding ahi.
Pathenin ngaiyin tin amaho asuh nem ding, Khanglui laiya pat Pathen chu laltouna toujing ahi; Ajeh chu amaho hin danthu jong anit pouvin, Pathen jeng jong aging pouve. Selah
Kaloipan agol apaite dounan akhut alhan, Akitepna asukeh tai.
Athusei thao twiha kimehnal sanga analjoh vangin, Alungthima gal lungthim adimset bouve; Athuseiho thaotwi sanga anemjoh jeng vangin, Aseidoh ho chu chemjam dodohsa tobang ahibouve.
Napohgih chu Pakai chunga seplhan, Aman nakhan kho ding gelpeh nante; Itih chan hijongleh Pakaiyin Midih delmanga aum ding aphal louhel ding ahi.
Vo Pathen, nangman amaho khu kokhuh tong pena leh lut’in, Thisan sohatte, jou le nal dimsette khu Ahinkhou akeh lang jong hindau hen; Kenvang nang jeng bou katahsan jing ding ahi.
Vo Pathen, neilungset’in, Mihemten keng chotphan eineitauve; Nilhum keiyin galten eibol gentheiye.
Sun nilhum keiyin kamelmaten keng chotphan eineiyun; Mihem tampin kiletsah tah-in eikisat piuve.
Keiman gin kanei teng Nang jenga kaki-ngaiye.
Athusei jong kavahchoi jing Pathen, Kicha louhel’in hiche Pathen jenga hin kaki-ngaiye. Tahsa mihemin I-eilo thei ding ham?
Sun nilhum keiyin kadihna jong suhmopeh din eigouvin, Thilse sodohna din alung gel’u abonchan keima douna ahi.
Ahon honin akiloiyun eichang lhiuve, Kakalsotna jouse ave-lhi jing jenguvin ahi. Hitobanga tha dia eigot nau hi.
Vo Pathen, hiche athemmo nau jeh hin Nangman lethuh din ngaiton, Nalungsat pet’in mitin vaipi hi tolse nan neiyin.
Nangin keima suhchal touchal namelchih jingin, Ka-lhi long jouse hi nahaicha sunga kikhumin! Hichengse hi aboncha Nalekhabua kijih lut cheh hilou ham?
Nahenga kahung tao ni ni leh Kamelmate hi kinungdel jam diu ahi. Hichea hin Pathen keilama apange, Ti keiman kahei.
Pathen jeng athusei jong kavahchoiyin, Pakai athusei ho geiyin kavahchoi jie.
Gin neilouvin Pathena kaki-ngaiyin, Mihemin i-eilo ding ham?
O Pathen, nahenga kakitepna kabulhitsoh kei ding, Nahenga thangvahna thilto tampi kapeh ding nahi.
Ajeh chu nangin thina konin kalhagao nahuhdoh-in, Pathen angsung hinna khovah a kalhatle theina din Kakengphang teni jeng jong Kipal lhu louvin neikoiye.
Neilungset’in Pathen, Keima neilungset tei teiyin; Ijeh-inem itileh kalhagao nanga kisel ahi; Khopihui le gopi kithon eijot galkai kahsea Nalhaving noiya kisel jing ding kahiye.
Chungnungpen Pathen henga kataovin, Kei dia alungdei bulhitsoh Pathen henga kataove.
Vana kona ahinsola keima eihuhhing ding, Keng chotpha eineiho chu ajumso ding ahi. Selah Pathenin alungset longlou leh Akitahna ahinsol lhah ding ahi!
Mihem chate bahgama pang sakei bahkaiho lah a Keima kakijamin, Ahau hempi hi tenghem le thai-hem abangin, Aleiyu jong chemjam kinol-hemsel abange.
O Pathen, vanmun jouse sanga sangjon kichoi sangin! Leiset pumpi sangin naloupina domsang in!
Mihon kakalse na ding lai laiya thang akam’uvin, Kahinkho anemse tauve. Kalampia khuh alaiyuvin, Ahinla amaho ma ma khuh a chun alhalut tauve. Selah
Vo Pathen, kalungthim alinglao deh poi, Keiman longdela la kasah ding ahi! Hung thouvin kalhagao!
Hung thouvun selangdah le semjang jong! Kenjong jingkah khovah katho khah ding ahi.
Vo Pakai, ken mitin vaipi lah a Nangma kathangvah ding; Namtin vaipi lah a jong Nangma vahchoi la kasah sah ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh nangma lungset longlouvin Van jeng jong akhokal tan, Nangma kitahnan jong Meilhang lah akhokal peh tai.
Vo Pathen van munjouse sanga sangjon kichoi sangin, Leiset pumpi sangin naloupina domsang jon!
Pathen jeng jong nahitheiyu ahinan. Ahinla adih nabol mongu hinam? Mihem chapate chunga jong hi Lang neina beihel’a thu natanu hinam?
Ahinai saipoi, nalungthim uvin thildih lou jeng nagel’un, Nakhut’uvin leiset’a pumhat’in thil nabol bol jengui.
Migilou chu naobua apen lhah a pat avah koiyin, Apenuva pat’in suhkhel aneiyun jou aseiyui.
Gul gu nei bangin akamsunguva thina thei gu adimset’in, Gulsum na-ngong kolseh bangin aum gamtauve.
Gulsum na-ngong jong khun gulsai ho theile gin ajapon, Gul lhimna doi choiho thilbol jong donin aneipoi.
O Pathen, akamsunguva ahatu jouseu suh chip peh-in lang, O Pakai, sakei bahkai noute tinhem jouse tanboh peh-in!
Abonchauvin twi longa kitolmang hel bangkhun Kitolmang sah soh keiyin lang, Hampa gosa kichon gep gep bang khun Abonchauvin gep tel tul’in lhajengin.
Abonchau khun mun khat’a kangdenji Dahdeng bang khun gotden sah-in. Alha lhing louva peng naosen nisa mukha lou bangin
Nabelsonin lingsut banga meisa ajah vah sang khun Agosa hihen ana-hing hijongleh Pathenin theh mang hen!
Pathenin phu alah amu tengleh Midih chu kipah thanom ding ahin; Midih chun migiloute thisan lah Twi kinoh banga anoh ding ahiye.
Hichea hi mihemten asei diu, “Midih-in vang kipaman amu ding aum monge; Leiset chunga thutan ding hin Pathen jong aum mong nai,” ati diu ahi.
O ka-Pathen, kamelmatea konin neihuhdoh-in lang, Kei douna hung konte koma chun neihong phan;
Thilse boltea konin neihuhdoh-in lang, Thisan sohat mitea konin neihuhhing in.
Ajeh chu vetan, mihon tha din eichang lhi lhiuvin, Kei dounan mi engse tah tah ho chu akilol lhut lhut’uve. Ahivanginla vo Pakai, Suh khel kanei jeh le kachonset jeh,
Kathemmo jeh a amahon eidel leuva, Tha dinga eigot’u ahideh poi. Nang le nang nachamin hung kitildoh jengin, Neihung kithopin chule neihung ven.

Pakai thaneipen Pathen Nangbou Israel Pathen nahi; Namtin vaipi talen matsah dingin hung thoudoh-in, Jou jouva thilse jeng bol ding gel ho chu Mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong Talen matsah louvin koidan. Selah
Nilhah sim nilhah seh leh ahung kinungjot jiuvin, Uichate bangin apengset sot’uvin ahi; Kholai dung tina akijot leuvin Neh le chah akihol leuve.
Kholai dunga chun akambem bemin thu aseiyun, Ane kabah bah-in thu aseiyuve; Ijeh-inem itileh “Koiman ithuseiyu japha ponte.” tin agel’uve.
Pakai nangin amaho khu nanuisat jin, Namtin vaipi abonchan nuijat jat naumsah tai.
Vo kahatna Pathen, Ken nangma vahchoi la sange; Ajeh chu keima dinga kulpi chu Pathen nangma nahijinge.
Ka-Pathen chu lungset longlou ahijeh a eilamto ding, Ka-Pathenin kamelmate chunga jo-na eichansah ding ahi.
Melmate chu thatdoh jeng hih-in, Ajoleh kamiten ima gel louvin sumil’uvin te; Nathahat’in amaho chu a-eng engin bol’in lang, O Pakai kagalsatnau luma pang, Melmate hi abonchauvin Sonkun soh keiyin!

Akamsunguva chonsetna thu aseiyu le, Akam ‘uva aseidoh sau those hijat jeh hin, Akiletsahna lai tah-uva amaho hi Midang keng chotphan koi jengin. Amahon mi agaosap sap jenguva Thujou jeng asei sei jeh-u hin;

Lungsat na neiyin bahgam jengin. Abeihel kahseuvin bahgam tan; Chutileh Jacob chunga vaihoma pang, Leiset kolmang geiya vaihom hi Pathen ama mong mong ahi, Tia midangin jong ahetdoh joh diu ahi. Selah
Nilhah sim nilhah seh leh ahung kinungjot jiuvin, Uichate bangin apengset sot’uvin ahi; Kholai dung tin’a akijot leuvin, Neb le chah akihol leuve.
Anneh hol’in akitol le akitol leuvin. A-oiva akimu lou tengu ahutum tum jiuvin ahi.

Ken vang nathahat vahchoi la sang ting, Jingkah seh le nalungset longlou vahchoi la Othong je jua kasah jing ding ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh Nangma hi kei din Kagenthei hesoh nikhon Kakulpi leh kakiselnan napang jinge.
Vo kahatna Pathen. navahchoi la sange; Ajeh chu nangma kakuIpi nahi O Pathen! Long louva eilungset jing Pathen nahi.
O Pathen, nangin keiho neipaidoh-uvin, Kagalpal jouseu jong naloichimsoh tai; O Pathen, lung hang jongle chun Keiho neisempha kit’uvin!
Nangman lingpi nakihosah jin, Lei set jong napokeh sah jeng jie; Leiset’in na asa behseh jeng tai, Hijeh chun apoh khi laijouse semphan.
Nangin namite hi genthei hesoh Nasa tah tah nathohsah jin, Don ding jong ju neipeuvin Kalung vaiyun kalonle leuve.
Nagingte din Ponlap nadah peh jingin, Thalpi ahung kikap teng hichu abel jiuve. Selah
Hitia hi na-ngailut mi nahuhdoh theiya, Nabanjet’a gal najo teng neidonbut theina diuvin.
Amunthenga kon Pathenin thu asei tai, “Kichoisang tah a Shechem kho kasuh keh ding; Succoth phai jong kakehso ding ahi.
Gilead keiya, Manasseh jong keiya, Ephraim hi kathih lukhuh ahin, Judah chu kaleng tenggol ahi.
Moab chu kakisilna kong ahin, Edom chunga kakengchot kangamjie; Philistia chunga galjo hanla kasai.” ati.
Kulpi kikaikhum khopi sunga eipui lut ding koi hiya, Edom langa eipui ding koi ham?
O Pathen donlouva neikoisau hilou ham? Vo Pathen kasepaiteu toh kilhonin gal nakonpoi.
O Pathen galte dounan neipan piu vin, Ajeh chu mihem panpi hi pannabei ahibouve.
Pathento pangkhoma hangtah a gal kasat diu, Kagalteu akenga chotpha jou ding Pathen bou ahi.
O Pathen kamaona hi ngaiyin lang, Kataona hi neijah peh teiyin;
Leiset kolmonga konin nangma kakouvin, Kalungthim alhah dah teng kahin kouve. Kei sanga kikhang sangjo Songpi phunga chun neipui lut’in;
Ajeh chu nangbou kakiselna nahin, Melma toh kidouna panmun pha insang dettah nahi.
Naponbuh sunga tonsot kumkhon neichensah tan! O chutileh nalhaving teni noiya hoi ding kahi! Selah
Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen nangin kakitepna nahetan, Nangma min ging khencha umte goulou chu neipetai.
Lengpa hinkho saosah-in lang, Akum kumin, akhang khangin hing jing hen!
Pathen angsunga tonsot geiyin leng changhen, Lungset longlou le kitahna neisah jing jengin!
Chuteng kenjong niseh a kitepna kabola, Tang louhel’a Namin vahchoi la kasah jing ding ahi.
Kalhagaovin thipbeh chan Pathen jeng a-ngah jinge; Pathena kona bou huhhingna hung potdohji ahi.
Pathen chu kasongpi le eihuhhinga ahin, Kakulpia pang ahi, keima nasatah-a suhling hoi hiponge.
Mihem khat suhsetna dinga itih geiya Nabonchauva hi natoupha phauva, Pal ki-ngai on bang leh Selthon achimkhum banga nabol diu ham?
Hitobang miho hin hiche mipa minthanna Suh beipeh ding bou agel’uvin Jou le nal’a bol ding adeiyun, Akamsung uvin phatthei abohmai maiyun, Alungthim sung lamu lah Gaosapna jeng adimset’e. Selah
Ahin kalhagaovin thip beh cha a-nga jing chu Pathen ahin, Pathena kona bou kakinepna hung potdohji ahi.
Pathen chu kasongpi le eihuhhinga, kakulpi ahin, Keima moh suh linglao hoi kahipoi.
Huhdoh a kauma jaholna kachan ding jong Pathen chung jenga ki-ngai ahin; Dettah a kakiselna songpi chu Pathenbou ahi.
Vo mitin vaipi Phat tin nitinin Pathena ki-ngaiyun; Pathen angsunga chun Nalungthimu twi kisung lha bangin peuvin; Eiho dinga Pathen bou kiselna ahi. Selah
Nei le gou haolou mihemte hi hai khat tobangbou ahin, Gou haotah mihemte jong lhep chatvaina ahi; Thil tena akiteuva ahileh ajangkhai behseh-uvin, Abonchauvin jong huijang khat sangin ajang jouve.
Pumhat’a kichomdoh thil kikhol ho Kison nan neidauvin; Guh chat thil jong pannabeiyin Kinepnan neidauvin; Nei le gou apuntul tul’a ahijongleh Nalungthim in geldau vin.
Pathenin hiche thu hi khatvei aseitan, Kenjong athu hi niveijen kajahsa ahitai; Ijeh-inem itileh thaneiya chu Pathen bou ahi.
Vo Pakai, longlouva lungset nei nang bou nahin, Hijeh chun mi anatoh dungjuiyin Nalethuh cheh jin ahi.

Vo Pathen, nang bou ka-Pathen nahin, Kenjong nang jeng kahol jinge; Kalhagaovin na-lha ngaiyin, Twisih ngaicha bangin dangchah geovin aume. Nang ka-lha ngai jeh hin katahsa jong alhasam in, Twi beina gamgo lah bangin kagotai.
Hijeh chun houin muntheng dunga nang kave-lhi len, Nahatna le naloupina kave-lhi le lei.
Ajeh chu nalungset longlou hi hinkho sangin aphajon, Kakamsung hin nang jeng vahchoi yinge.
Hijeh a chu kahin laisea nang jeng kachoi-at ding, Kakhut lhang ing ting namin kahinsana kakou ding ahi.
Kahinkhon sa-lhinle sathao jeng kanen, Kakamsungin jong kipana kamcheng in navahchoi tai.
Kalupna jalkhuna nang jeng kagel jin, Jan khovah vah-in nangjeng kageljie.
Ajeh chu eikithopi jing nangma nahin, Nalhaving lim noiya kipa la kasai.
Kalhagaovin nakolchah jing jengin, Nakhut jetlam in eikaile jing nai.
Amavang keima tha dia eiholte chu Leiset noilam kokhuh sunga kijotsuh diu ahi.
Hitobang miho hi chemjam hem’a lou dia kipedoh-uva, Along jengu jong kamkeiten aneh diu ahi.
Lengpa vang chu Pathena kipah jinga, Akoma kihahsel jouse jong chu loupina chang diu ahi; Ijeh-inem itileh mijouho kamhom Kisip bingpeh ding ahiuve.
Vo Pathen, kakiphinna thusei ngaiyin; Melma kaginna konin jong kahinkho hoidamin;
Migilouten guh thima thilse agon nauva konin Keima neisel mangin; Thilse bolte thilgona konin jong Keima neisel mangin.
Aleiguiyu jong chemjam hemtah bahsah a, Thalpi chang banga midot jap jap thujeng seinom ho,
Chang panga nolnabei mi doigih geh a kapjeng, Kiphat lamna neilou hel’a hetman louva hinkap jeng tobang ho khu.
Thilse agel’u chu lhaso louvin atuh det jingun, Guh thim chan mi kipalna ding thang akam leuvin; “Kon eimuphah diu ham?” tin agelun;
“Ithemmo nau kon aholdoh jou beh ding ham? Akaleh a thilbol ding igot’u Kon ahet ding ham?” tin agel’uve. Ajeh chu mihem lung sung hileh alung gil hileh Athuh-a thuh ahiye!
Ahin Pathenin hitobang ho hi athalpia akap’a, Hetman louhel’a amavo soh ding ahi.
Alei kituh tang lou jeh-uva Aboncha manthahna chusoh kei diu, Chutengleh aumchan u mupha chanin Alu ahih-uva akhasuh khum diu ahi.
Chutah le mitin kicha soh diu, Mikoma Pathen thilbol asei leuva; Ipi dinga Pathenin hitobanga Thil abol jeng hitam ti agelkhoh diu ahi.
Midih chu Pakaiya kipah thanom hen Pakaiya kisel jing jeng hen! Alungthima lungdih pu jouse chu Loupina changsoh keiyu hen!
Vo Zion lhanga cheng Pakai, Nang bou vahchoi lomtah nahi: Nang koma bou hi Kitepna jouse kimolso ding ahi.
Vo mihem taona ngailhi jing Pakai, Nahenga tahsaa hing jouse hung kijot lut soh diu ahi.
Mihing jousen achonset jeh-uva naheng ahinjot diu, Hitia hi kachonset nauvin eijo tengu jongleh, Kachonset nau jouse chu Nangin na-ngaidam soh heljin ahi.
Nang inpia cheng dia nangin nalhentum Nahinpui lut jeng mihing chu anun nom ahi. Nahouin theng, na-insung phatna jeh a Keiho kalungnau chimsoh ding ahi!
O eihuhhinguva pang Pathen, Nangman datmo moum thil naboljin Keiho neihouvun Neihuhdoh doh jenguve; Nangma hi leiset kolmonga pat’a Agamla pen twikhanglen jouse mong geiya mite kinepna nahiye.
Nangin nathahat chun mol lelhang jouse natungdoh-in, Thahat konggah bangin nakigah tai.
Twipi kinong lai jeng jong naphoh thip’in, Twipi kidil laipijong nahaisah theiye; Mitin vaipi kinong lui lui jong Nangin naphoh thip jin ahi.
Hijeh chun leiset mong aning chonga cheng hon jong Hiche tobang melchihna nabol ho hi akichauve; Nangin jingkah khovah ding le nilhah nilhum ding jong Kipah thanom tah tah-in navahsahin nalhumsah-e.

Nangin leiset hi nakholtoh jin twi nachap nou jingin, Nasa tah-in leiset ga naphat theisah-e. Pathenin akhohsah vadung chu twi anengin adimjingin, Miho din nangin neh ding chang nagonpeh jinge; Ijeh-inem itileh nangin Hitobang dia hi nagonsa ahitai.
Nangin twilam jouse twi thalhingset’in nalonsah-in, Changkong jouse jong twi nadip soh tai; Gotwi najuh sah jin nachap nou jingin. Changkeh jouse phatthei naboh-e.
Nahaona chu kumsunga neng jeng jungin nalhan, Nakangtalai kitolna lamlhong jeng jong sathao ajolsoh jengin ahi.
Gamthip lai jong hamhing ajing lha jengin, Thinglhang jouse jong kipah thanom in aumsoh tai.
Loudong jouse jong kelngoi hon adimsoh tan, Phaicham jouse la changdong adimsoh-e; Abon chauvin lhang asam’uvin Kipah thanomin la asauve.
Leiset pumpin Pathen henga Kipa ogin thongin sauvin,
Pathen min loupi vahchoi la sauvin, loupi tah-in Pathen vahchoi la sau
“Nathilbol ho hi itobanga tijat um hitam!” tin Pathen henga phongdoh-uvin lang, “Hi bang tah a hi thahat nahin, Namelmate jong na-angsunga akun jenge.
Leiset pumpin chibai naboh-uvin, Nangma vahchoi la asauve; Nangma min choi-atna la Leiset pumpin asauve. Selah
Hungin hung veuvin Pathenin itobang thil lou pi abol hitam! Mihemte lah a athilbol hin ama tijat umtah ahi, ti aphongdoh-e.
Pathenin twikhanglen jeng jong tolgo asosah-in, Vadung twilah chu tolgo ahin min kengin ajotdoh tauve. Hichea hi Pathen chunga Eiho ikipah thanom jiuvin ahi.
Pathen hin athahat athilbol theinan tonsot’in vai ahomin. Amit te nin namtin vaipi avejinge: Hijeh chun doumah mah a chonte khu Kithang-at sah hih hel’in. Selah
Vo mitin vaipite, i-Pathenu vahchoiyun, A vahchoina ogin kithongin lhauvin mi jousen ja cheh hen.
Ajeh chu Pathenin eiho mihing lah a eilhatsah-uvin, Ichenauva jong eikipal lhuh sah pouve.
O Pathen, nangin keiho neipatep’uvin, Dangka kipatep bangin neipatep’uve.
Nangin lenpel sunga neipui lut’uvin, Kataigenguva jong gentheina tin cheng delchenin neichenpeh-uvin
Mihemte kalubuh-uva natousah jengin, Meipi le twipi kapal galkaiyuve; Ahivangin nangman keiho hi Mun lentah khat a neipui lut tauve.
Keima pumgo thilto choiya nahouin sunga kahung lut ding, Nahenga kei dia kitepna ding jouse kabol ding ahi;
Hitobang kitepna chengse chu Genthei hesoh katopet’a kakam le ka-ogina kaphondoh a kitepna kaneisa ahitai.
Keiman gancha thaocha cha pumgo thilton napeng ting, Kelngoi chaltea kilhaina meikhu kakhutsah sah ding; Bongchal ho leh kelcha tea jong Kilhaina kabol ding ahi. Selah
Nang ho Pathen tahsan ho, Hunguvin lang hung vetem’uvin; Kei dinga Pathenin ipi abol hitam, Keiman naseipeh uvinge.
Keiman Pathen chu oging thong leuvin kakoujin, Kakamsung thuseiyin ama achoi an’e.
Keiman kalungthimin themmona deijo leng Pakaiyin khohsah a einei louhel ding ahi.
Ahinla Pathenin dihtah-in eikhohsah nan Kataona ogin angai lhi jing nai.
Kataona nahsah moa bol louva Long louhel’a eilungset jing jeh-in Pathen chu nun nom hen!
Pathenin eilungset’u hen lang Phatthei eiboh jingu hen, Chule eiho chunga hin Amaivah nisa bangin vahsah jing jeng hen. Selah
Chuti chun leiset chunga Nangma lampi kihedoh soh keihen, Namtin vaipi lah a jong Nami huhhingna thahat kihedoh soh keihen.
Vo Pathen, mitin vaipin nangma vahchoiyu hen, Abonchan mitin vaipin navahchoiyu hen!
Namtin vaipin kipah thanomin la sau hen, Ajeh chu nangin mitin vaipi thu kithuh cheh-in natanpeh jingin, Leiset chunga namtin vaipi hijat hi Nangin nalamkai jing jenge. Selah
Vo Pathen, mitin vaipin nangma vahchoiyu hen, Abonchan mitin vaipin nangma vahchoiyu hen!
Leiset hin muchi chivo ahinsep tan, Pathen, eiho Pathen chun phatthei eiboh tauve.
Pathenin eiho phatthei eiboh soh keitauve, Leiset kol kimvela chengten ama tahsan cheh-u hen!
Pathen chu hung kipatdoh hen lang Amelmate abonchauvin kithe cheh soh keiyu hen; Pathen douva pang ho jouse chu Amasanga jam mang soh keiyu hen!
Meikhu akimut mang bang khun Hitobang miho hi mut mang jengin; Meisa hul’a khoilu ajol lhah bang khun Migilou jouse chu Pathen angsunga mangthah-u hen!
Midihte vang kipah thanom jingu hen, Pathen angsunga kichoi sang jing jengu hen; Kipah thanom tah-in Golvah kutpi bol jingu hen!
Pathen din la sauvin, Amin vahchoi la sacheh-uvin; Meibanglhang ho chunga toupa Pathen vahchoi la sang tah-in sauvin; Ama chu amin Pakai akiti, Ama angsunga kichoi sanguvin!
Chaga pabeite dia mipa Meithaiho vengtup a pang chu Pathen ahin. Achenna munthenga acheng jinge.
Pathenin chenmun beite chu chenmun ding a pen, Songkul lut sohchang ho jong alhadoh jin ahaodoh sah-e; Amavang doumah mah a kisate chu Twikolgam nelgo lah a achensah jie.
O Pathen, namite nahin lamkaiya Gamthip laipi nahinjot pa chun, Selah
Leiset hi lingpin ahot lingsoh tan, Vanin gotwi ahinphi lhai; Pathen angsunga chun, Pathen Israel masanga Sinai molsang nang jong Lingpin nahot lingsoh keiye.
Vo Pathen, nangin gotwi neng jeng jungin naphilhan, Gamtin achapsoh keiyin, Nagoulo namite chu nangin Amangthah dingsa nasemthah kit’e.
Hijeh chun nakelngoi banga um namiten chenmun akimun, Naphat najal’in Pathen nangin angaichate napesoh keiye.
Pakaiyin thu a pen, Kipana Thupha polea pang ho chu loupi ding ahiuve.
“Sepai ho lengte abonchauvin Ajamtauve, a jam soh tauve!” akiti. Ina um miho chu gal’a kichomdoh Thilkeo akihom’uvin,
Kelngoi honga achen vanguvin, Alhaving teni dangkaa kitomjol Vakhu lha teni tobang sana enga kitomjol chun Akhu khum jing jeng nauve.
Hatchungnung Pathenin leng ho athecheh soh phat chun, Zalmon molsang chunga buhbang ahung lhai.
Vo Bashan molsang, molsang minthang, Mol-hem tamtah kitungdoh Bashan molsang!

Vo molsang vum kitungdoh ho, Idinga nang ho le nang kithangset to nahiuva; Pathenin chenna muna aneiya, Tonsot tonsot geiya Pakaiyin Achenna ainmun dinga Kilhen dia agot molsang hi ding kichu nahiuvam?
Galsatna kangtalai hu neitah chu Sang som nijenin ahung kitol’in, Pakai chu asepaite asang sang toh ahungkonin Sinai molsanga konin muntheng phunga ahung tai.
Nangma molsang lama nakal touvin, Sohchang tampi napui toutai; Pakai Pathen chu doumah mah bolte lah a jong achen theina dingin Mihemtea konin jong thilpeh nakisan jinge.
Eihuhhinguva pohgih ijakai eipoh hu, Pakai i-Pathenu chu nisim seh-in nun nom jing hen. Selah
Hiche eiho Pathen hi huhhing Pathen ahin, Thina kona jamdohna thei chu hiche Pathen Pakai amabou hi ahi.
Hitia hi Pathenin amelmate lu atanpeh a, Lamse jenga kijot mite luchang ajangsam puma atanpeh ding ahi.
Pakai chun aseiyin, “Amaho hi Bashan phaiya kona kahin nung puiya, Twikhanglen tolam peh a kona Abonchauva kahin puidoh ding ahi;
Chutengleh nangman thisan twi kinoh banga nanoh a, Melmate tahsa chu na-uichaten aneh khop khop aneh diu ahiye,” ati.
Vo Pathen, ka-Pathen le kalengpa, Muntheng jona nahung kitol lut giltah a nakitol min amudoh tai.
Lathem ho ahung masauvin, Baja mut ho ahung nukhah-uvin, Alailunguva chun Nu-ngah hon khutbeh abeng uve.
“Khoppi lah a chun Pakai choi-an uvin. Israel taiguiya peng miten Pakai vahchoiyun!” atiuve.
Alah-uva alhumpen Benjamin in amaho alamkaiyin, Judah phunga milen milal ho jong Zebulun phunga milen milalte ahiuvin, Naph’tali phunga milen milal ho geiyin akihonlul lul jenguvin ahi.
Vo Pathen nathahat koukhomin, Itobang tah a nangin thil kidang Neina bolpeh sau hitam, Natha neina chu vetsah temin,
Jerusalema nahouin kisong ahijeh-in, Leng le lalten jong thilto ding nahinpe peuve.

Pumpeng lah a lha-le gamsate khu phohsal’in lang, Mipiho bongnou jouse chilgoi goiya Bongchal ho jong khu phohsal’in; Mi lah a kai don ding jeng gel ho khu Kengto chotphan umsah jengin, Galbol ding jeng deiho khu thecheh soh keiyin.
Egypt gamsunga konin sum-eng hung kitol lut hen, Ethiopia gamin jong akhut’in Pathen lam sang hen.
Vo leiset lenggam jouse Pathen vahchoi la sauvin, Pakai vahchoina la sa cheh-uvin. Selah
Khanglui laipeh a hung kiseisa, van kitiho Vanmun jousea toupa Pathen chu, Ven, ogin thongje jun kho-lhang asamin, Tha neitah-in kho asamtai.
Pathen bou athahat pen ahi, tin seiyun, Israel chunga alai loupina kilang jingin, Vanthamjol dung jousea jong Athahat akikhongsoh-e, tiuvin.
Amunthenga Pathen chu tijat kichat umtah ahin, Hiche Israel Pathen hin Amite dingin thaneina le Thahatna abonchan apen ahi. Pathen chu nun nom jing hen.
Vo Pathen, neihuhhing loiyin, Twiyin kangong geiyin eichup tai.
Bonlhoh lah a thuh tah-in kalha lut’in, Kengto ngapna ding abeitai; Twithuh lah a kalha lut tan, Twisoh kitol chun eilonvuh tai.
Kapen pen nan kacholtan, Kalol-hom jeng jong agosoh tai; Pathen lam kavet vet nan jong Kamit teni athimsoh pai ding ahitai.

Ajeh beiya eihot boljing miho chu Kalujang samjouse sangin jong atamjouvin, Jou le nal jeng pan’a einokhum ho jongchu Eisumang din athahat thei lheh-ui. Hitobang mihon kalah khah louhel jong Kasah kit dingin aseiyui.
Vo Pathen, keima ngol chonna nangin nahetsoh ahin, Kabol khel aboncha namit mua kisel jong aumpoi.
Vo Pakai thaneipen Pathen, Keijeh hin nanga kinemho jumso dan; Vo Israel Pathen, Naholte jong jachat sah hih hel’in.
Ajeh chu keiman nang jeh a phosalna kathoh ahin, Mitjum maijuma kaumlo ahitai.
Kasopi kasang gamho lah a jong hin Kholjin midan danin kaumdoh tan. Kasopite lah jenga jong Hetphah lou mi bangin kaumtai.
Nangma houin dia katompan jeh a eikibahgam ahitan, Mihon nangma na-engkalna jouseu kachunga achutai.
An ngol’a kineosah tah a kaum vangin, Keima phosal nan eikinei kit bep’e.
Kigenthei sah a khaodip pon kasil Miho seichah bep’in kaumdoh kit’ e.
Kelkot phunga thutan dia touho houlim nopna bep kahin, Jukham ho geiyin kaumchan hi lalhangin a-oitauve.
Hijongleh Pakai keima nahenga tao jing ing ting, O Pathen, nangin nasanthei phat leh Nalungset longlou thalhingset ahijeh-in Keima neihin houji jin:
Kitahna neiya mi nakithopiji jeh chun Bonlhoh lah a kalhah lutnaa kon hin neiloidoh tan; Kamelmatea kon leh twito lama konin Neihuhdoh tei teiyin ong!
Twisohpi chu neilon khup sah dan, Komtonglai jong neichop lutsah hih-in; Chujongleh kokhuh jeng jong Eival lhuma akam kichi khum din neibolsah dan.
Vo Pakai, lungsetna longlou phatah naneijeh chun Keima neihou tei teiyin; Namihepina thalhingset ahijeh chun Kaheng lam ngan hung kihei kit tan.
Nalhacha kei hi neikihei mang khum hih-in, Neihou loiyin genthei hesoh thoh a um kahi.
Neihin nailut’in lang nei lhatdamin. Kamelmatea konin neicham lhatsah loiyin!
Min eiphosalna jong nahen, Kajachatna le kajumna nahesoh keiye. Kakidoupite jong abonchan Nangman nahesoh keiyin ahi.

Eiphinset set jeh-uvin kalungthim jong asetan. Hijeh chun kinepna jong kanei thei tapoi. Eidip dampi ding khattou aumleh tia kavet vangin Khat’a khat jeng cha jong kamudoh poi; Eilhamon ding kahol le vangin Kamudoh deh pon ahi.
Kaneh din jong thina gu tui eipeuvin. Kadangchah a kadon din jong juthuh eipeuve.
Amasanguva adokhangu chu akipalnau hisah jengin, Kalhaina kut abol jouseu jong a-olih nau hisah tan.
Kho amulouna diuvin amit jouseu thimsah-in lang, Ating akongu kithing thinginlhan.
Achunguva nalungsat chu vutsa kisung lha bangin sungin, Nalunghan meikong bang chun khaltan soh keiyu hen.
A-ngahmun ujong ahomkeovin koipehin lang. Aponbuh dunguva jong koimacha chenda jeng hen.
Ajeh chu nangin nabolgimpa chu amahon abolset be cheh-un, Maha naputsah jong chu nasa cheh-in abolbe kit’ui.
Amaho hi talen pebe be jengin lang, Nanga konin them channa beihel’in koiyin.
Hinna lekhabua konin abonchauvin noimang jengin, Midih ho lah a aminu jong kijih lut dajeng hen.
Keivang eikibol nasa behseh jengin na kasa lheh tai. Vo Pathen, nami huhhingnan neidom sangin!
Keiman la sang ting Pathen min kavahchoi ding. Thangvahna to thoa amajeng kachoiat ding ahi.
Hiche hin bongchal khat’a kahou sanga alung lhaisah joh ding, Aki teni le akeng tin jouse puma kapeh sanga alung lhaisah ding ahijoi.
Bol genthei thoh ten hinveu hen kipah cheh-u hen, Pathen lam holte nang ho jong nalungthim u kitilkhou sah cheh-uvin.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin angaicha geova umte taona angaiyin, Sohchanga kihen amite donlouvin akoi ngaipoi,
Van le leiyin Pathen vahchoi hen lang, Twikhanglen le asunga cheng jousen jong vahchoiyu hen.
Ajeh chu Pathenin Zion khopi ahuhhinga, Judah gam khopi jouse jong asah phatding, Akhopi dunga alhachate chenguva Alosoh keiyuva atoupha diu ahi.
Khopi sung dunga alhachate chate hung chenguva, Pathen min ngailu jousen ahinlosoh diu ahiye.
Vo Pathen, lung lhaisel’in neihuhdoh loiyin! O Pakai, kinle bongin neihung kithopin!
Tha dinga eiholte kisuh lung dong sah-in lang Jum le jachat thoh sah tan; Keima suhset ding jeng gel ho chu Nung jamsah-in lang mihem noisen umsah tan!
Einuisat lea, “Aha, aha!” ti ho chu Jachat le kichat tijat thoh sah tan.
Nangma ngaichate vang Nachunga kipah thanom jingu hen! Namihuhhingna ngaichate chun Atonsot geiyin, “Pathen chu aloupi,” tin seiyu hen.
Keivang lhasam le geochauvin kaume, O Pathen, neihung vil loiyin! Eipanpia eihuhdoh a pang nang nahi, O Pakai, kinomsot hih hel’in!
Vo Pakai, keima nakoma kisel kahi, Itih chan hijongleh neijumso hih hel’ in!
Nadih jeh chun neihuhdoh-in lang neipuidoh loiyin, Phaten hin-ngaiyin neihuhhing loiyin!
Kei dia kiselna songpi le kulpi det Eihuhhingin hung pangin; Ijeh-inem itileh Nangma kasongpi leh kakulpi nahi.
Vo ka-Pathen, migiloute khut’a konin neihuhdoh loiyin, Mi engse gilou thamphah din jong neikoidan.
Ajeh chu Pakai nangbou kakinepna nahin, O Pakai, kaneo laiya pat kakingaina nahi.
Kapen lhah a pat nanga ki-ngai jing kahin, Kanu naobua kona eidomlha jong nangbou nahi. Hijeh a chu kenjong Tang louva nang jeng kavahchoi ding nahi.
Mihem tampin kei hi kichih thei nan eineitauvin, Ahivangin nangma kakiselna kakul pi nahijing nai.
Kakamsung hin nangma vahchoina jeng aseiyin, Sun nilhum lhumin nang loupina jeng aphonge.
Kateh nung hin neipaidoh loujenin, Katha bei nung hin donlouvin neikoidan.
Ajeh chu kachung chang thua melmate akihou lhiuvin, Tha ding jenga eingaito ho chu akihousom som’uve.
Amaho hin, “Pathenin adonlou ahitai, Del’uvin lang gaman’uvin ahuhdoh ding aumtapoi,” atiuve.
Vo Pathen, neilhakang hih hel’in, O ka-Pathen, neihung kithopi loiyin!
Eiheh heh jengte chu kijumsou hen min bahgamu hen; Suhset dia eiholte chu houset le vetda dimset’u hen.
Keivang nachunga kinem jing ing ting, Kavahchoibe be jeng ding nahi.
Thildih nabol ho le namihuhhingna hi kakama Nilhum kei keiya kasei ding ahiye; Ajeh chu ajat mong mong jong Keima hetjou jai ahitapoi.
Pakai Pathen thilbol nasa tah tah phong dia kahunga, Nangseh seh bou nadihna kavahchoi ding ahi.
Vo Pathen, kachapan laiya pat nangin neihil jingin, Hijeh chun tugeiyin thil kidang nabolsa kaphong jinge.
Hijeh chun katehset kasam kan nungin jong, O Pathen, nangin neidalha loujenin; Ahung ding khang mite jah a Nathahat kaphonjal masangin neida lha loujenin.
Nathahatna nadihna O Pathen, Vanchung geiyin akitungdoh tai. O Pathen, thil loupi tah tah boljia Nang tobang koipen um kham?
Nangin genthei hesohna melse tah tah neitosah tan, Neisuh hal kit tei ding ahi; Leinoi langpeh a kona jong Nangin neihin puitou kit ding ahi.
Nangman mi neijabolsah cheh cheh a Neilhep lung mong kit ding ahi.
Vo ka-Pathen, nakitah najeh a Keiman selangdah kasaiya kavahchoi ding nahi; Vo Israelte Mithengpa Semjang saiya nang kavahchoi ding, la kasah ding ahi.
Navahchoi la kasah tengleh Kipah thanoma kakambem bema ka-sap ding ahi. Nangin nahuhdohsa kahinkhoa jong Nang kachoi-at ding nahi.
Sun nilhum lhuma nangin dih tah a nei kithopina thu Kasei sei jeng ding ahitai; Ajeh chu keima suhset dia eihol holte Ajum jumna diuvin akibol’in akilungset tapouve.
Vo Pathen, nangma thutan dihje chu lengpa hinpen, Nangma dihna chu lengpa chapa hinpetan!
Lengpan namite thu hi adih dih-in tanpeh hen, Namite vaicha ho hi thudih jengin bolji hen.
Molsang dung jouse jong Namite khohsah nan aga hung pung hen lang, Thinglhang dung jousea jong khun Lamdih jeng hung kisemdoh hen!
Mipi lah a vaichate dihna hi lengpan hinpanpi hen, Mi bolgenthei mehgep jeng hen, Ngaicha geova um mite Huhdoh jing jeng hen!
Nisa lhathah bei kahsen akhang khangin Lengpa chu hingsot hen!
Lengpa chu amite din hampa kisat nangsa chunga gotwi ju-lha bang hen lang, Leiset chapnouva pang gotwi phinlha bang hen!
Ahinkho sungin adih jeng leng hen lang, Lhathah kisuh bei kahsen cham leng jing hen!
Lengpan twikhanglen monga pat alang khat Twikhanglen mong geiyin lengvai po hen lang, Luipi dunga pat leiset mong geiyin Lengvai po hen!
Akidoupi jouse jong a-angsunga kun cheh hen, Amelmaten leivui leh-u hen!
Tarshish lengpa le twikol gama lengpan jong Hiche lengpa hi kai pecheh lhon hen! Sheba lengte leh Sheba jengin jong Thilpeh ding hinpoh peh peh jengu hen!
Ama angsunga leng jouse bohkhup soh kei hen, Namtin vaipi abonchan ama lhachan pangu hen!
Ajeh chu huhdoh ding ngaicha hon akou teng Hiche lengpa hin agahuhdoh jin, Kithopi beiya um mi lhasam hon akou teng Agahuhdoh jin ahi.
Neiloute leh thabeite adip dampin, Neiloute chu ahinson ahuhhing jie.
Bol gentheina kon leh pumhat’a mi abol nauva konin Hi tobang miho chu ahinson alhatdoh jin, Lengpa mitmun amaho thisan hi Manlu tah ahijin ahiye.
Hijeh chun lengpa hi hingsot hen, Sheba gamsunga sana chu ama chang hen! Ama ding hin min taopeh jing jeng hen, Ahinkho lhum keiyin min phattheina thumpeh jing hen!

Gamsunga jong neh le chah thalhing hen, Molsang dung jouse jong changkeh dimset hen; Achangpal jouse Lebanon gamsunga bangin phathei hen, Khopi dung jousea mihem pung thei hen, Loujaova hamhing pung thei bangin Mihem pungu hen!
Tonsot geiyin lengpa minthang jing hen lang, Nisa lhathah bei kahsen minthang jing hen! Ama jal’in mihem tamtah phattheiboh changu hen, Namtin vaipin ama chu nun nom hen, tiu hen!
Nun nom hen Pakai Israel Pathen, Datmo thil kidang bol theiya amabou ahi.
Amin loupi chu tonsot’in nun nom jing hen, Aloupina chun leiset pumpi losoh hen; Amen hihen Amen!
Jesse chapa David taona Abonchan akichaisoh tai.
Tahbeh mongin Pathen hi Mi lungdih, alung thengte din aphai.
Kei din vang kakengphang teni anal’in kisep lhu pai ding kahitan, Kakalsotna lam lama kipal lhu ding koncha kahitai.
Ajeh chu mi kiletsahte umchan kamua, Migiloute haoje kavet leh kathangset pin ahi.
Ajeh chu hitobang miho hin natna him him aneipouvin, Atahsao jong adam theiyin athao theiye, kati.
Midang bangin gentheila athoh khapouvin, Midang bangin genthei nan jong apha khapouve.
Hijeh chun kiletsah tah-in angong avaiput’uvin, Pumhatna ponsil bang in akisil’un mi anoleuve.
Amaiyu athao theiyin amitchangu alot tut tut jengin, Alungthimu vang angol’a ngol thei ahi.
Amahon mi atot chavaiyuvin, vetda dan thu aseiyui; Thoh thei louhel helin thu aseiyuvin ahi.
Van dounan thu aseiyuvin, Aleiguiyuvin jong leiset pumpi agaosap soh heltai.
Hijeh chun mipin jong amaho apahchajo tauvin, Them jong athemmo sah tapouve;
Hiti chun, “Pathenin iti ahetdoh ding ham? Hat chungnung Pathen chun hetna anei mong hinam?” atiuve.
Vetan, migilou kiti ho chu amaho hi ahiuvin, Anop aningin achonuvin, ahaobe cheh cheh jenguve.
Panna beihel in keiman kalungthima setna gel louhelin kaumin, Kakhut’a jong thilse him him thamkha louhelin kaume.
Nilhumhel helin eikibol gim jin, Jingkah sim jingkah seh leh eikiphohsaljie.
“Keiman hiti hin seinange.” tia kasei khah a hile, Nason nachilhah te chunga achonkhel ding kahitai.
Ahin iti monga hetchet ding ham, tia kangaito leh, Kei dinga gimna bepseu hile akilomin ahi;
Pathen munthenga kagalut’a, Migiloute manthahna ding, akikhonna, kagahetdoh masangsen.
Tahbeh mongin Nangman amaho khu alhu ding koncha nakoi ahin, Hung lhulhama amangthah dinga nakoi ahi.
Itobang tah a mitphet kah louva kisumanga, Kichat tijatnan alhoh mang hitam!
Ihmut khahloa jan mang tobang bep ahiuvin, Nakhahlo tengle namang giltah-u jong Imachan nagelji tapouve.
Kahinkho gentheiya aum chun, Kalungthim sunga na kasa lheh jengin
Nang koma dingin, angol’a ngol, Kho hephalou, gamsa tobang bep kana hi.
Hijeng jongle Nang to kalhon khom jingin, Kakhut jetlamin neikaile jingjeng nai.
Nangin neihil chah jingin, neilamkaiye Khonung tengle naloupina neipui lut ding ahi.
Van muna jong Nang tailou koi dang ham kei kingaina ding, Leiset’a jong Nang sanga kadeijoh thil dang aumdeh poi.
Katahsa leh kalungthim lhasam thei Ahinla Pathen chu kalungthim thahatna le kagoulo ding ahijinge.
Ijeh-inem itileh vetan, Nanga kona vahmang te chu mang thah ding ahiuvin, Nakoma thujou seiho chu Suh bei dinga nakoisa ahitai.
Kei dingin vang Pathen kom naiya umjing hi thilpha pen ahin, Nathilbol ho hi kaseidoh theina dingin. Pakai, Pathen nangma kiselnan kaneitai.
O Pathen idinga Nangman keiho Nei donda hel jengu hitam, Kelngoite banga Nangma hamhinga kivah jing namite chunga hi Ibola nalunghan na meikong bang jing jeng hitam!
Khanglui laiya pat’a nalamdohsa khopi hi hin geldoh jingin, Nagoulo dinga nalhatsa mite hi; Nangma chenna Zion molsang Hin geldoh jing jengin.
Kho ngai louhel’a Manthahna abolnau jonin hung kalsongin lang hin, Munthenga thilkeo lokeo abonchan Melmaten asuse gamhel tauve!
Nagalte chu Nangma muntheng lailung tah a jong A-ao le le jeng tauve; Amaho lim le mel kihetna melchihna thil ho Atungdoh soh keitauvin ahi.
Chunglam kelkot phunga kot khah thingjol ho jong Abonchan akengton achon lhuvin, heichan atulhu soh heltauve.
Chule thing khom kijempah jouse jong abonchan, Heichan atulhuvin, sehchan avogoi goi tauve.
Nangma muntheng jeng jong meiyin ahaluvin Tol dunga namin kisutna mun jouse jong asuhoh soh hel tauvin ahi.
Amahole amaho akihouvun, “Abonchauvin sunem helu hite,” akitiuve; Gamsunga nangma mina kikhopna mun jouse la Meiyin ahalvam tauvin.
Keihon kihilna thei melchihna imacha la kamu tapouvin, Themgao khat cha la aum tapoi; Hiche gentheina hi itih chan hiding ham, tia ahedoh thei, Keiho lah a khat cha beh la aum tapoi.
Vo Pathen melmate hin Itih chan geiya tot chatvaiya einei dingu ham? Melma ho hin atonsot geiya jong Namin agaosap jeng diu hitam?
Ipi dinga nakhut natuh tanga, Ibola Nakhut jetlam na-op’a nasip chah jing jeng hitam?
Hijongle ka Lengpa Pathen chu Akhang khanga hung um jing ahin, Leiset mite jalah tah a jong Huhhingna ahinsodoh sah jin ahi.
Nathahat chun twikhanglen jong nating tanin, Twi lah a cheng dragon ho luchang jouse jong nasukeh tai.
Leviathan luchang navohkeh peh-in, in, Atahsa jong gamthip noiya ganhing ho nanehsah tan ahi.
Nangman twinah jouse jong nasoh homsoh tan, Vadung jouse jong nalhakang tan, Kantih neilou hel vadung jouse jong Nalhakang soh heltai.
Sun jong nanga ahin, Jan jong nanga ahi; Nangman van loupina jouse le Nisa jong nasemtai.
Leiset kol kim vel agei naheh soh keiyin, Nipilai jong phalbi lai jong naum sah cheh-in ahi.
Vo Pathen, melmaten itobanga Tot chatvaiya eineiyu hitam, geldoh temin; Pathen hou nahsah louten jong Namin agaosap sap tauve.
Nangma vapal tobanga na-ngailupa hinkho hi Gamsa tobang ho khut’a pedoh hih helin; Nami vaichate hin khan kho ding Itih hijongle sumil hih helin.
Nangma kitepna khohsah tei teiyin; Ijeh-inem itileh gamsunga khothim lah jouse pumhat jengin akiboltai.
Nahsah moa kibolte chu jumso hih helin; Mivaichate, sil le chen ngaicha keova umte chu Namin vahchoi sah-in.
Vo Pathen, hung thouvin lang Nadihna hinphong tan; Pathen hou nahsah loute chun Itobanga nilhum lhuma kitotna naneiyu hitam gel doh temin!
Nakidoupite kisap thongje ju chu hai hih helin; Nadoumah te ogin tantih neilouva hung ging tou lui lui chu!
Nangma kathangvah-uve, Pathen. Nangma kathangvah uve: Namin kahin kouvuvin, Nathilbol kidang ho chu kageldoh tauve.
Aphat kitepna, katep bang banga Keiman atohna dungjui cheh a athu katan ding,
Leiset le asunga chengte amang thah dingkona Akhompi tuh det’a pang chu Keima kahi. Selah
Mi kiletsah te koma jong, “Kiletsah dauvin,” katin; Chule mi giloute lah a jong, “Nathahat song hih uvin;
Nathahat sang tah-in son dauvin lang, Na ngong vaiput’in jong thu seidauvin,” kati.
Ajeh chu Niso lam jong hideh lou, Nilhum lam jong hideh louva, Gamthip noiya jong hilou, Kidop sangna hungsoh doh phung ding;
Hitia thu hintan ding chu Pathen ahin, Mi kiletsah chu asuh neova; akineosah chu adopsang ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai khut’a khon khat aumin, Juthuh kihal phonbe bo adimset’in ahi; Aman hiche chu ahinsun lhah ding, Leiset’a mi giloute abonchauva hiche juthuh chun aboh lah a alhoh lut dingu ahi.
Kei vang kipah jing jeng ing ting, Jacob Pathen vahchoi la kasah jing jeng ding ahi.
Mi giloute thahat na jouse kisuhei sohkeiya, Midih thahatna vang kichoi sang cheh ding ahi.
Judah gamsunga Pathen akihedoh jing jengin, Israel lah a jong amin agunche lheh jenge.
Achenna ding Salem’a akisadoh tan, Zion’a apansatna ding akisem joutai.
Pathenin thalpi chang Hungleng aojen jun jong chu aheh bong tan, Ompho abot eh tan, chemjam aheh bongin, Gal manchah ho asuse soh tai. Selah
Lal loupi tah kiti chu Nangma nahin, Tonsot’a umjing mol le lhang sanga jong loupijo nahi.
Alungthima kiletsah te chu mi thil achomuva konin akivo lhu gamtan, Alhulham gamtauvin ahi; Gal hang mihem jousen jong Akhut alam thei gam tapouve.
Vo Jacob Pathen, Nangman naphosal jeh-in, Sakol jouse le achunga toute alungthim beisoh tauve.
Ijeh-inem itileh Nangma chu tijat kichat um chungnung nahin, Nalung ahan tengle koi ham namasanga ding ngam ding?
Nangman vana konin thu nahin tanji tan, Leiset pumpi akichan, ading thip ji tan ahi;
Pathen thutan dinga ahung kipat doh a, Leiset’a bolgenthei thoh te huhhing ding agot tengle. Selah
Tahbeh mongin mihem lung hanna chun Nangma vahchoiyin tin, Lung hanna amoh chengse chu Nangman nataiya nakigah ding ahi.
Pakai, na-Pathen uvah kitepna neiyuvin lang, Chule tong molsouvin; Akimvela cheng jousen Pathen chu thilpeh ding hinchoipeh hen lang, Gin ding ja ding Pa chu pesoh keiyu hen;
Leng chapate hinna lhagao suhei jia, Leiset leng jouse dinga jong gin le ja umtah chu Pathen bou ahi.
Pathenin kataona ajah tei tei nading tin, Oging tah tah-in Pathen henga katao jin ahi.
Kagim nikhon Pakai chu kahol jin, Janteng jongle khut kham louhel’in ama jeng kasang sang jie; Kalhagao la lhep bi mo helin, Aum jin ahiye.
Pathen kageldoh teng le Na kasa behseh jin katao taoji tai; Kaki-ngaito toji leh Kalhagao acholjin ahi. Selah
Kamit la kising theiyin nalha tapon, Neibol gim behseh tan thu jong kasei thei tapoi.
Khanglui lai umchan ka-ngaito le, Kum masa laipeh kageldoh jie.
Jan tengle kalungthim in kakihou lim lim jin, Kaki-ngaito ton kahinkho umdol kagel jie;
“Pakaiyin aitih geiya jong akeng monga eipeh mangjing ding hita a, Eikhohsah kit louhel ding hitam?
Pakai lungsetna longlou jong chu Atonsot geiya dinga beiya hitam? Aphat jousea dinga Athutep ho chu akichaisoh hitam?
Pathenin alungset ding chu asuhmil hitaa, Alungsat’a kona eilainatpi na chengse jong asuh bei hitam?” kati. Selah
Chule “Hat chungnung Pathenin akhut jetlam natoh akhel hi Kei dinga gimna len tah ahitai,” tin kaseiye.
Keiman kalunggil tah-in Pakai thilbol kidang ho chu geldoh ing ting, Ahiye, Nangma thilbol masa chengse jong Gel doh tang kate.
Nathilbol abonchan ngai tong ting Thil kidang nabol chengse gelkhoh-in nei tange.
Vo Pathen, Nangma lampi chu athengin ahi, Eiho Pathen banga loupi chu itobang pathen umam?
Thil kidang tah tah boldoh chu Nangma nahin, Mitin vaipi lah a thahat phongdoh ji Nangma nahiye.
Naban thahat’in namite, Jacob le Joseph chate chu nalhatdoh tai. Selah
Twipin nangma namu phat’in Vo Pathen, Twipin Nangma namu phat’uvin, akichauvin, li thuh tah jong akidil soh tauve.
Meilhang jousen gotwi ahinjuh sah tan, Vanthamjola van ahung ging lul lul tai; Hiche tah chun jetle vaiya konin Nangma thalpi kolphen ahung kikap-lah lah jengin ahi.
Navanpi gin chu chimpeiyin ahung kipeitan, Nakolphet chun leiset pumpi asalvah sohheltai; Leiset la akilingsoh heltan, Akihot ngut ngut jeng tan ahi.
Twikhanglen lailunga Nalampi akigol jin, Twipi lah a jong nalamlen aki lhungdoh jitai; Ahivangin la nakeng khoni chuhna Koima chan amudoh theipoi.
Nangman Mose le Aaron khut’in, Namite kelngoihon bangin nahin puidoh tai.
Ngaiyuvin Vo kamite, Keiman kahilnau hi; Kakamsung soh thucheng ho ngainan nakol hinsung uvin!
Keima thulem seinan kam kang ting, Khanglui laiya kisei tijat umtah tah thu jeng kasei ding,
I-pateuvin eiseipeh-uva eihonjong ihetsau, Hiche thuho chu kasei ding ahi.
Acha anaote henga eihon seipeh louva ikoi lou dingu ahi, Ahung ding khang mite henga iseipeh joh dingu ahibouve; Pakai thilbol loupi tah le athahatna. Atohdohsa thil kidang tah aboldoh chu.
Jacob khangin kitepna aphutdoh-in, Israel lah a danthu a tung doh tai; Hiche danthu chu ipateu anapeh ahin, Achateu ahil dinguva anapeh ahiye.
Chutia chu khang nukhah jon Hiche ho chu ahet’a. Tua peng doh loulai chengsen jong Ahung penlhah teng aban bana achateu ahil theina dingu ahi.
Amahon jong Pathen a kinepna aneiyuva, Pathen thilbol sumil louva, athupeh jouse anitna dingu ahi:
Chujongle apateu banga chon loudiu, Lungtah-uva, Akaleh a chon khang mite hi loudiu, A lung sunga lungset long lou neiloute, Pathen’a kitahna bei Khang mite hilou ding ahiuve.
Ephraim mite chun thalpi akipat cheh vanguvin, Gal kisat nikhon anung jamsoh tauve.
Amahon Pathen thutep jong anit pouvin, Adanthu dungjuiya chon ding jong adei pouvin ahi.
Pathenin amaho anavetsah sa thil kidang jouse jong, Chule athilbol abonchan asumil soh keitauve.
Egypt gamsung le Zo’an phaiya, Pathenin apateu mitmu tah-in thil kidang dang tamtah anabolin ahi.
Aman twikhanglen jong ating tanin, Alailunga amaho agalkaisah-in. Twipi jong chu Alhuhlhuh-in akisonden sah jenge.
Sun laile meilhangin apuile jin, Jan khovah vah-in meikong vah tahin apuile jin ahi.
Pathenin gamthip noiya Songpi ho jong apoh khit sah jengin, Lilai tolang peh a hung long doh bangin, Amaho chu achimset’in twi adonsah jin ahi.
Songpia kon chun twikai ahin londoh sahjin, Twi hochu vadung lon bangin alonsah jeng jin ahi.
Ahivangin la Pathen dounan Amaho achonse cheh achonse cheh jenguvin, Nelgama jong chun Hatchung nung Pathen dounan Thil aboluvin ahi.
Alungthim sunguva Pathen apatep’un, Akel lung changuvin an neh ding athum uvin ahi.
Pathen dounan thu aseiyuvin, “Gamthip noiya hi Pathenin bukong eiluipeh thei mong dingu ham?
Aman songpi avoh le twi ahung longdoh in, vadung bangin alongtan, Amite hi bu le sa jong apethei dem?” atiuve.
Hiche hi Pakaiyin ajah doh phat’in alung ahang lheh jeng tan, Jacob halvam dingin meikou ahung deojal tai: Israel dounan jong Alung hanna ahung deojah jenge.
Ajeh chu amahon Pathen tahsanna aneipouvin, Amihuhhingna thahat jong asong jou pouvin ahi.
Ahin Pathenin vanthamjol thu apen, Vankot jouse jong ahong doh-in;
Aneh dinguvin achunguva manna Goju bangin ahinjuh sah tan, Hiti chun van gam anchang chu aneh dinguvin ahin petai.
Mihemin vantilte buneh chu aneuvin, Pathenin amaho dingin neh le chah thalhingset’in apetai.
Aman vanlam ngan solam khohui anunsah-in, Chule athahat sanin lhanglam khohui ahin nunsah tai;
Achunguva neh thei sa vutdi jat goju bangin ahin lhah sah-in, Vacha lhanei twikhanglen kama neldi jat ahinsol lhai;
Abonchan angahmun lailung tah-uva ahinseplhan, Aumnau kimvel dung jousea jong adimhel jengin ahi.
Hichun amahon aneuvin avaset tauve: Ajeh chu Pathenin athumjat sanga jong tamjo ahinpeh ahi.
Ahinla agilkelu achim masang chun, Aneh-u jong akamsunguva aum nalaiyin,
Pathen achunguva ahung lung hangin, Alah-uva ahat lai jouse a that gamtai, Israel lah a lhentum thahat jouse Asu nemsoh keitan ahi.
Hichan gei jong chun amaho achonse nalai laiyuvin ahi, Pathen thilbol kidang dang ho jong atahsan deh pouve.
Hijeh chun Pathenin ahinkhou hai khat kah louvin abeisah tan, Ahin kumkhou jong tijatna jeng dimset’in aumsah tai.
Pathenin amaho athagam tengle, Ama ahol jiuvin; Alung akhel jiuvin, lung lut tah-in Pathen lam ahol jiuve.
Pathen bou asongpiu ahi, ti ageldoh jiuvin, Hat chungnung Pathen amaho dingin Alhatdampu ahi, ti ahejiuve.
Ahinla akamu analsah leuvin, Akoma thujou seinan aleiyu jong kipeh pelin alhauvin ahi.
Alungthimu la Pathen lama dettah-in aki-ngaipon, Pathen thutep’a jong alolhing deh pouvin ahi.
Hijongle Pathen chu mi lainatpi tah ahijeh-in, Athemmo nau angaidamin, asumang tapoi; Alung hanna jousea jong akilungdam ji jin, Alungsa changmel poi.
Tahsa mihem bou ahiuve, ti ahe jingin, Khohui ahung nunle chepai paiya hung nungkit talou bep ahiuve, ti ahei.
Gamthip noiya chu ijatvei mong mong Pathen douna chonse hitau vam Chule nelgama jong chu Itobang tah a Pathen asuhgimu hitam;
Avel velin Pathen chu apatep jiuvin, Israel Pathen theng chu aphin lung hang jinguvin ahi.
Athaneina chu alung giluvin la aching deh pouvin, Akidoupi teuva kona ahungdoh nikho jong chu chinkhoh-in aneipouve.
Egypt gama melchihna tampi abola, Phaichama thil kidang abol jong chu aching deh pouve.
Aman vadung jouse thisan asosah a, Amahon donding ahet louvu jong chu ahetapouvin ahi.
Pathenin amaho lah a thousi vaibong alansah a, Uphoh te alhah sah a, aneh gamhelu jong ahepouve.
Achang jouseu khongbai aneh gamsah in, Alousoh jouseu jong khaokhopi aneh gamsah tai.
Alengpithei jouseu gel avoh lhahsah soh keiyin, Atheipi phung jouseu jong daibang athagam sah tai.
Agancha jouseu la gel akheh lih sah soh tan, Akelngoihon jouseu jong keh alhah lih sah soh tai.
Achunguva nasatah-in alung hangin, Alungsatna, alung dammona, alung himona, Mi sumang Vantil hon tamtah Alha khum tan ahi.
Pathenin alung hanna lampi asemdoh tan, khatbeh jong ahing hoipoi. Hiti chun ahinkho jouseu jong manthahna apedoh soh keitan ahi.
Pathenin Egypt mite cha masa chengse athat gamsoh keiyin, Ham ponbuh sunga peng masa, athahatna chengse chu asugamtai.
Chujouvin amite chu kelngoi bangin ahin puidoh tan, Gamthip noiya keingoihon bangin alamkaile lei.
Mong tah-in apuilen, hijeh chun amahon kichatna aneipouve; Chujongle twikhanglenin agalteu alhoh mang peh gamtai.
Amaho chu Pathenin agamtheng abanjet’a atundoh Molsang vuma chun ahin puilut tai.
Amaho masanga namtin vaipi adelmang peh soh keiyin, Abonchauvin achan dingu gam ahoppeh cheh-in, Israel phung namtin abonchauvin, Ama ama ponbuh cheh a achensah tai.
Ahivangin amahon Hat chungnung Pathen dounan thil abol jinguvin, Athupeh ho khat cha jong anit peh pouvin ahi;
Apu apateu bangin avah manguvin jou jengin na atonguvin ahi, Thalpi kung kiveichal bangin, thujou alep lep’in aseiyuve.
Ajeh chu munsang tampi asemdohuvin, Pathen alung hansah tauve: Milim kilhajol asemuvin, Pathen athangset sah tauvin ahi.
Pathenin ajah doh phat’in, hatah-in alung hangin, Israel chu pumpaiya apaimang ahitai.
Pathenin Shiloh achenna mun adalhan, Mihemte lah a aumna ponbuh chu adalhatai;
Hichea athaneina chu soh chang dingin asoltan, Aloupina jong chu akidoupite khut’a apedoh tai.
Amite jong chemjama lou dingin apedoh soh tan, Agoulo amite chunga alungsatna aphongdoh tai.
Agollhang jouseu la meikongin ahalvam gamsoh tan, Anu-ngah chengseuvin jong kichenpia lasahpi ding anei tapouve.
Athempu jouseu chemjama alousoh tan, Ameithaiho jenguvin jong aka pouve.
Hichun aimutna kona hung thoudoh bangin Pakai ahung kipatdoh-in, Lengpitwi thuma hung kisen, Pasal thahat tah bangin kisen tai.
Amelma abonchan anocheh soh helin, Atonsot geiya dingin jachatna achuhsah tai.
Joseph ponbuh jong apaidoh tan, Ephraim phung jong alheng deh tapoi.
Ahin Judah phung joh alhengin, Aman angailut jing Zion molsang chu akolchah jing tai.
Van chung sangtah bangle aitih a dinga semsa leiset bang hin, Pathenin Ama dingin muntheng akisemtai.
Aman asohpa David akilhendoh-in, Kelngoi ahonga kikaidoh bangin, mi, hon lah a konin apuidoh tai.
Kelngoipi noukaiho achin laiyin, Amite Jacob chate, agoulo Israelte Kelngoi chin banga chin sah dingin, David chu anakoudoh tan ahi.
David’in amaho chu lungthim dih tah, Khut themtah-in alamkai jingin ahi.
Vo Pathen, mitheng lou chidang namdang ho Nagoulo nakhopi sunga ahung lut tauve, Na-houin theng jong asuboh uvin, Jerusalem asumang tauvin ahi.
Nasoh te tahsaphe jouse la chungaleng vachate apetauvin. Namithengte tahsa phe jong leiset gamsa ho apetauvin ahi.
Athisanu la Jerusalem khovela twisih bangin asung lha lha jenguvin, Alongu jong avuiding koima aum poi.
Kaheng kakomteu dingin daichatvai le, Kakimvel uva dingho dingin kitot nopna bep’in ka-um tauve.
O Pakai, itih chan geiya nei lung han dingu hitam? Nathangset, nalungsatna chu meikong banga kong jing ding ham?
Nangma hephalou namtin vaipi chunga Nalung hanna bung lhajon, Namin phapoh louhel Lenggam ho chung joh a khun!
Ijeh-inem itileh amahon Jacob insung abah gamuvin, Akhosung jouse achom ngimhel tauve.
Kapu kapateu chonsetna chu keiho chunga aphu lahih helin, Kinloi tah-in nei lainatpi loiyuvin, kalhachom behseh tauve.
Vo Pathen, Eihuhhinguva namin loupinan neikithopiuvin, Nangma min jalin kachonsetnau ngaidamin lang neihuhdoh tauvin!
Ipi dinga namtin vaipi hin, “Israelte Pathen hoiba hitam?” atiu ham? Keiho mitmu tah-in namtin vaipi lah-a Nasohte thisan kibunglha phulahna neimusah-un.
Songkul sunga umho taona chu naangsunga lutsah-in lang, Thi dinga umsate chu nathahat’a konin hoidoh teiyin!
O Pakai, Nangma nadaichatvai nau Kaheng kakomte ajat sagi jenin len!
Chuteng nakelngoite keihon, Akhang khangin Nangma vahchoiyuving ting, Atonsot atonsot geiya Nangma jeng kathangvah jing dingu ahitai.
O hung kho ngai temin Israel kelngoi china ching Pathen, Joseph kelngoi hoiya hoile le pa!
Cherubim vahtah chunga chun, E’phraim le Benjamin Chule Manas’seh lam ngan Laltouna chunga natoutai. Hung thouvin, nathahat hin kengin, Keiho huhhing din hung loiyin!
Vo Pathen neithah semkit’uvin lang, Huhhing kachan theina diuvin Namaivah chun neisalvah-uvin.
Vo Pakai thaneipen Pathen, Itih chan geiya namite taona nalung han pi nahlai ding ham?
An neh peh ding khelin amit lhiuvin navah tan, Twidon khelin amit lhiu nadon chim sah tan ahi.
Hengle kom vetda din nei umsah-uvin, Kagalteuvin jong nuijat nopnan eineitauve.
Neithah semkit’uvin O thaneipen Pathen! Huhhing kachan thei nadiuvin namaivah chun neisalvah-uvin.
Egypt gama konin lengpi thing nahinpon hikoma naphut lut’in, Namtin nadel jamin hiche lengpi thing chu naphutjo tai.
Athing phuna dingin tol nalai bot bot’ in, Ajung thuh tah-in alut’in gam leiset alosoh tai.
Thinglim chun molsang jouse alesoh tan, Cedar sang tah ho jong abah hon akhunal soh tai.
Abah jouse twikhanglen geiyin ajamlut tauvin, Ajung ho jong vadung geiyin akikho lhapeh tauve.
Ibola thing phung tho naphet lhah a, Ajotpa atoh pha chanin aga akimoh lo lo jeng hitam?
Gamhing lah-a ngalchangin kinopsah nan aneitan, Gamlah alhale jousen kivah nan aneisoh tauve.
Hung kihei kit teiyin O thaneipen Pathen! Van’a konin hin galdot’in lang vetemin; Hiche lengpi phung hi hung vil tan.
Nangma tah-in nabanjet’a abul naphusa Nachapa dinga natundohsa hi,
Aphuh lhusoh heluvin, meiyin ahal lhasoh tauve; Naphosala konin na-angsunga mang thah jengu hen!
Nami dei vang chu nabanjet’in hin thamin Nadinga naphat tousah mihem chapa chu?
Chutile nanga kona kanung jamkit louhel dingu ahitai; Namina katao jing theina dinguvin hinna neipeuvin.
Vo Pakai thaneipen Pathen, neithah semkit’uvin lang, Huhhing kachan theina diuvin Namaivah chun neisalvah-uvin!
O choh dep’in ihatnau Pathen pachat la sauvin Kipah thanom tah-in Jacob Pathen henga kho samuvin!
La oging tah-in sauvin lang, khutbeh benguvin; Semjang kisai gin ngeile selangdah gin thouvin.
Lhathah jan le sumkon mut’uvin lang, Lhalih nikhoa golvah bol teng sumkon mut’uvin.
Ijeh-inem itileh hiche hi Israel dinga chondan thupeh ahin, Jacob Pathen thu gahsa ahi.
Egypt gama kona ahung doh chun, Aman Joseph koma hettohsah khat ana phutdoh tai. Keiman kahet chetlou Thu khat kajan;
“Keimam apohgih ka-ngai jangin, Akhut a jong thilgih hahsa kathamsah tapoi.
Nagimna kon neihin kouvin, Keiman kahuhdoh tai; Meivom lhangkhal kiheh chet chut lah a kahin hou jin, Mer’ibah twipi kinong lah a jong kapatep jin nahi. Selah
O ngaiyin kamite semphat ding kagot pet hin! Vo Israel kathu na-ngai tei ding hilou ham!
Nalah-uva midang ho pathen lim semthu um thei lou ding; Nang hon jong midang ho pathen lim semthu chibai naboh thei lou dingu ahi.
Keima Pakai na-Pathen kahin, Egypt gama kona nahin puidoh Pa chu kahi; Nangman nakam keh lenin, adimset’in nahin hetlut peh inge.
“Kamiten keima ogin ngai nahsah-in aneipon, Israel in jong khohsah dingin eigel pouve.
Hijeh chun Keiman alungthimu katahsah gamin, Amaho lung lam lamin achonjo tauvin ahi.
Ohe kamiten, kathu angaiyu hihen, Israelte kalampia che jing leh!
Keiman baikhen cha agalteu kasuh nema, Akidoupi teu chunga kakhut kalap ding ahitai.
Pakai hotbola neite chu Ama henga hung kun cheh ding, Athohna dingu jong phat kichaitih um louhel ding ahi.
Keiman sakolchang tuipen a kavah-uva, Chule songpia kona hung longdoh khoiju chu Nakhamset’a kadonsah ding nahi,” ati.
Pathen chu a-Pathen thupi kiseina atoutan; Pathen te lailunga thutanin apangin,
“Itih chan geiya thujouva thu natan dinga hiya, Chule lang neina neiya agilou jeng nabol dingu ham? Selah.
Tahlelte leh chagate chu adih-in boluvin lang, Bol gentheina thohte leh lengvaite dihna chu phondoh peh-uvin.
Tahlelte leh neiloute chu lhatdoh-uvin, Migiloute khut’a konin huhdoh-un” ati.
Amahon hejong ahepouvin, Photchen dingin jong agodeh pouve; Muthim lah jenga avahle leuvin, Leiset ki-ngapna abulpi abonchan ahot lingsoh tauve.
Keiman najah-uva kasei ahi, “Nangho pathente nahiuvin, Nabonchauva Chungnungpen chate nahiuve;
Hijongle thou louhela mihem thi banga nathi cheh dingu, Leng chapa khat thi banga nadin lhuh cheh dingu ahi.” ati.
O Pathen, hung thouvin lang leiset thupi hung tanin, Ajeh chu namtin vaipi hi Nanga jeng ahibouve!
Vo Pathen, umthim loujenin, Ngaisah louvin koiyin lang, lungmong tah-in um hih helin.
Ajeh chu vetan, nakidoupi ho ahon honin akilom jenguvin, Nangma nahotbolte chu ahung dahdoh soh tauvin ahi.
Ahon honin akikhomuvin Nangma douna dingin akihou houvuvin, Namite douna ding jeng akihoulim tauve.
“Hunguvin, hiche nam mite hi sumangu hi tin, Israel min kiti kiphah poh kit da hel hen,” atiuve.
Ahi, kitoh tah le lung khat tah-in akihou lhiuvin, Nangma douna din kitepna asemtauve.
Ponbuh a cheng jouse, Edom ahin, Ish’mael mite, Moab mite, Hagar mite ahiuvin,
Gebal ahin, Ammon, Am’alek, Philistine ho ahiuvin, Tyre mite ahin.
Assyria jengjong apangtan; Lot chilhah gal hattah ho chu amaho hi ahiuve. Selah
Mid’ian mite nabolna bang chun amaho jong hi bol jengin, Kishon vadunga Sis’era leh Jabin,
En-dor muna kithat teni, Tolgoa eh le jun kiso teni bang chun.
Oreb le Zeeb nabolna bang chun amilalteu bolin lang, Aleng chapateu abonchan, Zebah le Zalmun’na banga
“Pathen pa hamhing lai abonchan, Eihon losoh keiyu hite,” tia seiho chu sumangin!
Vo ka Pathen, abonchauvin chimpeiyin leivui apei bangle, Khohui masanga changvai kisunglha bahsah jengin.
Gamgo lah meiyin akah a, Molvuma akong hung kikhodoh jen jun jeng bangu hen.
Hiti chun nakhopi huiyin anung nungu delin lang, Nangma gose ju chun kichatsah soh keiyin.
Na min ahin holdoh theina dinguvin, Amaiyu jumle ja dimset sah jengin Pakai.
Abonchauvin jumso soh keiyin lang Aitih chanin kiphalam jingu hen Jachat le lhaset’in Mangthah hel jengu hen,
Hiti chun Nangma bou nahi, Amin Pakai kiti Pa chu Leiset pumpi chunga jong Chungnungpen nahi, ti heu hen.
Vo thaneipen Pakai, Nangma chenna in chu itobanga ngaichat umah hitam!
Kalhagaovin alha ngai jingin aleng vaitai, Pakai chenna inpi chu; Pakai hing jing henga chun kalhagao le katahsa hin Kipah thanomin kipa la asai.
Vatou jengin jong in akimun, Pelpalep’in jong anou opna ding bu akisem theiyin ahi Nangma maicham phunga chun, O thaneipen Pakai; Kalengpa le ka Pathen!
Nangma ina chengte chu anun nom ahiuve, Tang louva navahchoi la sa jing jengte chu! Selah
Athahatna Nanga kisongte chu anun nom ahiuve, Alung sunguva Zion jotna lamlen akilhungin ahi.
Baca phaicham ajot tengu jongle, Twisam putna twinah tampi umna bangin abolun, Gotwi hunglha masapenin jong Twikul tampi ahin semdoh peh jiuve.
Thahat cheh thahat cheh-in akijot’-uvin, Ziona pathen jouse Pathen hung kilah ding ahi.
O Pakai thaneipen Pathen, kataona ngaiyin lang; Hung kho-ngai temin O Jacob Pathen!
Vo Pathen, kalummu hi vetemin; Chule nathaonu pa maichang hinven!

Ijeh-inem itileh nikhatseh hijongle nangma inpia um ding hi Mun danga nikho sang khat suhmang sanga phajo nalai ahin; Hijeh chun gitlouna ponbuh sunga chen ding sangin, Ka-Pathen inpi kotngah a pan ding kanomjoi.
Ajeh chu Pakai hi Nichang le lum ahin, Hepina le jabolna mi ahompeh jin; Adih a lamjotte dingin, Thilpha imacha aitpeh aumpoi.
O thaneipen Pakai, Nanga ki-ngai mihem chu anun nome.
Pakai, Nagam dinga hepina neijing nahin, Jacob hamphatna jouse jong nasemphat peh jing ahime.
Nangman namite chonset napoh mangpeh jin, Achonset jouseu abonchan na-ngaidamsoh jin ahi. Selah
Nalunghan na jousea jong nalung damjin, Nalungsatna konin nalung naheiji nan ahi.
O eihuhhinguva Pathen, neithah semkit tauvin, Kachunguva nalung himona abonchan paidoh tan!
Atonsot kumkhoa neilung han jing dingu hita a, Akhang khanga neilungsat khum jing dingu hitam?
Namite hi Nachunga akipana dinguva, Neithah semkit’uva neicho hing lou dingu hitam!
O Pakai nalungset longlou nei musah uvin lang, Nami-huhhingna keiho neipeuvin.
Neijahsah temin Pakai Pathenin ipi asei ding ham, Amite le amithengte alung giltah-uva Ama heng lama hung kile kitte henga Aman chamna thu ahinsei ding ahi.
Dihtah mongin amihuhhingna Ama gingte kom ahung geitai, Chutengle igamsunguva loupina cheng thei ding ahi.
Khotona le kitahna kilamto lhonin tin, Adih le chamna kibengchop lhon ding;
Leiset’a konin kitahna hung kehdoh intin, Vanlaijol’a kona adih-in ahinvet ding ahi.
Ahi, Pakaiyin thilpha eihin peuvin tin, Igam gaujong hung pungjal ding;
Amasanga adih lamsat’in pangin tin, Akalsena ding lampi ahung sempeh ding ahiye.
O Pakai, kho-ngaiyin lang neidonbut teiyin, Ajeh chu genthei tah le lhasam tah-in kaume.
Neihong jingin, keiman Pathen kaging jinge: Nanga ki-ngai jing nalhacha kei neihuhhingin.
Nei lungset’in O ka-Pakai, nang kaPathen nahi; Ajeh chu nilhum hela Nangma jeng kamin phah phah nahi.
Nalhacha hinkho kipa thanop sah-in, Ijeh-inem itileh kahinkho nang din kapetai.
O Pakai phapen mi ngaidamji; Nangma min phah jouse dia hepina thalhingset nahiye.
Kataona ngaiyin lang O Pakai, Thil kathum teng ka-ogin ngaiyin.
Nangman neihouji jeh-in, Kagimni leh Nang jeng kakou koujie.
O Pakai, nangto tethei pathen dang aumpon, Nathilbol tobanga thil kibol jong aumpoi;
Vo Pakai nasemsa namtin vaipi hunguva Na-angsunga kun cheh-uva namin achoi-at diu ahi.
Ajeh chu nangma naloupin thil kidang dang naboljie, Nachangseh a Nangbou Pathen nahi.
O Pakai nalampi neihil jingin, Lamdih kajot jing theiya Namin kagin jing theina din Lung khatseh neiput sah-in.
O Pakai ka-Pathen kalungthim pumpin Nangma kathangvah-e. Tonsot’a namin ka-choiat ding ahi.
Ajeh chu keidin nalungset longlou anasan, Nangin noimigam thuh tah a konin ka-lhagao nahuhdoh tai.
Vo Pathen mi kiletsah ten eidel khum tauve. Hepina neilou hon tha din eihol’uvin, Amasanguva jong Nangma umna lam ahepha pouve.
Hijongle Pakai nangma mi hepi them Pathen nahin, Lung hang vahlou lungset longlou neiya kitahtah nahi.
Kahenga hung kiheiyin lang neilai natpin, Nalhacha hi tha neipen, nasohnu chapa neihuh hingin.
Neilung lhai phot chetna neimusah-in, Chutileh eihot bolten mu’vin tin jahcha diu, Hitobanga hi nangman Neikithopia neilha monji ahiye.
Lhang theng chunga chun, Akhopi phudoh ading jingin;
Zion kulpi kelkot ho chu Pakaiyin, Jacob chenmun dang jouse sangin jong akhohsah joi.
Vo Pathen khopi, Nachunga thil loupi tah tah akiseitai. Selah
Keima eihe ho lah a chun Rahab le Babylon kageldoh-e, Vetan Philistia le Tyre chule Ethiopia ahiuvin; “Hiche hi hikoma hung pengdoh ahi,” Tin aseiyuve.
Chule Zion chung chang thudol hitia kisei ding ahi, “Hiche jong khuche jong akhopi sunga pengdoh cheh ahi,” kiti ding; Ijeh-inem itileh Hat chungnung Amatah chun Khopi hi asah doh ding ahinalaiye.
Pakaiyin mipi jat asuttoh jing bang chun ajat asimtoh jingin, “Hiche vang hi hikoma khu pengdoh ahi,” ati. Selah
Lathemho leh lamthemhon kitoh del’in, Kahinna twinah Nanga umah ahi,” atiuve.
O Pakai ka-Pathen, sunlai injong panpi ding kasam samin, A jan janin nahenga katao taove;
Na-angsunga kataona hunglhung tei hen lang, Ka ogin neijah peh tei teiyin!
Ajeh chu kalhagao genthei nan achup tan; Kahinkho jong noimi gamaleng lhapai ding ahitai.
Lhan sunga kipulutsa ho bang bangin eikingaiton, Keima mihem thabeisa kahibouve.
Mithi lah a kidalhaa don louva kikoi bangle, Thasaa lhankhuh sunga kijamsa tobangin kaumin; Nakhut’a kona kisat lhaa Nagel phah kit louhel ho bangin kaumdoh tai.
Nangman lhan kochong sunga neikoiyin, Kotong muthim jing lah a neikoitai.
Kachunga nalungsat agihsa behseh jengin, Natwipi kidil chun eichup tauve. Selah
Kakoma konin kaloi kagol jouse najamsah soh tan, Eikidah-uva eitijatpi diuvin neisemdoh tai. Eikikul khup den ahitan Ajamdoh joulou kahitai.
Kalung gim behseh-in kamit athimlon, O Pakai niseh le nang kakouvin kakhut’in nang kasang jie.
Thil kidang nabol ho chu mithisa ho ding himonga Thilong damsa hung thouva navahchoi mong nam? Selah
Lhankhuh sunga nalungset longlou kiphonga, Manthahna gama nakitahna kisei choile nam?
Muthim gama thil kidang nabol ho ahet’uva, Ihmut milna gama nahuhhingna ahet nah-uvam?
O Pakai, nahenga katao taovin, Jingkah teng nahenga kataona ahung lut jinge.
O Pakai, idia neidon lou hitam! I bola neivetda kihei mang nahim?
Kaneocha lhah gim genthei kathoh-in Thi ding konchan kaum jinge; Nathil bol tijat jat um jouse kathoh khan A pang joulou mong mong kahitai.
Nalungsat chun twichup bangin eichup tan, Neihohsal salnaa athipai ding kahitai.
Hichengpi hin twisoh bangin nilhum lhumin eichup tan, Kakimvel adimset’in eium chahsoh tauve.
Eilungset gol le pai la najamsah soh tan, Kaloi kagol jouse jong muthim lah ageitauve.
O Pakai, tonsot geiyin nalungset longlou lan sange, Akhang khanga nakitahna kakama kaphonjal ding ahi.
Ajeh chu nalungset longlou tonsot’a dia phudetsa ahin. Nakitahna jong van banga dettah a kidal ahi.
Nangin, “Kalhenchom chutoh kitepna kasemin, Kalhacha David henga kakihahsel’in:
Tonsot’a dia nason nachilhah kaphudet ding, Akhang khanga dia laltouna kadopeh ding nahi,’ tin,” naseiye. Selah
Vo Pakai, thil kidang nabol ho hi Vanin jong vahchoi hen, Nakitahna hi mithengte khoppia vahchoiyin um hen!
Ajeh chu Pakaito tethei vamthamjol’a um koiham? Van mite lah a koiham Pakaito tethei!
Mithengte kikhopna a ginpen Pathen, Akimvela touho jouse sanga loupi le gin pen hi lou ham?
Vo thaneipen Pakai, Nang banga thanei koiham Pakai? Nakitah nan pal kikai kimvel bangin navelsoh-e.
Twikhanglen kidil chunga vai nahomin, Twipi akidil tengleh naphoh thipjie.
Rahab jong naheh gep jengin, Naban thahat’in nagalte naleh thang jenge.
Van la nanga ahin, leiset jong nanga ahi; Vannoi leiset le asunga um jouse naphudohsa ahiuve.
Sah lam, lhanglam aboncha nasemsa ahin, Tabor le Hermon molsang te nin kipah-in namin avah choilhone.
Naban-gol gap tah ahin, nakhut tha ahamin Nakhut jetlam akitah sang veng vunge.
Adih le adih-a thutanna chunga nalaltouna akidon, Namasang sanga lungset longlou le kitahna alamkaiye.
O Pakai, namaivah a vah lea Golvah ogin hethemho chu anun nom ahiuve.
Amaho chu nilhumlhumin naminin akichoi-anun, Nadihnaa akichoi sanguve.
Ajeh chu athahat loupi nau Nang nahin, Nalung lhaijeh-in kakiu akichoi sang tai.
QAjeh chu kalumu jong Pakaiya um ahin, Kalengpau jong Israel Mithengpa koma cheng ahi.
Khang luilaiyin Themgao mu neinaa thu naseiyin, Nadinga kitah pa koma hi tin naseiye: “Keiman thahatpa panpina kaneiyin, Mipi lah a kilhengdohpa kachoi sange.
Kalhacha David kamudoh phat’in, Kathao theng chu ama kanutai;
Hitia chu kakhut’a katuh jing jeng theiya Kaban-gol tha kapeh jing theina dingin.
David chu galten jong asuh mang lou ding,
Amasanga agalte kasuh gep’a, Avetda aumjongle kavohlhuh ding ahi.
Kakitahna le kalungset longlou toh kilhon jing in tin, Kei mina aki jong kichoi sangpeh ding ahiye.
Akhut’a Twikhanglen kathamsah a Akhut jetlam a vadung jouse kalonsah ding ahi.
Kahenga hung taova, ‘Nangma ka-Pa, ka-Pathen Eihuhhing kasongpi nahi.’ ati ding ahi.
Keiman kachapa peng masapena kasem ding, Leiset leng jouse sanga chungnung pena kakoi ding ahi.
Tonsot’a longlouva kalungset jing ding, Kakitepnan lhakang louva adinpi ding ahi.
Aitih chan geiya achilhah aguiya peng kahoi jing ding. Alaltouna jong Van mite nikholai banga um ding ahi.
Ason achilhah-in kadanthu asuhmil’a Kachondan banga achon hih-uva,
Kachonna dan jouse asuh keh-uva Kathupeh chengse anit louvu leh.
Asuh khelnau talen kapeh a mol’a kajep ding. Athemmo jeh-uva sakol jepna kajep diu ahi.
Ahivanga kalungset longlou kalahpeh deh lou ding, Kakitahnaa kalep bol lou ding ahiye.
Keiman kakitepna sukeh pong ting, Kakamsung sohsa kathusei jong khel ponge.
Kathenna pana khatvei kakihahsel chu a-itih a ding ahin, David koma kajou seiponge.
Ason achilhah tonsot geiya um jinga Kamaiya Nisa umlaisea alaltouna kido jing ding ahi.
Lha banga a-itih a kikoi jing ding, Van akidal laisea longlou ding ahi,” nati. Selah
Tunla napaidoh-in nadon tapon, Nathaonu lengpa chunga nalung hang lhehjenge.
Nalhachapa toh nakitepna donlouvin nakoiyin, Alal lukhuh jong vutbol lah a nakaibol le lei.
Apal jouse jong naphet vangsoh tan, Akulpi abonchan asesa agemsan nakoitai.
Ajotpa jousen adei agot akichom’un, Aheng akom houset din na umsah tai.
Akidoupite ban jetlam nachoi sangin, Amelmate abonchan nakipasah sah jenge.
Achemjam jong akaleh akinlamin nasatsah jin, Galmuna pang jouvin nalhapoi.
Akhut’a atenggol nasa lhah peh-in, Alaltouna tolse nan naneitai.
Gollhang manin jong nalhapon, Jum le ja nathohsah sah jengin ahi. Selah
O Pakai, itih geiya nakisel sel jeng ding ham? Itih geiya nalungsat meikou banga kong ding ham?
O Pakai, hinkho ichana sao ham, geldoh-in, Ipi dia pannabeiya mihem chapate nasem ham!
Itobang mihem chu thina mukha louva hinga? Koipenin noimigam tha neina alhagao ahuhdoh ding ham?
Pakai, khanglui laiya nalungset long lou hoiya um tam? Nakitahna David koma nakihahselna hoilam gei tam?
O Pakai, nalhachapa kihousetna hingeldoh temin, Mipi housetna itobanga ka-oisunga kako ko jeng ham!
O Pakai, namelmaten hicheng hin eihou seuvin, Hicheng hin nathaonu lengpa akiheina lam lama totnan aneitauve.
Pakai chu tonsot tonsot’in nun nom hen, Amen hihen Amen!
Pakai akhang khanga kakiselnau mun Nangma jeng bou nahijing e.
Molsang jouse kitundoh masang, Leiset le vannoi pumpi nasemdoh masanga jong, Tonsot tonsot geiya Nangma Pathen nahi jing jenge.
Nangin mihem hi leivui nanung hisah jin, “Vo mihem chate, leivui soh kit tauvin,” natijie.
Ajeh chu nang mitmua kum sang khat jong hi abei teng Jan hi bep bou, jan khovah kah bep bou ahijie.
Mihemte natheh mang tengleh jan mang bep ahiuvin, Jingkah daitwiyin achapnouji hamhing bep ahibouve.
Jingkah tengleh anouthah jin akile kit’ in, Nilhah lam teng anangin agopji tai.
Ajeh chu nalunghan hin eithagam u ahitan, Nalungsat chun eichup gamu ahitai.
Kathemmo nau namaiya natah jingin, Guhthima kachonset nau namaivah a natah lang tai.
Ijeh-inem itileh kahinkhouvin nalungsat jeng katoh khauvin, Kahinkhou kum jong akiphasam jin abeiji tai.
Kahinkhou kum som sagi bep bou ahin, Adamthei tah jong kum somget bou ahingjie; Hiche hinkho chomcha sung jong hi tohgim gentheina adimin, Acheloi loiyin, kaleng mangji tauve.
Nalunghan tha neije koiham agelkhoh a, Naginga nalungsat khohje gelkhoh a koi ham?
Hijeh chun chihna lungthim kavop’uva Kahinkhou nijat kasim theina diu neihil’un.
Itih chan kho-ngai ding nahim, hung kile tan Pakai, Nalhachate chunga hung lainan!
Jingkah teng longlouvin neilungset’un Lung nachimin neilhauvin, Chutileh kahinkho lhumkeiyun Kipah thanom jing tauvinge.
Neibol gimna jatma mauvin nei kipasah-uvin, Thilse katokhah kumjat’u chu neikipasah kit’un.
Natohna chu nalhachate koma kiphonsah-in, Nathahat loupi chu achateu henga kiphonsah tan.
Kachunguva Pakai ka-Pathenu lung lhai hen, Kakhutsoh-u jong kachunguva neitundoh peh-uvin; Henge, Pakai nangman Kakhutsoh thil’u hi tungdoh-in.
Chungnungpen kulsunga cheng jinga, Hatchungnung limdam noiya kisel chun
Pakai jah a, “Kakiselna le Kakulpi, Kaki-ngaina ka-Pathen,” ati ding ahi.
