Ajeh chu Pakaiyin thangkampa thanga kon leh Thina thei gamna hise langa jong nahuhdoh ding ahi.
Alhaving te nin nahuiyin tin, Alha teni noiya nakisel ding, Pakai kitahna chu lum le Konggah kamdetna pang ahi.
Jan muthima jong kichat tijat nanei lou ding, Sun laiya thalpi kikap jong nagin lou ding ahi.
Muthima gamna hise hung lang hihen, Sun laiya manthahna hunglhung hijongle nagin lou ding ahiye.
Najet naveiya mi asang sang dinlhuh hen, Najet lama sangsom thijong leh, nahinpha ponte.
Namit’a navet mai mai ding ahipon, Migilou chunga phulah chu namu mong mong ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai chu kiselnan naneiyin, Hatchungnung chu chen nan naneitai.
Nachunga thilse hunglhung lou ding, Hahsatnan jong naponbuh hinpha ponte.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Avantilte nang din til’in tin, Nakiheina lam lama na-nga jing diu ahinai.
Vantilten akhut’uvin nadomun tin, Songa nakipal louna din nadom khangun te.
Sakei le gulse jong napal jel jel’a, Sakei nou le gul nachil thang thang ding ahi.
Aman eingailut’a eikolchah jeh a kahuhdoh ding, Kamin ahetjeh a kahuh ding ahi.
Eihin kouteng kahou ding, Gim gentheina kaumpi ding, kahuhdoh a kachoi-at ding ahi.
Hinkho sot’a kahinsah a alungna kachimsah ding, Kami-huhhingna kamusah tei tei ding ahi.
O Chungnungpen, namin vahchoi la sah a, Pakai nangma thangvah ding hi thilpha ahi;
Jingkah teng nalungset longlou phondoh a, Jan teng nakitahna phondoh ding;
Theile gin le selangdah gin toh thoa Semjang gin ngeitoh tho ding thilpha ahi.
O Pakai nathilbol’in neikipasah-in, Nakhut’a natohdoh chunga kipah-in lakasai.
O Pakai, nanatoh itobanga nasa hita, Nalung gel itih thuh a thuh hitam!
Miphellou hetphah hoi ahipon, Mi-ngol hetkhen theidol jong ahipoi.
Ajeh chu migilou hamdong bangin hung dong hen, Thilse bolte phathei lheh jongleh, Abonchauva hi tonsot geiya Mangthah hel dia um ahibouvui.
Nang vang aitih a chungnung jing nahi Pakai,
O Pakai vetan namelmate khu, Vetan namelmate khu mangthah uva Aboncha kithe chehsoh hel diu ahi.
Nangin kaki gambong ki bangin nadoh sangin, Kachunga thaotwi thah neisun khume.
Kamelmate mansuh kamit te nin kamun, Agilouva eidelkhumte manna kanan kajatai.
Midih chu chahthing bangin anouvin, Lebanon lhanga cedar thing bangin akhang khange.
Midih ho chu Pakai insunga kiphutdet ahiuvin, I-Pathenu inpi lhonga nomtah-in ahingui.
Ateh nung geiyuvin jong thilpha asodoh-un, Thingna nou hinpha jing bangin aumui.
Hiche hi Pakai lungdih vetsahna Ama kasongpia apana achunga adihlou aumlouje vetsahna ahi.
Pakaiyin lengvai apon, lal loupinan akijeme; Pakaiyin lal loupi pon akisil’in thahat’ in kong akigah-e. Leiset jong akitungdoh ahitan Kibotkang kit louhel ding ahi.
Pakai nalaltouna khang lui laiya kitungdoh ahitan, Nangjong tonsot’a umjingsa nahiye.
O Pakai twisoh vanvuma alengin, Twisoh a-ongje jun, twisoh ataodem dumjenge.
Van kithina gotwi tamtah sangin ahatjon, Twikhanglen kidil sangin anasajoi, Chungnunga Pakai chu Thaneitah ahi jing jenge!
Pakai nathugah abonchan adih thei lheh jengin, O Pakai nahouin jong tonsot’a atheng dia kilomtah ahi.
O Pakai, phula them Pathen; Phula them Pathen, nangman salvah-in!
Vo leiset thutan Pathen hung thouvin, Mi kiletsahte chu achan diu lom chansah tan!
O Pakai migilou kiti hi itih chan uma, Itih chan geiya migilou kichoisang ding ham?
Kiletsah tah-in lhajeng jungin thu aseiyun, Thilse bolte aham hoitho cheh-uve.
O Pakai, namite achilngem ngemun, Nagoulo mite gim genthei thoh-in alhauve.
Meithai le kholjin athat’uvin, Palou chagate aphil’uve.
“Pakaiyin amu hih nai, Jacob Pathenin ahephapoi,” atiuve.
Vo mipi lah a mimo chungnung ho, hethemuvin; Mi-ngol ho, itih ba nachih diu ham?
Nakhang sempa chu khoja louva um theiya. Mit semdoh pa kho mutheilouva um ding ham?
Vaipi bolgimpan abolgim da thei ham? Hetna jouse mihem hilji Pa,
Pakai chun, mihem lunggel ahesoh keiyin, Ahinla haikhat kah thubou ahi, ti ahei.
O Pakai, nabolgim mi chu anun nom ahin, Nadanthu nahil thempa chu anun nom ahi.
Migilou lhankhuh kilai kah a Genthei nikhoa choldo napeh chu anun nom ahi.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin amite adalhah deh lou ding, Agoulo mite adonda lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh midih dia thudih umdoh teiding, Milungdih jousen thudih ajui cheh diu ahi.
Migiloute eidoupeh dia koi ding ngama, Thilse bolte eidoupeh dia koi pang ngamam?
Pakaiyin eipanpi lou hileh Kalhagao mithi gama cheng ding ahitai.
“Kakeng kachon naltai,” tia kagel teng, O Pakai, nalungset longlouvin eiphong dingjie.
Kalungthima kakhohsah atam behseh teng Neilha mon jin, neitil khou jie,
Vaihom giloute toh napankhom theiya, Mi lhep lhahna thei dan semthuho toh napan khom theiyam?
Midih douna din akikhom khomuvin, Mona beite chu athi din athu atanpeh jiuve.
Keidin Pakai chu kakulpin apangin, Ka-Pathen chu kakiselna songpin apange.
Pathenin athemmo nau achunguva anung lhut cheh ding, Agitlou jeh-uva aphet ngim hel’a Pakai i-Pathenuvin Aphet theng hel diu ahiye.
Hunguvo, Pakai vahchoi la saute; Eihuhhing isongpiu vahchoina kipa othongin saute!
Thangvah to thon a-anga lut’u hitin, A vahchoi la kipah othongin sau hite!
Ajeh chu Pakai hi Pathen loupitah ahin, Pathen dang jouse chunga Leng chang ahi.
Leiset laigil thuh lai jouse akhut laiya kiloh ahin, Molsang kikhang sang jouse jong ama a jeng ahi.
Asemsa ahijeh-in Twikhanglen jong ama a ahin, Leiset tolgo lai jong akhut’a agontohsa ahiye.
Hunguvo, boh khup’in chibai boh-u hi tin, Eisempau Pakai anga kun cheh-u hite!
Ajeh chu i-Pathenu ama ahin, Eiho avahsa amite, akhut’a akaile akelngoite ihiuve. Ijemtia tunia athusei ogin najah jengu leh,
Meribah muna naum chan banguvin Nalung tahsah hih hel‘uvin; Gamthip noi Massah a naum chan tho hih hel’un.
Hiche lai chun napu napateuvin eipatep’un, Kanatoh mutauva vetchet din eigouve.
Kum som li sungin hiche khang mite chu kaloh asoh hel’in, “Alunga thil dihlou gel, kachondan khohsah lou mite,” kati.
Hijeh a chu kacholdona lut lou diu ahi, tia Kalunghan pet’a kihahselsa kahitai.
Pakai vahchoina lathah hung sau-Leiset pumpin Pakai vahchoi la sacheh-un!
Pakai vahchoi la sauvin amin choianun, Niseh-in ahuhhingna thu sei choi leuvin.
Namtin vaipi lah a aloupina phongun, Chitin namtin lah a athilbol kidang tah tah phong leuvin!
Ajeh chu loupipena Pakai ahin, Minthang tah a vahchoi ding ahi; Lim semthu pathen dang jouse sanga Pakai bou gina jacheh ding ahiye.
Chitin namtin pathen kitiho hi milim kisemthu ahin, Pakai kitipa hi Van munjouse Sempa ahi.
Amaiya jabolna le lal loupina abeh jingin, Amunthenga thahat le mel-hoi adimset’e.
Vo chitin namtin phungtina min Pakai jabol cheh-un, Loupina le thahatna Pakai jeng peuvin!
Pakai chu achandia kilom amin loupina peuvin, Thilto choiyin ainpia hung lut’uvin!
Vonthengin kivonun Pakai chibai bohuvin, A-angsunga leiset pumpi kithing thingin umun!
Seipeh-un namtin vaipi jah a, “Pakaiyin lengvai apoi, Vannoi leiset akiphutdoh tan kibotkang kit ponte; Pakaiyin chitin namtin thu kitohtah a atanding ahi,” tin,
Van munjouse kipah hen, leiset thanom hen; Twikhanglen kithong hen, asunga cheng jouse chatsoh hen.
Loujao jong kithang-at hen, asunga keh jouse kithang-at hen; Chuteng gammang thing jousen kipa la asah diu ahi.
Pakai ahunge, amasanga hitia chu um ding ahi: Ajeh chu ama leiset thutan din ahunge. Aman Vannoi leiset thu adih a atan ding, Chitin namtin jong adihtah a abol ding ahi.
Pakaiyin lengvai apoi, leiset kipah hen: Twikhanglen kimvel gam mite kipah thanomu hen!
Pakai chu meilhangin atomin muthim lhangkhal akiheh-e. Alaltouna adih le thutah chunga kido ahi.
Akoma mei ahung kouvin Avel dunga akidoupiho ahalvam tai.
Keh alhahsah teng Vannoi pumpi asalvah jin, Leiset’in amudoh teng akihot lhul jie.
Pakai angsunga molsang jouse khoilu bangin ajolsoh tan, Leiset pumpi Pakai anga akiphamat soh tai.
Vanmun jousen Pakai dihna aphongun, Chitin namtinin aloupina amutauve.
Milimdoi hou jouse ajahchauvin Pannabei limsemthu houva hoitho ho ajum’uve: Pakai anga pathen dang jouse jong Aboh khup soh keiyun ahi.
Zion lhangin a jan akipah-e. O Pathen, nathutan hi Judah chanuten akipa piuve.
Ajeh chu Pakai leiset chungvuma kikhang nahin, Adang pathen ho sanga kichoi sang jing nahi.
Thilse hotbolte chu Pakaiyin angailun, Amithengte hinkho akhosah-in, migilou khut’a ahuhdoh jie.
Midih dingin kho ahung vah tan, Milungdih din kipana ahung lhunge.
Midih ho Pakaiya kipah-uvin, Amintheng thangvah cheh-uvin!
Pakai vahchoina lathah hung sauvin. A man thil kidangtah tah aboltai! Akhut jetlam leh aban-gol theng chun Pakai din gal ajopeh soh tai.
Pakaiyin agaljo mi ahetsah soh tan, Adih abol chu namtin vaipi mitmun aphong tai.
Israel insung dia alungset longlou le Akitahna ageldoh tai: Leiset kolkimvela min I-Pathenu galjo amusoh keitauve.
Leiset pumpin Pakaiya kipana ochoh je jun sam uvin, Kipa thanop la sauvin avahchoi la sauvin!
Semjang saigin to thon Pakai vahchoi la sauvin. O longdel’in semjang gin to thon sauvin’
Sumkon gin le saki mutgin to thon Lengpa Pakai anga kipa ochohje jun samuvin!
Twikhanglen kithong hen, asunga cheng jouse chat soh hen: Vannoi leiset thongsoh hen, asunga cheng jouse kilingsoh hen.
Twisoh kitolpi jong khutbeh kibeng bang hen. Thinglhang jousen kipah la sakhomu hen!
Pakai leiset vaihom din ahunge, Amasanga hiti chun thil jouse um cheh hen: Aman Vannoi leiset thu adih a atan ding, Chitin namtin jong adihtah a abol ding ahi.
Pakaiyin lengvai apoi, chitin namtin kitihot cheh hen; Cherub te chunga laltouna atouve, leiset kiling hen.
Pakai chu Zion a alaltai, Chutin namtin chunga choisangin aume.
Chitin namtin in ja umtah namin loupi vahchoiyu hen, Atheng chu Pakai amabou ahiye!
Leng Hatchungnung, adih bou deiyah; Kitoh toh-in naboljin, Jacob din Adih le akitah jeng nabole.
Pakai i-Pathenu choianun, Akhophangbula chibai boh-in, Amabou Atheng ahi!
Athempuho lah a Mose le Aaron jong akisim than, Amina taoho lah a Samuel jong apange; Athempuho ahenga atao tenguleh Pakaiyin atao nau asang jie.
Meilom in ahungin ahenguva thu ahung seiyin, Hettohsahna le chondan jouse amaho anapen, aching jingui.
O Pakai ka-Pathenu, nangin ataonau nasange; Amaho din ngaidam them Pathen nahin, Atoh khel abol khelu jong vang Aphu nala chih cheh ji nai.
Pakai i-Pathenu choianun, Alhang thenga chibai boh-un, Pakai i-Pathenu hi Atheng ahi.
Gamtin in Pakaiya kipa la ochoh Je jun sauvin,
Kipah tah-in Pakai kin bolun lang, la san aheng hin jonun!
Pakai kiti hi Pathen ahi, hethem un; Eisempau ama ahin; eiho ama a ihiuve. Amite ihiuvin kelngoi banga Ama anpha kivah ihiuve.
Thangvah pumin akelkot phunga hung lut’un, Vahchoi pumin ainpia hung lut’un, thangvah-un amin choianun.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai nunnem ahin, Alungset longlouvin a-itih-in athoh jingin; Akitahna chu akhang khangin aum jinge.
Nagunche le nathutan dihje ken lan sange, Vo Pakai keiman nahenga lan sange.
Keiman nolnabei lampi jui jinge. O itih tah le kahenga nahung ding ham? Ka-insunga jong Lungthim lhaso louhel’in pang nange.
Ipi thil hijongleh pannabei jouse chu Kamit muphahna koi ponge. Kipalna neisa miho thilbol kahoi, Hitobang hin eituh khah lou ding ahi.
Kalungthim a adihlou bol ding hung lut pontin, Thilse jong kahet phah louhel ding ahi.
Guhthima aheng akom housea chu kasuh mang ding, Mi kiletsah lungthima hoitho chu thoh nom ponge.
Gamsunga mikitah ho chu lungset mit’ a kavet’a, Chutengleh kei koma cheng thei diu ahi; Alamlhah achonna nolnabeipa chu Keima kinbola pang ding ahi.
Jou bol mi chu ka-insunga cheng theilou ding, Thujou sei jong ka-anga umthei lou ding ahi.
Gamsunga migiloute jingkah sim jingkah seh leh kasuhgama, Pakai khopia thilse bol jouse kasuhmang ding ahi.
O Pakai, kataona ngaiyin, Kaka ka hi naheng hunglhung hen!
Kagenthei nin nei nungsun loujenin, Kahenga hung kiheiyin katao nin neihou loiyin!
Kahinkho la meikhu kitol mang bangin amang jel jel’in, Kagu kachang jong meilhum sung bangin akitumhen hune.
Kalungthim louhing kiveilhop bangin agodenin, Kaneh ding geiyin kasumil tai.
Hamlet lut’a katao tao nan Kagu kachang jouse akonden gamtai.
Gamthip laiya twiva muhsao ongje jua aham kabangin. Khogem lah a simbupi hamlet lut tobang kahitai.
Kalup vangin ka-ihmu thei pon, Inting vuma vahcha chang khat tou kabange.
Kamelmaten nilhum lhumin eihol’uvin, Tot nopna eineiji hon kamin panin eigaosap sap jengui.
Vutvam ho pi anneh bangin kanen, Katwi donjong mit-lhi toh kadonthai.
Nalung himo jeh le nalunghan jeh-in Kapumin neimanin neisep mang tai.
Kahinkho jong nilhah lam nilim kihei bep ahin, Loudong gopsuh bangin kakemsuh ji tai.
Hijongle Pakai nangma tonsot Leng nahin, Akhang khanga minthang jing nahi.
Nathoa Zion chunga voujang nat na nanei ding, Aphat kitep Zion khohsahna phat alhing tai.
Ajeh chu nalhacha hon asong ho jeng jong a-it’uvin, Aleivui gei geiya adip dampiu ahibouve.
Namtin vaipin Pakai min aginsoh keiyuva, Leiset leng jousen naloupina agin soh diu ahi.
Pakaiyin Zion asahdoh kit’a, Aloupina hung kilah ding ahi.
Pakaiyin chatmo ho taona angaiya, Athumu jong donlouva akoilou ding ahi.
Hiche hi khang kit’a din kisundoh hen, Chutileh apeng loulai honjong Pakai avahchoi thei diu ahiye.
Pakaiyin amuntheng sanglaiya konin ahinven, Vana konin Pakaiyin leiset ahinvei;
Songkul lutte tao hamlet lut angai gon, Athi dingsa um ho lhadoh din agoi.
Hitia chu mihemin Ziona Pakai min aphondoh a, Jerusalem a ama avahchoi diu;
Chitin namtin akikhop khoma Pakai chibai boh dia lenggam akikhopsoh teng abolna diuvin.
Pakaiyin kathahat gamvalaiyin asuheiyin, Kahinkho jong asuchom tai.
“O Pathen, kahinkho hoi laiyin neila mang hih-in, Nangma akhang khanga hing jing nahime,” kati.
Semtil in leiset bulpi nahin phutdoh-in, Vanmun jouse jong nasemsa nakhutsoh ahi.
Hicheng hi mangthah diu ahin, Nang vang aum jing ding nahi; Aboncha ponsil banga luiya sesoh diu, Von kikhel banga nakhela beisoh diu ahi.
Nangma a bang nahi jingin, Hinkho kum kichaitih naneipoi.
Nalhachate chate naote lung monga chenguva, Na-angsunga achilhah teu jong kiphutdet ding ahi.
O ka-lhagao Pakai choianin, Kalung laigila cheng jousen Amintheng choianun!
O ka-lhagao, Pakai choianin, Phatchomna napeh ho suhmil loujenin!
Nathemmo chengse ngaidama, Nanatna aboncha damsah Pa,
Lhankhuh a kona nahinkho lhatdama Lungset longlou le hepina lal lukhuh banga nakhuhpeh,
Nahin laisunga anpha phaa navah va jinga Khangdonga nakoiya muvanlai banga poh thet’a nakoi Pa chu!
Pakaiyin thildih jeng abolin, Akibol hesoh ho adih dih-in thu atanpeh-e.
Pakaiyin alampi abonchan Mose ahetsah-in, Anatoh abonchan Israel chate amusah-e.
Pakai hi hepina bulhingset Iungset them ahin, Lung hangvah lou, lungset longlou ahi.
Aman mi apho jing jeng lou ding, Alunghan khum jing jeng lou ding ahi.
Ichonset nau toh kithuh a jong eibol u ahipon, Ithemmo nau dungjuiya eibolu jong ahipoi.
Ajeh chu leiset’a kona van asan banga Ama gingte dia Pakai lungset jong nasatah ahiye.
Niso le nilhum kigamlat bangin Isuh khelnau gamla tah-in atolmang tai.
Mipan achate alainatpi bangin Ama gingte chu Pakaiyin alainatpie.
Ajeh chu Aman eikisemdol u ahen, Leivuiya konbou ihiu ageldoh jinge.
Mihem din ahinkho jong loudong bep ahin, Loujaova pahcha pah bep ahibouve.
Loudong chu huiyin amut teng alhoh mangjin. Akena phunga jong akeh kit thei tapoi.
Pakai lungset longlou le adihna vang chu, Ama gingte din tonsot kumkhoa achate atuteu ding gei ahi.
Ama kitepna nit jinga athupeh gel jing te din Tonsot tonsot’a umjing ahiye.
Pakaiyin vana laltouna akidon, Alenggamin jong ijakai chunga tha aneiye.
Avantil jousen Pakai choianun, Asei nit’a thanei ho athu kisei gin ngai lhi jing ho!
Amite janel’in Pakai choianun, Adei dei bola pang alhacha jousen!
Asemsa jousen Pakai choianun. Aleng gamsung muntina min choianun. O ka-lhagao Pakai choianin!
O ka-lhagao Pakai choianin, O Pakai ka-Pathen naloupi behseh jenge! Jabolna ponsilin nakisel jin Lal loupi nan nakijeme.
Khovah chu ponsil bangin nasil’in, Vanthamjol jong ponbuh sona nasondoh ahi.
Twipi chunga nathulnoi jol najamin, Meilhang jouse kangtalaiyin namangin, Lhaving nei bangin Khohui nakilhoh sah sah jie.
Khohuipi hi sottol len naneiyin, Mei le meikou jong nakinbol’in napansah-e.
Leiset jong akhomkoa natung lut’in, Kihot linga kibot kang kit lou ding ahitai.
Leiset chu ong homin natomin ponsil kikhu bangin nakhui. Twipin jong molsang jouse achup tauve.
Napho tengleh twipi ajamtan, Van nakithinsah tengleh alhai lhai jenguve.
Molsang akidoh sang cheh cheh-in. Nagonpehna mun geiyin phaicham alhasuh suh tauve.
Twipin akhokal lou ding gamgi nasepeh-in, Leiset achup kit louna diuvin nabolpeh tai.
Phaicham dunga twisam naputsah-in, Twiho chu mol lelhang kah kah a alonguve.
Gamlah a gamsa jousen twiho chu adonun, Gamlah sangan ten dang nou nan aneiyui.
Akom dunguva jong chungaleng vachate abusan, Thingbah lah a vachaten la asauve.
Munsang nachenna konin molsang jouse twi nachap jin, Nathilbol hi leiset lungna achim lheh-e.
Gancha neh din hamhing napousah-in, Mihemin louva abol din, Hampa louhing jouse naphut’in, Leiset’a aneh ding akimu din nabol’e.
Alung nachima adon din lengpitwi nasemin, Mai jolsel a akinu din thao nabolpeh-e. Alungthim hatsahna dinga Anneh changlhah jong nasemdoh peh ahiye.
Pakai thingphung jouse twi akichap nou jingin, Lebanon a cedar thing ho jong akichap nou jinge.
Thingphung dunga vachaten bu asauvin, Chahthing chunga vakangten bu asauve.
Molsang jouse gamkel ho chenna ding ahin, Songkol dung jong kolsate kiselna ding ahi.
Kum kiheichin melchih nan Lha nasemin, Nisan alhum phat akihet keove.
Muthim nasemin, hiche hi jan ahiye; Jan teng thingnoi gamsa jouse alhadoh jiuve.
Sakei noute sa duchat nan akitum tumun, Pathen koma neh ding akithum thumui.
Nisa so teng gamsa ho akikhip jiuvin, Abu dung ako dunga akolji tauve.
Sa changge sung nilhah kahsen Mihem avaikonin na akitoh jie.
O Pakai, nasemsa thil iti tama tam hitam! Aboncha chihnaa nasemdoh ahin, nasemsa leiset adimtai.
Gal lama khu Twikhanglen ahin alenin akijal’e, Asunga thil simsen lou adimin, ganhing len le neo adimset’e.
Khulama kong innei tampi akitolun, akidoupi din nasemsa Leviathan jong ahung doh tai.
Thilsem hijat hin Nang lam jeng avet’uva, Aphat cha aneh diu an napeh ding anga cheh-u ahi.
Neh ding napeh teng akihui khom loiyun, Nakhut nalhana nabah teng antui tui avaset’in aneuve.
Namai nasel teng alung thoi jiuvin, Aneh diu an nalahpeh teng athiuvin leivui asohji tauve.
Na-lhagao nahinsol teng akisemdoh jiuvin, Chuteng leichung nasemthah jin ahi.
Pakai loupi chu tonsot’in um jing hen, Asemsa chengse chunga Pakai kipah jing hen.
Pakaiyin leiset avet teng akiling jin, Molsang dung atham leh meikhun alenge!
Kahin laisen Pakai vahchoi la sang ting, Kahinlai damsungin ka-Pathen vahchoi la sange.
Ka-ngaito Pathen deilam hijing hen, Ajeh chti Pakaiya kipah jing kahi.
Leiset’a konin chonsete mangthah hen. Migilou kilulah kit da hen! O ka-lhagao Pakai choianin! Vahchoiyun Pakai chu!
Pakai thangvah-un, aminin taovun; Chitin namtin lah a anatoh phongun!
Ahenga la sauvin, sauvin avahchoi la; Thil kidang abol jouse seichoi leuvin!
Pakai min theng loupi hen lang, Pakai holte lungthim kipah soh keihen!
Holuvin Pakai, chule athahatna; Tantih neilouvin a-angsung del jingun!
Thil kidang dang aboldoh ho geldohuvin, Thil kidang abol-ho, thu atanna ji hochu;
Vo alhacha Abraham chilhah mite, Alhenchom mi, Jacob chate ho!
Ama hi Pakai i-Pathenu ahin, Athu tanna leiset chung adimsoh tai.
Aman itih-in jong akitepna agel jingin, Khang sang khat geiya dia aseisa athupeh ahaipoi.
Abraham koma akitepna le Isaac koma athutep akihahselna chu.
Jacob din chondan a pang din aphutdet’in, Israel din tonsot’a kitepna din aphutdet tai.
“Nachan ding, nagoulo dinga Canaan gam kapeh ding nahi,” tin aseiye.
Israelte lhomcha ahi laiyun, Imacha kham louva agamsunga akhopem laiyun;
Namtin vaipi khat khat koma avah thai leuvin, Lenggam khat’a konin michom khat koma acheuve;
Pakaiyin koima abol gentheisah pon, Amaho jeh-in leng ho geiyin aphoh saljin ahi.
“Thao kanusa tongkha hih-uvin, Kathemgao ho jong bolse hih-un,” tin aseiye.
Pakaiyin gamsunga kel alhahsah a, Changkung jouse aheboh teng;
Israelte masanga mi khat asol masa jin, Ama chu soh joh a kijohpa Joseph chu ahi.
Joseph chu akengphang te nia thih khao avo’uvin, Angong changa thihkol a-opeh-uve;
Aseisa aguilhun kahsen, Pakai thusei chun Joseph apatep jinge.
Lengpan mi asol’in songkula konin alhadoh-in, Chitin namtin vaihompan acham lhatsah tai;
Pharaoh vin ainsunga apipun apansah in, Anei jouse chunga vaihomin akoitai.
Leng chapate adei deiya ahil chah a, Loi upa ho achihna ahil din akoiye.
Hiche lai hin Israel Egypt gama ahung tai; Jacob’in Ham gamsung ahinjot pai.
Pakaiyin amite Israelte chu aphattousah lheh jengin, Agalteu sangin jong ahatsah jon ahi.
Agalteu chu amite Israel ahotbolsah-in, Alhacha ho chu khut thah lhauna anei diuvin abole.
Pakaiyin alhacha Mose asol’in, Alhendohsa Aaron toh asol thai.
Mose le Aaron in Pakai melchihna ho mipi lah a apolut lhonin, Ham gamsunga thil kidang abol lhone.
Pakaiyin mu athimsah-in gamsung kho ajing tai; Egypt mite ama dounan achonseuvin asei angaipouve.
Atwi jouseu thisan asosah soh keiyin, A-nga jouseu jong athat gamtai.
Agamsunguva ukengte ahung langin, Lengte indan sung geiyin alut tai.
Thu agah seiya ahileh thou vaisi ahung kitol lut’in, Agam pumpiu thousi adimset jenge.
Gel len goju bangin ajuhsah-in, Agamsungu keh-in asep cheh niu neove.
Alengpi guiyu atheichang phungu ajep lhusoh-in, Agamsungu thing aleh thangsoh hel’ e.
Thu agahsei leh khaokhote ahung kitol lut’in, Khaokho noute sim senlou ahung lut tauve.
Hichengpi chun gamsunga hamhing loudong anechai hel’in, Tola keh tapou ane ngim hel’uve.
Agamsung uva apeng masa jouse a that’in, Athahol janguva peng masa jouse athat tai.
Pakaiyin Israel chu sana le dangka kengin ahin puidoh-in, Israel phung lah a akipal lhua aumpoi.
Israel ten adalhah chun Egypt mi akipahui, Ajeh chu kichat tijat’in alo gamu ahitai.
Aleuva pang din meilhang adah-in, Jan teng asalvah diuvin meikou adetpeh jie.
Athum thum phat’in Vamin alhalut peh-in, Vana konin anneh thalhingset’in apei.
Songpi ameh homin ahileh twi ahung putdoh-in, Nelgam sunga vadung twibangin a longe.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin athutep theng ageldoh a, Alhacha Abraham ageldoh ahitai.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin amite kipah-in apuidoh-in, Alhenchomte la sah pumin ahung kitol’uve.
Namtin vaipi gamsung alosah tan, Chitin namtin tohga chu Israelten achenpha tauve.
Hitia hi achaina teng achondan anit’uva, Adanthu jouse anit theina diu ati ahiye. Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Vahchoiyun Pakai! Thangvah-un Pakai nun nem chu. Alungset longlou tonsot’a um jing ahiye!
Pakai thilbol nasa tah tah koiham asei ngam ding? Koiham avahchoi joukei ding chu?
Thu adih lama tan jing ho anun nom ahiuvin, Phatseh a thildih bol jing ho anun nomui.
O Pakai namite nalungset teng keijong neigeldoh-in, Amaho nahuhdoh teng keijong neipan pin.
Nalhen chomte hamphatna kamua, Namite toh kakipa khoma, nagoulote toh minpha kachan khom theina dingin.
Kapu kapateu jong keiho jong kachonseuve; Giloutah-in kachonun themmona kabol tauve.
Kapu kapateu Egypt’a achen laiyun Nanatoh thil kidang ho chu iman agelpouve. Nalungset longlou lhasam lou jong agel pouvin. Twikhanglensan phunga Chungnungpen dounan achonseuve.
Ahivangin athahat aphondoh theina din Amin khohsah nan amaho chu ahuhhingtai.
Twikhanglensan chu aphoa ahileh akangin. Twito neldi lah a agothet’in akijot galkaisah-e.
Hiti hin agalteuva konin ahuhhingin, Melmate thahat’a konin ahuhdoh tai.
Twipin akidoupi teu achup soh tan, Khat’a khat jeng cha jong akhenpoi.
Chutah chun Israelten athusei atahsan un, A vahchoi la asauve.
Ahinla anatoh jouse asumil loi kit’uvin, Pakaiyin athumop diu angah deh pouve.
Gamthip laiya panna beiyin thil athum thumun, Nelgama chun Pathen apatep tep’un ahi.
Pathenin athumu apen, Athat gam diuvin natset jong alha khume.
Ngahmun sunga mihon Mose le Aaron, Pakai mitheng Chunga thangset abol’u chun;
Leiset apoh khin Dathan aval lhum in, Abiram loite abahgamin atomjol tai.
Miho lah a meikou ahung koudoh-in, Migilouho meikouvin akalih tauve.
Horeb molsanga bongnou lim asemun, Milim kilhajol chu chibai aboh-uve.
Pathen loupina chu hamhing nea Bongnou lim kisemthu chutoh alhet peh tauve.
Egypt gamsunga thil nasatah tah bol, Ahuhhingpau Pathen asumil tauve.
Ham gamsunga natoh kidang dang tonga, Twikhanglensana tijat umtah thilbolpa asumil tauve.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin amaho kasuh mang ding ahi, atin; Alhenchom Mose chu amasanga kivaikhan jenga Alung dama asuh mang louna dia asei hilou ham?
Hijeh chun lungtup gam chu asei seuvin, Pathen thutep jong atahsan tapouve.
Aponbuh dunguva aphun chet chut’un, Pakai thusei ogin angai pouvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin akhut adomsangin akomuva akihahsel’in, Gamthip laiya ajamchap din aseitai.
Namtin vaipi lah a achilhah-u athecheh a, Gamtina athe thangsoh din anaseiye.
Hiche jong chun Peor muna Baal toh akijop’un, Milim thisa henga kilhaina sa aneuve.
Athilbolu hin Pakai aphin lung hangun, Alah-uva gamna hise ahung lang tai.
Hichepet hin Phinehas adindoh a apho tang leh, Gamna hise lang chu ahaitai.
Hiche hi Phinehas din akhang khanga Adih-in akisimpeh tan ahi.
Meribah a twiphunga Pakai alung hankhum un, Amaho jeh-in Mose’n thoh hahsa tah anathoh-e.
Asuh lung hang behseh phat’uvin Mose’n jong thu ngeilou tah tah anaseiye.
Pakaiyin thu apeh bangun Mipi chu asumang pouvin;
Namtin vaipi chutoh acheng hal’un, Athilbol bol’u bol din akithem chuh jo’uve.
Milimdoi asemsau chu ahouvun, Hiche ho hi kipalnan aneiyun ahi.
Achapateu kithoi nan aneiyun, Achanu jouseu thilha ho henga akithoi nauve.
Hitobang pihin themmona bei achateu Pasal numei thisan aso so jiuvin ahi. Canaan mite milimdoi phung dunga kilhai nan aneiyun, Agamsung chu thisanin asuhoh soh tauve.
Hiti hin athilbol’u hin akisuboh sohuvin, Atohna lamuva notin apang gamtauve.
Hichun Pakai amite chunga alung hangjah jengin, Agoulo mite chu alo-lhajenge;
Namtin vaipiho khut’a apedoh-in, Adeilou ahot tah miten achunguva vai ahomtai.
Amelmateuvin abol gentheiyun, Khut thah lhau nan amangtauve.
Pakaiyin avel vel’in ahuhdoh jin, Alung gel’uva doumah agel jeh-u le athemmonauvin asu lha jitauve.
Ahivangin Pakaiyin ahesoh nau akhohsah-in, Atao tengu leh angaijin ahi.
Amaho khohsahna akitepna ageldoh jin, Alungset longlou alhahsam loujeh-in alung aheiji tai.
Soh a hen mite mitmu din Amaho hi voujang nat nat aumsah jie.
O Pakai ka-Pathenu, neihuhhingun, Namtin vaipi lah a konin neidong khomun; Namintheng kathangvah theiyuva Navahchoiya kaminthan theina diuvin!
Tonsot tonsot’in Pakai Israel Pathen chu nun nom hen. Chitin namtinin, “Amen” tin seiyu hen! Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Thangvah-uvin Pakai nun nem chu, Alungset longlou tonsot’a um jing ahi!
Gim gentheina kona alhatdamsa Pakai lhatdamsa ten hi tin seiyu hen;
Gamtin solam le lhum lama kon Sah le lhanga kona kikhomhon seiyu hen.
Abang bang nelgama avah leuvin Chen mun khopi kimulouvin aumui;
Agilkel’un adang chah-uvin Alungthim uva alung gil’u jong alhalhop tai.
Hitia agenthei nauva kon hin Pakaiya ataovun, Agenthei hesoh nauva konin Pakaiyin ahuhdoh tauve.
Lamjang keiyin ahinpuiyin, Achenna diu khopi geiyin apuiye.
Thangvah-u hen Pakai alungset longlou ahin, Mihem chate din thil kidang dang aboldoh tai!
Adangchah adang nousah tan, Agilkel anpha phan avah vai.
Mihem phabep muthim laiya mai nguichet’in atouvun, Songkul lutte genthei tah-in thihkhaovin akihenui.
Ajeh chu amahon Pathen thusei adouvun, Chungnungpen in athumop nau anahsah pouve.
Na hahsa atoh toh nauvin alungu alha lhop tan, Apanpi diu beihel’in akijam tauve.
Agim behseh phat’un Pakaiya ataovun, Pakaiyin ahesoh nauva konin ahuhdoh tai.
Muthima mai ngui chet’a aumnauva ahinpuidoh-in, Akihen nau khao abottan soh tai.
Thangvah-u hen Pakai alungset longlou ahin. Mihem chate din thil kidang dang aboldoh tai!
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin sum-eng kotpi jouse aleh thangsoh-in, Thih kotgol jouse jong bohni asosoh tai.
Achonset jeh-uvin mi a bang bang aveiseuvin, Athemmo jeh-uvin genthei hesoh athoh-uve.
An him himla alo lha jeng jengun, Thina kelkot phung agei tauve.
Agim behseh phat’un Pakaiya ataovun, Pakaiyin ahesoh nauva konin ahuhdoh tai.
Pakaiyin thu aseiyin auamsah-in, Manthahna konin ahuhdoh tai.
Thangvah-u hen Pakai alungset longlou ahin, Mihem chate din thil kidang dang aboldoh tai!
Thangvahna chu kilhaina gantha bangin bol’u hen, Athilbol ho chu kipa loupina lan sau hen!
Abang bang twikhanglena kong innei hon akitolsuh-un, Twipi chunga kiveina abol’uve.
Amaho hin twito lam thuh tah a Pakai thilbol kidang dang amudohuve.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin thu apen teng huipin twipi adiljin, Twikhanglen twidil sang tah tah-in akikhangjie.
Vanvum vuma aleng jenguvin, twito agei kit’un; Thilse agon nauva ameidoi gamtauve.
Jukham bangin alonle leuvin akihot hot’ui, Suhna ding helouva amangthah kon ahitauve.
Agim behseh phat’un Pakaiya ataovun, Pakaiyin ahesoh nauva konin ahuhdoh tai.
Pakaiyin huipia twipi kinonglai aphoh thip’in, Twikhanglen kidil jong athip del tai.
Twi kinong athip phat’in akipah-uvin, Pakaiyin ajotnau kongkai muna apuilut tai.
Thangvah-u hen Pakai alungset longlou ahin, Mihem chate din thil kidang dang aboldoh tai!
Mipi kikhopnaa Pakai chu choian’u hen, Upa ho khoppi sunga Pakai vahchoiyu hen.
Pakaiyin vadung jouse nelgum asosah jin, Twinah jouse jong leigo lah asosah jie.
Gamsung mite gitlou jeh-in Leichang phalai jong hollei chikhuh lah asosah’e.
Ahin nelgum lahpi jong dim aveisah jeng kit’in, Sephou gamgo lah a twisam tampi aputsah theiye.
Hitobang lah a hin agilkelte achensah in, Chen mun khopi akisah doh tauve.
Lou abolun muchi atu uvin lengpilei akibol’un, Lhosoh thalhing lhingin akilo’uve.
Pakai phatthei boh jal’in nasa tah-in apungun, Aganchau jong Pakaiyin alhomsah chompoi.
Bol genthei gimna chule cholnajeh a Alhahsuh-uva akisuh neo behseh tengu leh,
Leng chapate chunga Pakai alung himon, Lamdih a chelouvin amoh vathangsah jie.
Angaicha geova umte vang ahesoh nauva aphong dingin, A-insung miteu jong kelngoi hon bangin alomle lei.
Milungdih-in amu teng akipah tha nomin, Gitlouna vang kam kehmon apao tapoi.
Koi hijongleh aching chun hicheng thil hi gel khoh hen, Min Pakai lungset longlou gel khoh cheh hen.
O Pathen, kalungthim athoutai! Ken la sange, thouvin kalhagao vahchoi la sange!
Hung thouvun sempi le semjang saigin thon, Jingpi thip lai suthong ing kate!
O Pakai, chitin namtin lah a nangma thangvah inge, Namtin vaipi lah a navahchoi la sange.
Ajeh chu nalungset longlou van sangin asangjon, Nakitahna jong meilhang lah geiyin akitungdoh peh-e.
O Pathen, van vuma kichoi sangin, Leiset pumpi vuma naloupina kidal hen!
Namideite huhdoh-in lang Nakhut jet’ in neipanpin, neihouvin!
Pathenin amunthenga thutep abol’in, “Keiman Shechem kahop khena kachoiat ding, Succoth phai katedoh ding ahi.
Giiead keiya, Manas’seh keiya, Ephraim kathih lukhuh; Judah kaleng tenggol ahiye.
Moab kakisilna kong ahin, Edom chunga kakengkoh kakoiye; Philistia chunga hanla kasap khum jie,” ati.
Koiham kulpi kikaikhum khopia eipuilut ding? Koiham Edoma eipuilut ding chu?
O Pathen, neipaisau hita lou ham! O Pathen, kasepaiteu toh gal nakonbom tapoi!
Galte dou nan neipan hu’uvin, Mihem panpi vang mohseh ahibouve!
Pathento pangkhoma hangtah a gal kasat diu, Kagalteu chonmat ding Amabou ahi.
O kavahchoi jing Pathen, Umthim loujenin!
Ajeh chu kei douna thugilou thujou sei din Min akambem hemin eihouvun jou seinan lei aleh pel’ui.
Hotna thujeng eisei khum khumjengun, Ajeh beihel’in eidel khum khum jengui.
Amaho dinga kataopeh geiyin jong Kalungsetna chu hehsetnan eineijo tauve.
Hiti hin kathilpha bol chu asen eileuvin, Kalungsetna chu hotbolnan eithuh tauve.
Ama dou din migilou khat lhengdoh-in, Mi khat hehsah-in athu kholtohsah tan.
Achung thu akhol tengu leh themmo chang hen, Atao najong chonset’in kisimpeh hen!
Amajong nikho chomcha bou hing hen lang, Athilpha jouse midang chang jeng hen!
Achate pabei chagan umu hen lang, Ajinu jong meithaiyin um hen!
Achate khutdon kijot leu hen lang, Achen nau in-gem lah a min deldoh-u hen!
Athil batna pan anei jouse kilah hen lang, Kholgam min atohga kilo’u hen!
Ama khoto ding mihem beihel hen lang, Pabei achate lainatpi ding jong um hih beh hen!
Achi abo gam hen lang, Khangkit teng jong le amin kinoi mang hel hen!
Apu apate themmona Pakai angsunga kigeldoh hen lang, Anu chonset jong kinoi mang da hen!
Hichengpi chu Pakai maiya kilah jing hen lang, Leiset chunga hetphah phah-in um hih hel hen!
Ajeh chu khoto dingla agel hih hel’in, Vaicha tahlel adel len, alung hesoh athisah loi.
Mi gaosap dingbou adei ahin, achunga gaosap jeng chuhen! Phatthei bohna adeilou ahin, amuphah-in um hih beh hen!
Gaosapna sangkhol len ki-ah banga akitomna ahin, Twi bangin atahsa lut hen, thao bangin agua chang hen!
Akisil aponsil bang khun tom chah den hen lang, Akichen akonggah bang khun khitgah hen!
Eihehse ho chu Pakaiyin hitobang hin bol hen lang, Kathina ding seiho dou nan hiti hin bol jeng hen!
O Pathen nang ka-Pakai, namin khohsah nan kei khel’in pangin! Ajeh chu nalungset longlou athalhinge, neihuhdoh teiyin!
Keima kagentheiyin kalhasam tai, Kalung laigil ana behseh jeng tai!
Nilhah nilim kihei banga abeipai kahitai, Min khao khopi athin lhah bangin eiki thing lhai!
Kakel thoh thoh nan kakhup teni alhoisoh tan, Katahsa jong agong lha gamtai!
Eihehse ho vetset set bep’in kaumdoh tan, Eimudoh chanun alu eithin khum khum jenguve!
O Pakai ka-Pathen neipan pin! Nalungset longlouvin neihuhhingin!
Nangma khut’in abol ahi, ti hetsah-in lang, O Pakai, nangin nabol ahi, ti heu hen!
Gaosap changu hen phatthei boh hih-in, Eidel khumji ho jah chau hen, nalhachapa vang kipah hen!
Eihehse se ho chu jum le jan tomchah-u hen lang, Pona kijel bangin ajum mon tomchah jengu hen!
Kakama Pakai nasa tah a kathangvah ding, Japi lah a Pakai kavahchoi ding ahi!
Ajeh chu ama angaichate jetlam a ading jingin, Athat ding hoa konin ahuhhing jie.
Pakaiyin ka-Pakai jah a, “Namelmate nakeng chotpha, Kaneisah masang sen Kajetlama tou jingin,” tin aseiye.
Pakaiyin Ziona kona naleng tenggol thanei tah Ahinsoldoh ding ahi, nagalte lah a vaihomin!
Lhang thenga gal lamkaiya napan ni leh Namite acham cham a hung kiphaldoh jeng diu ahi! Jingpi phalvah pet banga Nakhangdon lai daitwi nou chet bang ding ahi.
Pakai akihahsel tai, alung khelpon te; “Melchizedek themput banga tonsot thempu nahi,” ati.
Pakai chu nabanjet’in apang jinge, Alungsat ni leh leng ho athecheh ding ahi.
Aman namtin vaipi thu atan ding, Athagama thilong ajamchap ding ahi; Leiset tol lhang dunga Haosa jouse jong a jam thangsoh ding ahi.
Lampi dunga twidung twi adona Chutengleh hung khodah ding ahiye.
Vahchoiyun Pakai! Milungdih kiloina khoppi sunga Kalungthim pumpia Pakai kathangvah ding ahi.
Pakai thilbol anasa theiyin, Adei jousen kihilna anei cheh ahiye.
Anatoh ja ja aumin lal loupi tah ahin, Adihna aitih a um jing jeng ahiye.
Thil kidang abol ho chu geldoh jing din aumsah-in. Pakai chu lungset them le hepina lhing ahi.
Ama gingte anneh ape jingin, Akitepna agel jing jenge.
Anatoh thaneije amite avetsah-in, Namtin vaipi gou alosah tai.
Akhutsoh athilbol akitah jingin adih cheh-e, Adanthu aboncha tahsan lomtah ahiye.
Adanthu jouse aitih chanadia kiphutdet ahi tan. Kitah tah le lungdih tah a boldia um ahiye.
Pakaiyin amite lhatdamna asolpeh-in, Aitih-in akitepna apen, Amin thengtah tijat umtah ahi.
Pakai gin hi chih kipatna ahin, Amang cha jouse din hetkhenna phatah ahi. Aitih-in avahchoina um jing ta hen!
Vahchoiyun Pakai! Pakai ginga athupeh jousea kipah a um mi chu anun nome!
Achilhah mite gamsunga hung hat’in tin, Milungdih te khang chu phatthei chang diu ahi.
Hitobang mi insung chu hao le gou adimin, Aitih-in adihna akilang jinge.
Milungdih te din muthim lah a jong kho avah jin, Pakai chu lungset them, hepina lhing, adih ahiye.
Jalhai tah a na tonga hongphal tah a thil hom, Adihlama chonpa din ijakai aphasoh keiye.
Ajeh chu midih kihot ling joulou ding, Aitih-a kigel jing jeng ding ahi.
Aman thuse kithang agingpon, Alung det’in Pakaiya aki-ngaiye.
Lungthim longlou ahin, kichatna aneipoi; Akidoupite chunga alungtup amu masangsen athoh-e.
Manbeiyin thil ahomjin vaichate apei; Tonsot’in adihna aum jingin, aki jong akijan akichoisange.
Migilouvin amu teng alung hang jin, Aha agoi goijin, ajolmang tai; Migiloupa lungtup chu Pannabeiyin amangthah jin ahi.
Vahchoiyun Pakai! Vahchoiyun Pakai lhachaten Pakai min chu vahchoiyun!
Tua pat atonsot geiyin Pakai min chu nun nom jing hen!
Nisoa pat nilhum geiyin Pakai min vahchoiyin um jing hen!
Pakai chu namtin vaipi chunga akikhangin, Aloupina van mun jouse sangin asang joi.
Chunga toujing Pakai i-Pathenu toh Tethei koi ham?
Chunglampeh a konin Van mun jouse le leichung ahinve suh-e.
Leivui lah a konin vaichate akai thouvin, Angai cha geova umho alhuhlhuh a akiset nauva aphong dinge.
Leng chapate toh atoukhom sah-in, Amite lah aleng chate toh atoukhomsah tai.
Numei ching nao neilou ainchensah tan, Cha tampi hing numei kipah tah asotai. Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Egypt’a kona Israel apotdoh a, Paomah tea kona Jacob insung apotdoh chun;
Judah chu amunthengin anapangin, Israel chu alenggamin anapange.
Twikhanglenin jong aven ajam mang tai, Jordan vadung jong alelon tan ahi.
Molsang jouse kelngoichalte chop’in achomun, Thinglhang jouse kelngoite chop’in achomuve.
Vo Twikhanglen ipi nathoh lei a najam ham? Vo Jordan ipi dia lelon nahim?
Vo molsang ho kelngoite chop nathouvin, Vo thinglhang ho kelngoite chop nathouve!
Vo leiset, Pakai angsunga kithing thingin, Jacob Pathen angsunga hin.
Songpi jeng jong twikula heidoh theipa, Meituh song geiya twisam phung hisah thei Pathen!
O Pakai keiho khohsah man le keiho jal hilouvin, Namin khohsah jal’in loupina pejon; Nalungset longlou khohsah jal le Nakitahna khohsah jal’in loupina pen!
I-dinga namtin vaipi hin, “A-Pathenu hoiya um tam?” ati diu ham?
Keiho-Pathen vana achengin, Adei dei abolji ahi.
Mite pathen semthu chu dangka le sana jeng ahin, Mihem khutsoh thilsem jeng ahibouve.
Semthu hin kam aneiyun apao thei pouve, Mit teni aneiyun, kho amupouve.
Nabeng teni aneiyun, kho ajapouvin, Nah hom ni aneiyun, ima nam ajapouve.
Khut ni aneiyun, imala atham thei pouvin, Keng ni aneivangun che la ache theipon, Alol hom sunguva jong Ahaisa ging thei pouve.
Asemdoh ho jong hiche ho bep ahiuvin, Atahsan ho jong tha khat cheh ahiuve.
Vo Israel Pakaiya ki-ngaiyun, Pakai chu apanpiu alumuva pang ahiye.
Vo Aaron insung mi, Pakaiya ki-ngaiyun, Pakai chu apanpiu le alumu ahiye.
Pakai gingte Pakaiya ki-ngaiyun, Pakai chu apanpiu alumu ahiye.
Pakaiyin eigel jingui, phatthei eiboh diu ahi: Aman Israel insung phatthei aboh-a. Aaron insung phatthei aboh ding ahi.
Pakai gingte alen aneova Phatthei aboh cheh diu ahi.
Pakaiyin nang ho jong nachateu jong Napunsah-u hen lang nakhansah-u heu!
Van le leiset sempa Pakaiyin Nang ho phatthei naboh soh keiyu hen!
Vanmun a van muna Pakaiya jeng ahin, Leiset vang hi mihem chate apeh ahiye.
Mithin Pakai avahchoiji pon, Athimilsa husa louvin jong avahchoiji poi.
Keihon vang tua pat atonsot geiya Pakai kavahchoi jing diu ahi. Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Ka-ogin angaiya kathum eipeh jeh-in Keiman Pakai ka-ngailui.
Aman kaheng lama akol asung jingin, Hijeh a chu kahin laisea akoma katao jing ding ahi.
Thina thangin eiumkimsoh tan, kathoh lel tai.
Hichun Pakai henga kataovin, “O Pakai kahinkho huhhingin!” kati.
Pakai lungset them ahin, adih ahi; Keiho Pathen chu hepina lhingset ahiye.
Pakaiyin milham ho ahoi jingin, Kalhah chom pentah-in jong eihuhhing tai.
O ka-lhagao nacholdo mun hinjon kit tan, Pakaiyin ning lhingset’in nabol nai.
Pakai nangman ka-lhagao thina konin nahuhdoh tan, Kamitlhi natheh hul’in, kakeng teni kipal louvin nakoiye.
Mihing gamsunga Keima Pakai angsunga kavah le lei.
“Kagenthei behseh tai,” kati teng jong leh Tahsanna kanei jing nalaiye.
Kalungdon kichat pettah-in, “Mihem aboncha kinepna bei ahibouve,” kati.
Thilpha simjou lou eibolpeh jeh a Pakai chu ipi kapeh ding hitam!
Huhhingna chu khon bangin dom sang ing ting, Pakai minin tao ving inge.
Amite jouse maiya Pakaiya kakitepna jouse penge.
Pakai mitmun amitheng te thi, Ave lel lheh jenge.
Nalhacha kahi O Pakai, nalhacha, nalhachanu chapa kahi; Kakihenna khao nasut lham tai.
Thangvahna kilhaina gantha bangin napeng ting, Pakai mina katao ding ahi.
Amite jouse maiya Pakaiya kakitepna jouse penge.
Vo Jerusalem, nalailung Pakai inpi thong laiya chun! Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Namtin Pakai! vaipin vahchoiyun Chitin namtinin choianun!
Ajeh chu eiho dia alungset longlou ahin, Pakai kitahna aitih a um jing ahi. Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Thangvah-un Pakai nun nem chu, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
“Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge,” Tin Israel’ in sei hen!
Aaron insung miten jong, “Alungset long louvin tonsot’in thoh jinge,” tiu hen.
Pakai ging ten jong, “Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.” tiu hen.
Kagenthei pet’in Pakai kakouvin, Pakaiyin eihouvin eicham lhatsah tai.
Pakai keilama apanleh ima kaging poi. Mihemin i-eilo thei ding ham?
Eikithopi din Pakai keilama apange, Hotle deimoa eibolte kajo tho ding kavejinge.
Mihema ki-ngai sanga Pakaiya kisel aphajoi.
Leng chapatea ki-ngai sanga Pakaiya kisel aphajoi.
Namtin vaipin eiumsoh tauvin, Pakai min in kasat chapsoh tai!
Jet le vei sah le lhanga eiumsoh keiyun, Pakai minin kasat chapsoh tai!
Khoilhah-in thing atom bangin eitomjol sel’un, Meisi bangin pah lah lah-in alengui. Pakai min in kasat chapsoh tai!
Haneh a eineh tou leh kalhutan, Ahivangin Pakaiyin eipanpi nai.
Pakai chu kahatna le ka-la ngei ahin, Eihuhhingin apang tai.
Hei! midih ho ponbuh dunga galjo kipa la akisai, I-Pakai banjet’in hang tah-in gal asat tai!
Pakai banjet akichoi sangin, Pakai banjet’in hang tah-in gal asat tai!
Thi louva kahin jing ding, Pakai tohna chengse kavelsim ding ahi.
Pakaiyin hahsa tah-in eibolgimin, Thivang eithisah deh sam poi.
Adih jotna lampi kelkot jouse neihon-peh in Kelkot ho jot paiya Pakai kathangvah theina din.
Hiche hi Pakai kelkot ahin; Hichea hi midih lut ding ahiye.
Nangin neihouva eihuhhinga napan jeh in Nangma kathangvah-e.
Insa hon adeimouva apaidoh sau song chu In ninga songpi khomdet penin a pang tai.
Hiche hi Pakai thilbol ahin, Kamit vet’uvin akidang behseh jenge.
Hiche hi Pakai sem nikho ahi, Hiche nikho hin kipah-in thanomu hite.
O Pakai neihuhhing un nahenga katao taovui, Nahenga katao taovui neilo lhinsah tei teiyun Pakai!
Pakai mina hung lutpa chu anun nome! Pakai houina konin nang ho phatthei kaboh-ui.
Pakai chu Pathen ahin, khovah eipeuve. Thingna choiyin golnop’in kijot’un maicham saki phung geiyin!
Nathangvah inge, nang ka-Pathen nahi; Nang ka-Pathen nahi, nachoi an inge!
Thangvah-un Pakai nun nem chu! Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Alamlhah nolnabei mi, Pakai danthua chon jing chu anun nome.
Pakai hettohsah jouse nit jinga, Alungthim pumpia Pakai holpa chu anun nome.
Adih lou bol louva Pakai lamlhah jui jing jong anun nome.
Pakai nathupeh chengse danho chu Ching theitah a nit din mi napei.
O he, kachon namlhah jouse hi, Nachondan ho chutoh kitoh pou pou leh!
Chutileh jumna kamu lou ding, Nathupeh jouse kavet vet jeng ding ahi!
Nachonna dan dih ho kasimdoh teng leh Lungdih pua nangma kavahchoi ding nahi.
O neidalha thip hel hih-in! Nachondan jouse nit nange.
Gol-lhang chu itileh achonna theng theiya Nathuto kitoh a kituh tang thei ding ham!
Kalungthim pumpin nang kahol jinge. Nadanthu hoa konin neiva mangsah hih hel’in!
Kalungthima nathu kakhol jingin, Nang douna kachonset louna din kakoiye.
O Pakai nangma nun nomin! Nachondan jouse neihil’in.
Nachonna dan jouse kakamin kaphongin, Lei kileh pel’in kaphongjal’e.
Mi ahao teng akipa bangin Nahettohsah chengsea keijong kathanomin kakipah-e.
Nathupeh dan jouse gel jing ing ting, Nalampi jouse kavet jing ding ahi.
Nachondan jouse kakipapi ding, Nathusei kasuhmil lou ding ahi.
Nalhacha hi lolhingtah-in neibol’in, Kahin a nathu kanit jingna din!
Kamu theina din kamit hasah-in, Nadanthua thil kidang ho kamu theina din.
Leiset’a khopem bou kahi, Nathupeh chengse chu nei-impeh hihin.
Phat tin a nachonna dan ho ka-ngaichat jeh-in, Kahinkhoa ahaisam pai ding kahitai!
Nathupeh chengsea vahmanga gaosap chang, Mi kiletsah ho naphoh jin ahi.
Nahettohsah thu ho kanit jing nai, Eihouset nau eithangset pi nau la mang jengin!
Leng chapate geiyin kei douna ngaiton tou khom jong le, Nalhacha ken nachonna dan ho jeng kagel ding ahi.
Nathu hettohsah chengse hi kakipana ahin, Hicheng hin eithumop mop jiuve.
Kahinkhoa leivui lah a kiveilhop pai ding kahitai, Nasei bangin neisuhal kit’ in!
Kalam lhah kachena ho kasei teng neihouvin, Nachonna dan ho neihil’in.
Nathupeh dan ho neihetsah-in lang, Nathilbol nanatoh kidang dang ho gel jing inge.
Gim gentheiya konin kahinkho alhalhop pai tai. Nasei bangin neihatsah tan.
Lam hilou chengse chutoh neikhenin gamla tah a, Lungset themin nadanthu neihil’in!
Kitahna lampia chedia um kahitan, Kamasanga nachondan jouse kakoi jing nai.
O Pakai, nathu hettohsah ho katuh jinge, Neijumso lou jenin!
Nathupeh ho bangin lam lhange, Nangin neihetbe sah tengleh!
O Pakai, nachonna dan ho lamdih neihil’in! Achai ni geiyin nit jing inge.
Hetna neipen nadanthu kanit theiya Kalungthim pumpia kanit jing nadin.
Nathupeh ho bangin lam neijot sah-in, Hicheachu keima kipah thanom kahi.
Nahettohsah thuhoa chun neilung lutsah-in, Pannabeiyin neikoi lou jenin.
Kamit te nin jong pannabei thil ho neivetsah dan, Nalampia neipuiyin neihinson.
Nathutep chu nalhachapa chunga sudet’in, Nathutep chu nangma ging te ding mong ahiye.
Kagin jing neiphona chu bolda tan, Nachonna dan ho hi apha cheh-e.
Ven, nathupeh dan ho ka-lha ngai jinge. Nadihnaa konin hinna neipen!
O Pakai, nalungset longlou kahenga hinsol’in, Nathutep bangin nahuhhingna neipen!
Chuteng eihouse ho kadonbut thei ding ahi; Ajeh chu ken nathusei ki-ngaina kanei ahiye
Kakamsunga thudih beihel’in neilha loujenin. Ajeh chu nachonna dan hoa kinem jing kahi.
Tonsot tonsot geiya gui tanmoa Nadanthu kanit jing jeng ding ahi.
Chamlhat’a kava le ding ahi; Keiman nathupeh dan ho kahol jing nai.
Leng ho angsunga jong nathu hettohsah ho kaphon ding, Koiman eijumso lou ding ahi.
Ajeh chu nathupeh chengse hi kakipana ahin, Hiche hi kadei jing ahi.
Kadeitah nathupeh chengse chu giltahin kagel’in, Nachondan ho hi kagel jing ding ahi.
Nalhacha kei din naseisa geldoh jingin, Naseisa a chu nei kinepsah jing ahi.
Kagimpet jongle hiche hin eilhamona, Nathutep hin eicho hing hing ahiye.
Pathen helou ten eihou kha cheh chuh jong leh, Ken nadanthu kadalhan kakihei mang poi.
Malaiya nachonna dan ho kageldoh teng leh, O Pakai, lhamon nan kaneijie.
Migilou nadanthu donlouva koiho jeh-in, Kalung ahang behseh jeng tai!
Pathen lamjona kakholjinna insunga, Nachondan ho chu lan kasa sa jie.
O Pakai, jan teng leh namjn kageldoh jin, Nadanthu kanit jinge.
Hitobang phattheina hi kachunga ahung lhunjeh-in, Nathupeh dan ho kanit tai.
Kei chan ding gou chu Pakai ahi, Naseiho nit din kakitep’e.
Kalungthim pumpin neilung lhai ding ka-ngeh-e, Nathutep bangin neilungset themin.
Nalamlhah jouse kagel ji teng leh Nathu hettohsah ho jonin kal kasongji tai.
Nathupeh chengse nitna dingin Kakino loiyin kakinomsot tapoi.
Migilouten khaokol eido peh peh jong leh, Ken nadanthu kasumil deh poi.
Nachonna dan ho adih thei jeh hin Jankim lai laiyin jong nang vahchoi din kathouve.
Nathupeh dan ho nit’a naging ho toh Kakivop jingin loikhat kahiuve.
O Pakai, leiset hi nalungset long lou adime: Neihil’in nachondan ho chu!
O Pakai, nasei dungjuiyin Nalhacha kei neibol pha lheh jenge!
Nathupeh jouse katahsan jinge, Thu apha kitan le hetna neihil’in!
Eikibolgim masang a vahmangsa kahin, Tun vang nasei seiyin kachontai.
Nangma nun nemtah thilpha bol jing nahi; Nachondan jouse neihil’in.
Pathen helou hon athang thangin eihouvun, Ahivangin kalungthim pumpin nathupeh dan ho kanit jinge.
Alungthimu jong sathao bangin akiletsah-in apomin, Keivang nadanthua bou kipah thanom kahi.
Eikibolgim chu keidia thilpha ahin, Hichea kona nachondan ho kahet thei ding ahi.
Sana dangka asang sang sangin Nakamsoh danthu hi keidin aphachomjoi.
Nakhut te nia neigontoh a neisemdoh ahi; Nathupeh chengse kahetna din hetna neipen.
Nathuseiya kinem kahijeh hin Nangma gingten eimu teng kipah diu ahi.
O Pakai, nathutan jouse adih-e, ti kahen, Kitah tah a neibolgim ahi, ti jong kahei.
Nalhacha henga nathutep bangin Eilhamon din nalungset long lou um jing hen!
Nadanthua kipah thanom jing kahi, Kahin theina din nalungset themin eihin nai hen.
Doha eilhemlha Pathen helou te chu jachatsah-in, Kenvang nathupeh dan ho kagel jing ding ahi.
Nathu hettohsah chengse ahet theina diuvin, Nangma gingte kahenga hung kiheiyu hen.
Jachatna kamu louna dingin Nachondan hoa hin kalungthim nolnabeiyin um hen!
Kahinkhon namihuhhingna ka-ngaicha cha jengin, Nathusei kakineppi pi jenge.
Nathutep ka-nga nga nan kamit teni aset lon, “Itih ba nei lhamon ding ham?” tin kadongjie.
Meikhua kihulgo lengpi twipai savun peng bangin kagon, Hijongle nachondan ho kasuhmil aum hih laiye.
Nalhachan itih chanba kathoh ding hiya? Eibolse ho thu itihba natanpeh ding ham?
Nadanthu toh kitoh a chonlou Pathen helou ten Kalhah lutna ding khuh jeng khuh jeng alaiyui.
Nathupeh chengse adih soh keiyin. Neipanpin, mihon jou jouvin eibolseuve!
Leiset chunga eichaidoh pai got’u ahitai, Ahivangin nathupeh dan ho kada lha hih laiye.
Nakamsoh nathu hettohsah ho kanit theina din Nalungset long louvin kahinkho hing hoiyin!
O Pakai, naseisa nathu chu Van a dettah-in akikhaiye.
Nakitahnan akhang khangin adoujou jingin, Leiset jong naphudetsa ahin, ading det jinge.
Nang thusah a tuni geiya um ahiuve; Ajeh chu thil ijakai hi nalhachate ding ahiye.
Nadanthua kipah thanom lou hileng Eikibolgim pet’a chu kamah thah thei ahitai.
Kahinkhoa kipa thanopna kanei jeh-in, Nathupeh dan ho itih jongle sumil ponge.
Nanga kahi, neihuhhingin; Ajeh chu ken nathupeh dan jeng bou kahol’e.
Migilouvin suhmang din eichang lhiuvin, Kenla nathu hettohsah ho jeng kagel’e.
Thil apha jouse jong akikhonna kamudoh cheh-in, Nathupeh vang atha lhing behseh jenge!
O, nadanthu kadei behseh jenge! Nilhum lhuma kagel gel jeng ahiye.
Nathupeh kakivop jing jeh-in, Kamelmate sangin eichihsah jinge.
Nathu hettohsah chengse kagel gel jeh-in, Eihila pang ho sangin het themna kaneijoi.
Nathupeh dan ho kanit jeh-in Upa tehse ho sangin jong kahethem joi.
Nathusei nitna dingin Lamgilouva konin kakal kanungsei.
Neihilsa ahitah jeh-in Nachonna dan jousea kakiheidoh poi.
Naseiho kapatep leh iti lhum a lhum hitam! Kakamsunga khoiju sangin jong alhumjoi.
Nathupeh dan hoa konin hetna kaneiyin, Hijeh chun lamse jouse kadeimoi.
Nathu hi kakeng din thaomeiyin apangin, Kalampia khovah-in apange.
Chondan dih ho kanitna dingin Kihahselna khat kabol’in katuh det tai.
O Pakai, nasei bangin hinna neipen, Eikibol genthei behseh jeng tai!
O Pakai, kavahchoina thilto bangin neisanpeh-in, Chule nachondan chengse neihil’in!
Lha louhel’in kakhut’a kahinkho kadom len, Ahivangin nadanthu kahai deh poi.
Migilouvin thang eikampeh peh vangun, Nathupeh danthua konin kavah mang deh poi.
Nathu hettohsah chengse katonsot goulo ding ahin, Kalungthima kakipa thanopna ahiuve.
Tonsot tonsot akhon ni geiya Nachondan chengse boldohna din kalungthim kapei.
Lung tho nei miho kahon, Nangma danthu vang kadei lheh-e.
Nangma kakiselna kalum nahin, Nathuseiya kinem jing kahi.
Ka-Pathen thupeh chengse kanit theina din Thilse bolte kakoma konin potdoh loiyun!
Kahinjou na din nathutep bangin neiphongin, Kakinepna neijumso lou jenin!
Kahoidohna din neiphong dingin, Akhonna beiyin nachondan ho khohsah jingin!
Nachondan hoa vahmang te chu nahousen, Alungthim bolu jong pannabei ahibouve.
Leiset migilou te hi imachan nasimpoi; Hijeh chun kenvang nathu hettohsah ho hi kadeipene.
Nang gin nan kakithing thingin, Nathutan ho pi kakichai.
Adih le atah jeng kabol nai, Eisu gentheiho kichepna din neida lha hih-in!
Aphatna din nalhachapa din kitung jengin, Pathen helou khat cha jong eisuhset sah hih-in!
Namihuhhing kavet vetnan kamit teni asetlon, Dihtah a nathutep kavetnan kho kamu tapoi!
Nalungset long lou bangin nalhacha neibol’in, Nachondan ho neihil’in!
Nathu hettohsah ho kahet theina din Nalhacha kei hi het themna neipen!
Nadanthu akisusen akisukeh tai. Pakai dia kipat’a natoh phat ahitai.
Hichea hin sana, sana hoitah sangin jong Nathupeh chengse kadeijo nalaiye.
Hijeh chun Nathupeh dan ho dungjuiyin kal kasonin, Lampi dih lou jouse kadeimoi.
Nathu hettohsah chengse hi akidang lheh jengin, Kahinkhon abonchan kanit jinge.
Nathu akihomjal tengleh kho avah jeng jin, Milham ho geiyin het themna aneisah theiye.
Nathupeh chengse ka-ngaichat behseh jeh-in, Ka kamkan kahai hel hol’e.
Namin ngailua thupeh nit ho nabol bangin Hung kiheiyin neilungset themin!
Nathutep dungjuiyin kal neisot sah-in lang, Kachunga themmona thu neisah hih hel’in!
Nathupeh dan ho kanit theina din Mihem bolsetna konin nei lhatdam in.
Nalhachapa hi namai salvah sah-in, Nachondan ho neihil’in.
Mihon nadanthu anit loujeh-un, Kamit lhi hoh twiyin along tai.
O Pakai, adih nangma nahin, Nathutan jouse adih soh keiye.
Kitah tah le adih jengin Nangman thu nahettohsah jin ahi.
Kagal ten nathusei asuhmil jeh-un, Katom ngaina hin einechaiye.
Nathutep phatecha kipatep ahitan, Nalhachapan kadei lheh jenge.
Keima imakham louva notthap kahivangin, Nathupeh dan ho kahai deh poi.
Nadihna tonsot’in adih jingin, Nadanthu akitahjinge.
Boina le thoh hahsan eihin phah vangin Nathupeh chengse kakipapi jinge.
Nathu hettohsah chengse tonsot’in adih-e; Kahin theina din neihet themsah-in.
O Pakai, neihouvin kalungthim pum pin kataove; Nachondan jouse kanit ding ahi.
Neihuhhingin nahenga kataove; Chutileh nathu hettohsah chengse kanit thei ding ahi.
Nathusei ho kakinep pin Khovah masangin kathouvin panpi kathume.
Nathutep kagel jing theina din Jan-ngah ho maiya jong mitsing louvin kaume.
Lungset long lou nei nahi ka-ogin ngaiyin; O Pakai nakitah bangin kahinkho hoidamin.
Eibolse hon thilse jeng ngaiton eihin naiyun, Nadanthu to la akigamlat lhel jengui.
O Pakai, naicha um jing nahin, Nathupeh abonchan adih cheh-e.
Nathu hettohsah chengse hi aitih a dia naphudet ahitai, ti Keiman kahetna sotpi ahitan ahi.
Nadanthu kasumil khapoi, Kagentheina neiven neihuhdoh-in!
Kachung thu neiseipeh-in nei lhatdam in,
Nachondan ho akhohsah loujeh-un, Migilou din huhhingna agamla lheh-e.
O Pakai, nahepina anasa lheh jenge, Nathutep dungjuiyin hinkho neipen!
Eibol hesoh atamin eidouva atame, Hijongle nathu hettohsahna konin kakihei mangpoi.
Nathupeh ho anit loujeh-uvin Tahsan bei miho kavetnom hih hel’e.
Nathupeh dan ho iti kadei hitam, gel’in! Lungset long lou nei nahijeh-in kahinkho hoidam in.
Nathu kaigop chu tahbeh ahin, Nachonna dan ho hi athu cheng cheh-a tonsot’a pang thei ahi.
Ajeh beiyin leng chapaten eibol genthei nan, Kalungthimin nathusei ho kaging jinge.
Gal laiya thil thang kipah a kichompa bangin Nathusei kakipapi jinge.
Jou le nal kiseiho hi kaloh asoh-in, Nadanthu vang kadei lheh jenge.
Nachonna dan theng ho jeh hin, Nikhat sungin jong sagi vei kavahchoiye.
Nadanthu deihon chamna lentah aneiyun, Imachan kipal lhuhsah pouvin te.
O Pakai, nahuhhingna kakinep pin, Nathupeh chengse kabol jinge.
Kahinkhon nathu hettohsah chengse kanit jingin, Abonchan kadei behseh jenge!
Kalamlhah kachonchan abonchan namaiya akilah jingin, Nathupeh dan ho le nathu hettohsah chengse kanit jinge.
O Pakai, katoana na-angsunga lutsah-in, Nasei dungjuiyin het themna neipen!
Kathum ho hi na-angsunga lutsah-in, Nasei dungjuiyin neihuhdoh tan!
Nachondan ho neihil jeh a Navahchoina kakamsunga twisuh long bang ding ahi.
Nathupeh abonchan adih sohkeiye, Lei kilehpel’a nathu ngei la kasah ding ahi.
Nathupeh dan ho kakilhen tai Eikithopi din nakhut lhansan koiyin!
O Pakai, nahuhhingna ka-ngah ngah jengin, Nadanthu kakipapi pi jenge.
Nachonna dan ho nei panhusah-in, Nang kavahchoi theina din neihinsah jingin!
Nalhacha neihol’in, kelngoi mangsa bangin kavah mang tai; Ajeh chu nathupeh chengse jong kasumil poi.
Kagenthei teng Pakaiya kataovin, Aman eidonbut theina ding kahol’e.
“O Pakai, lei kilehpel’a jouseina leh Thujou sei kamsunga konin neihoidoh-in,” kati.
Vo jouthu seiya pang leigui, Ipi nakipeh bea ipi nakibolpeh be ding ham?
Gal-hatpa thalchang hemtah Longlaobal meiya kito-amleng lung ducha nahim!
Ohe, Meshech gama khopem ada kahitai, Kedar ho ponbuh lah a kacheng khai!
Chamna deimo te lah a hin Kacheng sot behseh tai.
Keima chamna dei mi kahin, Ahinla kaseipeh teng gal asohji tauve!
Kadah-in hoi-a kona eipanpi hung ham, tin Keiman thinglhang lam kavei.
Van le leiset sempa Pakaiya kona eipanpi hung ahiye.
Pakaiyin nakengpeh jong achasah lou ding, Nachingpa chu kisep lhupon te.
Ven, Israel chingpa chu Kisep lhu lou ding jam jong kijam den lou ding ahi.
Pakai chu nachingpa ahin, Pakai chu najet’a ding nalim a pang ahiye.
Sun teng nisan nasang khapon tin, Jan teng lhavah-in nasal pon te.
Pakaiyin thilse jousea nadaldoh-in tin, Nahinkho ching jing nan te.
Tua pat tonsot tonsot geiyin Pakaiyin navaikon navailhun in naching jing hen!
Pakai houin kaiyin cheute,” tia eitemu chun Keima katha anom lheh jenge.
Vo Jerusalem nakelkot phung dung kachonun Keiho kading ding jenguve.
Jerusalem, khopi khat’a kisemdoh, Dettah a kihal lhop soh keiya;
Phungtin kijot touna, Pakai mi phung mite kijotna; Israel kigahna banga Pakai min thangvah dia akijot tounau khopi!
Hiche khopia hin thutanna din laltouna akidon, David insung mite laltouna jouse akidoi.
Jerusalema cham lenna din taovun! “Vo Jerusalem, nakhohsah ho khangtou hen!
Nakulpi sunga chamleng hen, Na-inchung sang dunga jong kiholna um hen!” tiuvin.
Kasopite leh kaloi kagol ho khohsah jal’a, “Nasunga chamleng hen.” kati ahi.
Pakai ka-Pathenu houin khohsah jal’a Naphatna ding kahol ding ahiye.
Vo Vanmun tina laltouna toupa, Naheng lam ven kahung dah-e!
Vetan, soh hon apuu khutlam avet lhih-uva, Soh numei hon apiu khutlam avet lhih banguvin, Kachunguva hepina ahung lhun masangsen, Pakai ka-Pathenu jeng kamit’in kaveuve.
Neihepiuvin Pakai, O neihepiuvin! Ajeh chu kadou jou kalvalun min eihouse seuve.
Phat sotpi hi kahinkhou Anop apeh a chonho le kiletsah ho houset le kichepnan kaum tauve..
Israel’ in seihen lang, Eipan piuva chu Pakai hilou hihen;
Mihemin eidel khumuva chu Pakaiyin eipanpi louvu hileh;
Ichunguva alung han’uva chu Mihon ahinga eival lhum diu ahitai;
Chutijeng taleh hoh-twiyin eilonvuh-un tin, twisoh chun eilhoh mang diu ahitai;
Hitia chu ichunguva Twipi kitol tol ding ahiye.
Mite kivahna dinga eipedoh louvu Pakai chu nun nom jing hen!
Vacha thangkol’a toldoh bangin Eiho jong itoldoh tauve; Thangkol akivobong tan, Eiho atoldoh ihitauve.
Eiho panpi ding chu Van le leiset sempa Pakai mina bou aum jinge.
Pakaiya ki-ngai jing mite chu Zion mol sang tobang ahin. Tonsot’a uma suh linghoi hilou ding ahi.
Jerusalem khopi molsang jousen akol khum bangin, Tua pat atonsot geiyin Pakai amite kimvel’a akisunge.
Ajeh chu gitlouna leng tenggol chun Midihte kipe gamsung hi kicholdo louva ahon jing ding ahi; Achutilou leh Midih jengin jong Thil dih lou bolna dia akhut alha thei ahi.
O Pakai, mipha din thilpha
Alampiu adih louva kiheidoh te Thilse bol ho chu Pakaiyin apui mang ding ahi. Israel lah a chamleng hen!
Pakaiyin Zion asemphat’a akile doh sah kit phat’in, Keiho jong mang neiho bep kahiuve.
Hichun kakambem bemim kanuiyun, Lei kilehpel’in kipa thu kaseiyui; Chuin mihon namtin vaipi lah a aseiyun, “Pakaiyin thil loupi tah tah abolpeh tauve,” atiuve.
Eiho din Pakaiyin thil nasa tah tah abolin, ikipah tauve.
O Pakai, kachan diu neisemphat peh-un, Negeb gama twidung long nei bahsah uvin!
Mit lhi pum puma muchi tu ten, Kipah thanomin aga kilo’u hen!
Akap pum puma muchi tu ding poa vaikon chu, Achangpal kipoh-in kipah thanomin inlam hinjon hen!
Insa a Pakai apan lou leh Insa hon pannabeiya asah-u ahin, Khopi ngah-a Pakai apan louleh, Kho-ngah pa mohseh a janhah khovah ahi.
Jingpi tah a nathouva Jan khangkima lupna najot’uva Chol le nang a an naneh-u hi pannabei ahibouve. Ajeh chu aman alungset chu anom ihmutsah ahi.
Ven, chate hi Pakaiya kon gou ahin, Noabu sunga pengdoh jong kipaman ahiye.
Khangdon laiya chapate kihing hi Gal-hatpan akhut’a thalchang akichoi tobang ahiuve.
Alivathei dimset thalchang kipoh pa, Anun nom ahiye. Kelkot phung dunga amelmate toh kihou jongleh Ajumso jou lou diu ahiye.
Pakai ginga adanthu chengse banga chonpa chu Koi koi hijongleh a nun nom ahiye!
Nangin nakhutsoh natohga naneh ding, Nang dia jong pha a nom nasah ding ahi.
Na-insunga najinu jong lengpigui gaphatah bang ding, Nabukong dokhang kimvela nachate olive thingbah lha bang diu ahi.
Ven, hitobanga hi Pakai ging mi chu Phatthei boh chang ding ahiye,
Ziona konin Pakaiyin phatthei naboh hen; Nahinkho lhum keiyin Jerusalem phatna mutei teiyin!
Natuson geiyin jong hin mun lang, Israel chunga chamleng hen!
Israel in seihen lang, “Kakhangdon laiya pat eibol gentheiyu ahitan;
Kakhangdon laiya pat hesoh tah-in eibolgim uve, Ahinla eijou deh hih hel’uve.
Loukaihon katungtun tuchan akaiyun, Leilhang jal lah lah-in eikaiyui.
Pakai chu adih-e, Gitlouna khaojang jouse asat tansoh tai.
Zion deimoa hotbol jouse chu Kijumso hen kinung del soh kei hen!
Abonchan intinga hampa keh bep hiu hen, Akhandoh masanga gop lhaji tobang hiu hen!
Chang-at pan akhut to to ding aneilou Changphal kanpan aop toh sipbeh ding aneilou hel tobang;
Ajotpa chaninjong, “Nachunguva Pakai phatthei boh um hen, Keihon Pakai minin phatthei kabohuve,” Tin sei hih beh-u hen!
O Pakai, kokhuh sunga konin nahenga kataove! Katao gin ngaiyin Pakai!
Kathil thum ho jeh a ka-ogin thong hi Nanabeng te nin lung nachangin nei ngaipeh-in!
O Pakai, themmona ho hi namelchih ding hileh, Koiham ading jou ding Pakai!
Ahinla min nagin theina din, Nakoma ngaidamna a um jing nai!
Pakai ka-ngah jingin, kahinkhon kangah-e; Athusei kakineppi jinge.
Jingkah sim jingkah seh a kho-ngahho sangin Kahinkhon Pakai ka-ngah jinge.
Vo Israel, Pakaiya kinemin! Pakaiyin lungset long lou aneiyin, Pakai koma lhatdamna Thalhingset’in akikhol’e.
Pakaiyin Israel chu Athemmona chengsea kona alhatdam ding ahi!
O Pakai, kalungthim ahaldoh jou hih hel’in, Kamit teni jong ahahsal jou hih hel’ e. Kei le kei din thil lentah tah le Kidangtah tahjong kabol khoh poi.
Ahivangin naosen anu noiya abia athip del bangin, Kahinkhon ol heo le thip beh chan kaumin Kahinkhon naosen kilhem thip beh bangin Thip beh chan kaum jing nai.
Vo Israel, tua pat tonsot geiyin Pakaiya kinem jingin!
O Pakai, David khohsah nan Hahsatna athoh chengse pi hi geldoh jingin;
Itobanga David Pakaiya kihahsel’a, Jacob dia Hatchungnungpa henga kitep ham!
“Ka-insunga lut pong ting, Kajalkhuna jong kalut lou ding:
Ka-ihmut’a kamit teni kasin lou ding, Kamit geiho jengjong kihup lou ding;
Pakai dia mun khat kamupeh a Jacob dia Hatchungnungpa chenmun kamudoh kahsen.” ati.
Vetan, hiche ding hi Eph’rathah a aume, ti kajauvin; Ja’ar loujao dunga hiche mun hi kamudoh tauve.
“Pakai chenna muna cheu hitin, Akhophangbul’a chibai boh-u hite,” katiuve.
O Pakai, kipat’in nacholdo mun jon tan, Nang nahin nahatna thingkong ahin.
Nathempuhon adih ponsil bangin kisil’u hen, Namitheng ten kipa othongin samu hen!
Nalhacha David khohsah jal’in, Nathao nusa mai heimang peh loujenin!
David koma Pakai thon mon akihahsel’in, Akihah selnasa a kona kihei mang kit lou ding ahi; “Nasung peng nachapate khat Nalaltouna katohsah tei tei ding ahi.
Nachapaten kakitepna anit’uva, Kahil ding kahettohsah chengse anit’u leh, Achateu geiya atonsot tonsot’a Nalaltouna tou diu ahi,” ati.
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Zion alhensa ahin, Achenna mun dinga adeipen ahi.
“Hichelai hi tonsot’a kacholdo mun ahin, Kadeijeh a hikoma kachen ding ahi.
Aneh ding nengtah a phatthei kaboh ding, Asunga vaichate an kapeh ding ahi.
Asunga thempuho huhhingna ponsil banga kasilpeh a, Amithengte kipa othonga ao diu ahiye.
Ziona hi David dia aki khat kadotsah ding, Kathao nupa din thaomei kagonpeh tai.
Amelmate chu jumle ja ponsila kasilpeh a Amavang alal lukhuh pah lah lah ding ahi,” ati.
Vetan, sopi le so pi kipum khat’ a achen khom teng Iti phat’a pha lung lhai um hitam!
Luchunga thao mantam kinua Khamul geiya jolsuh jeng tobang, Aaron khamul’a jolsuh peh a Asangkhol chol ngongkoi geiya jolsuh bep ahi!
Zion molsang dunga hung phin lhaji Hermon lhanga kikhol daitwi tobang ahiye. Ajeh chu Ziona um din Pakaiyin phattheina ahinsol’in, Tonsot tonsot’a hinna ahitai.
Ven, Pakai chu choianun, Nang ho naboncha Pakai lhacha, Jan teng leh Pakai in-ngah a panga ding jing nang ho!
Nakhut’un muntheng lam sanguvin, Choian cheh-un Pakai chu!
Van le leiset sempa Pakaiyin Ziona konin phatthei naboh hen!
Vahchoiyun Pakai min, Alhacha ten vahchoiyun Pakai.
Pakai houin sunga ding ho, I-Pathenu houin lhong sunga kigol hon!
Vahchoiyun Pakai nun nem chu; Milungset them ahi amin vahchoi la sauvin!
Ajeh chu Pakaiyin Jacob akilhen tan, Israel agou din akilhen tai.
Ijeh-inem ken kahei, Pakai loupi ahin, I-Pakaiyu hi pathen dang jouse chunga ahi.
Van le leiya hihen Twikhanglen le asunga hijongleh Pakaiyin abolnom adei dei abolji ahiye.
Leiset kolmanga meilhang jamdohsah jong ama ahin, Gojuh teng kol phetsah jong ama ahi; Khopihui jouse jong Akholna ina kona ahin toldohji ahiye.
Egypt gamsunga mihem gancha le, Apeng masa jouse thatgam jong ama ahi.
Aman Egypt gamlai lunga melchihna le thil kidang tampi abol’in, Pharaoh le asoh te dounan anabol’e.
Namtin vaipi anadengin, Leng hat tah tah ho jong athat’e.
Amor mite leng Sihon, Bashan leng Og, Canaan a lenggam jouse asumang e.
Agam jouseu chu goulo din ahomin, Amite Israel goulo dingin anapei.
O Pakai, tonsot’in namin thang jingin, O Pakai, tonsot kumkhon namin thang tai!
Ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin amite them achan ding, Alhachate chunga dipdamna anei ding ahi.
Namtin vaipi limsemthu doi ho hi dangka le sana jeng, Mihem khutsoh thilsem jeng ahibouve.
Milimho hin kam anei vangun thu asei theipon, Mit anei vangun kho amupouve.
Nakhang anei vangun kho ajapouvin, Akamsunguva jong haitheina husa alengpoi.
Asemdoh a jong amaho bep bep ahiuvin, Kisonna neiho jong chutima ahi cheh-ui.
Vo Israel insung, Pakai choianun! Vo Aaron insung Pakai choianun!
Vo Levi insung, Pakai choianun! Pakai ging ten, Pakai choianun!
Jerusalema chengpa Ziona pat Pakai nun nom hen! Vahchoiyun Pakai!
O thangvah-un Pakai nun nem chu, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
O pathen jouse Pathen chu thangvah-un, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
O pakai jouse Pakai chu thangvah-un, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Amabou thil kidang loupi tah tah bol ahi, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Het themna a kona van mun jouse semdoh pa chu, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Twipi chunga leiset ponpha banga pha pa chu, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athohjinge.
Vah loupi tah tah semdoh pa chu, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Sunlai vaihom dia Nisa sempa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Janlai vaihom dia Lha sempa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Egypt gama apeng masajouse sugampa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Egypt mite lah a Israel hinpuidoh pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Aban thahat ban-gol jedoh jeng pa, Alungset longlouvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Twikhanglensan votana kehso jeng pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Twikhanglen lailunga Israel kijotdoh sah pa. Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Pharaoh le asepaite Twikhanglensana leh khup hel pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Gamthip laiya amite puile pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Leng loupi tah tah ho sugam jeng pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Leng minthang tah tah ho that pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Amor mite leng Sihon that pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Bashan leng Og that pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Alenggam lhon goulo dia hoppeh pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Irael goulo dinga hoppeh pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
I-lhah chompet tah-uva eigeldoh jiu ama ahi, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Igalteuva kona eihuhdoh pau, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Tahsa a hing jouse anneh pe pa, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
O thangvah-un van Pathen chu, Alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge.
Zion khopi kageldoh phat’un, Babylon twipi pang dunga katouvun kakap tauve.
Mong phung chung dunga Kasemjangu kakhaiyun ahi.
Hikoma chun soh a eihen teuvin La sah sah dingin eigouvin; Nopsahna eibol genthei teuvin, “Zion la ho chu neisah peh-un” atiuve.
Het phah lou mi gamsunga Pakai la iti kasah diu ham?
Vo Jerusalem, nangma kasuhmil leh, Kakhut jetlam langthin um jeng hen!
Nangma kageldoh louva ahileh Kadang chunga kalei beh den jeng hen, Kakipa khong kheh gei sanga Jerusalem sangjoa kagel lou leh!
O Pakai, Edom mite dou nan Jerusalem phatlai nikho geldoh temin; I-atileh, “Sulenguvin, sulenguvin, Abulpi khomto geiyin,” tia aseiyu ham!
Vo misugam Babylon chanu, Neibolnau toh kithuh a nalethuh chu nun nom hen!
Nachasen jouse manchoma Songpi jepna neipa chu nun nom hen!
O Pakai, kalungthim pumpin nathangvah ing ting, Pathen dang ho angsunga navahchoi la kasah ding ahi.
Nahouin theng lam ngan kaboh khup’in, Nakitah jal le nalungset long lou jal’in Namin kathangvah-e; Ajeh chu ijakai chunga nathu le namin nachoi sang tai.
Katao nin neina houvin, Kalungthim tha nahatsah jinge.
O Pakai, leiset leng ten navahchoi diu ahi; Ajeh chu nakamsung thu ajasoh tauve.
Pakai loupina anatsat jeh a Achondan ho la asah diu ahiye.
Pakai alet lheh vangin mi lhachom akhohsah-in, Mi kiletsah vang chu agal het tho ahibouve.
Gim genthei boina lah a vah le jongleng, Nangin kahinkho nahoidam jingin; Nalungsan kamelmate dou nan khut nalhangin, Nakhut jetlam in neihuhdoh jie.
Pakaiyin keidia angaito abulhit tei ding, O Pakai, nalungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh jinge. Nakhutsoh hi sumil loujenin.
O Pakai, neikhol chilsoh-in neihetan;
Nangin katouthim pet kadindoh pet geiyin nahen, Kalung gel ngaito jouse jong Gamla tah a konin nadat khen jing theiye.
Kalamlhah nakholsoh keiyin kalup jong nahei; Kachon namlhah abonchan nahetai.
O Pakai, kaleiya thu chengkhat apot masangin jong Nangin abonchan nahesoh ji tai.
Kanung kamaa neikhel tanin, Kachunga nakhut na-ngamjin ahi.
Hetna hitobang hi keidin akidang behbeh seh-in, Asang val’in kasophah hoi ahitapoi.
Nalhagao dalhaa hoilama kachea, Na-angsunga kona hoilama kajam ding ham?
Vana kaldoh jongleng, nangma naumin; Noimigama lupna kisem jongleng, naume!
Lhaving neiying jingkah apat leng ing, Twikhanglen mong geiya gacheng jongleng;
Hikoma jong chu nakhut’a neikaidoh a Nakhut jet’a neituh chah ding ahi nalaiye.
“Muthimin eijin khum hen eikhu hen, Kavela khovah jong jan soh hen,” ti jong leng;
Nang din muthim jeng jong ajing pon, Jan jong sun bep ahin, muthim jong nang din khovah bep ahi.
Ajeh chu nangin kasung giljouse nagontoha, Kanu oisunga neijop mat mat ahiye.
Nakidan a kichat chat naumjeh-in kavahchoiye; Nanatoh akidang thei lheh-in, phatah-in neihei.
Kalim kamel jong nakoma akisel poi; Datmo tah a lei noiya kona eiki semdoh ahi.
Kalim kigondoh masang chu na mit tenin amun, Nalekhabua ahalsi sin akisun soh keiye; Ahalsi jeng cha jong aumdoh masang, Eiki semlai nikho ho geiyin akisune.
O Pathen, keidia nalung gel iti mantam hitam!
Kasim ding hijongle neldi sangin atamjon, Kakhah lo geiyin jong nang to kaum khom jinge.
O Pathen, migilou chu nathadoh jeng ding hileh, Thisan sohat te kakoma konin potdoh tan te.
Melse sea nahouthang thanga, Thilse boldia nang douna kichoi sang ho khu!
O Pakai, nang hotbol ho khu ken kahot lou ham? Nang doudia kipatdoh ho khu kakidah hilou ham?
Abonchan kakidah behseh jengin, Kamelma jenga kagel ahitauve.
O Pathen, neikhol chil’in kalungput hesoh-in, Neipatep’in lang ka-ngaito abonchan hedoh tan!
Chule ven kasunga chon-gitlouna um kham! Chuteng tonsot lam pia neipuiyin!
O Pakai, migiloutea konin neihuhdoh-in; Pumhat tho mihoa konin nei hoidoh in!
Alungthimun thilse jeng angaitouvin, Tang louhel’in gal apandoh doh jengui.
Aleiguiyu gullei bangin ahatsah-un, Akamsunguva jong gulse gu adim’e. Selah
O Pakai, migiloute khut’a neidaldoh-in, Kakipalna ding ngaito pumhat mitea konin neihoidoh-in.
Mi kiletsah ten guhthim in thang eikampeh-un, Khaojang apheh-in len pel eisonpeh-ui Lampi kom dunga kakipalna din Thang eikampeh-uvin ahi. Selah
Pakai henga Nang ka-Pathen nahi, O Pakai, kataona ogin ngaiyin!
O Yahweh ka-Pakai, eihuhdoh thahat tah; Nangin galpi nin kalu neikhupeh-e.
O Pakai, migilou thildei ho phalpeh hih-in, Thilse agon jong machalsah dan! Selah
Eiumchah hon alu adoh sanguvin, Joule nal aseiyu chun amaho lonvuh hen!
Achunguva mei-am hungleng lha hen, Khuh sunga lhalut soh-u hen thou kit hih hel’u hen!
Gamsunga hansepa cheng det hih hel hen, Pumhat tho mi chu thilsen lonvuh loi hen!
Pakaiyin akibol gentheite dihna ahei,
Thonmoa midih-in namin athangvah ding, Milungdih chu nakoma cheng ding ahi.
O Pakai, nahenga kataove, neilung kinpeh-in! Nahenga katao teng ka-ogin ngaiyin!
Kataona nahenga gimnamtui kilhut bahsah-in, Kakhut’a kasan teng nilhah a kilhaina gantha bangin gel’ in!
O Pakai, kakama kamdal neikoipeh-in, Kakam hom ve-lhi jingin!
Kei le kei thilse bolna dingin Kalungthim hi aselama lutsah hih hel’in! Themmona thil bol ho lah a neilhah sah dan, Aneh achah-ujong nei nehsah hih-in!
Miphan khoto tah-in eijep hen eiphoh jo hen, Migilou thaotwi vang kalua kinu hih hel hen; Ajeh chu athilse bol chengseu douna Tang louhel’a tao tao jeng kahibouve.
Themmo achanna diu mite khut’a akipeh doh tengu, Pakai thusei atahbeh ahi, ti ahetdoh diu ahi.
Min songpi akhet keh teng tola akitajal bangin Agu achangu noimigam kotpia kitat-goi soh hen.
O Pakai, Pathen kenvang kamit tenia kavet vet jeng nahi; Nanga kiselgo kahi, panpi beiyin neida lhah hih-in!
Keidia thang akam nauva nei-o sah hih-in. Thilse bolte thangkol’a nei-o sah dan!
Migiloute chu alenpel son’uva oh khomu hen kijamu hen; Keivang toldoh tange.
Ogingin Pakaiya katao taovin, Ogingin Pakaiya thil kathum thume!
A-angsunga kakiphinna abonchan kalhut’in, Amaiya kagimna kaseidoh-e.
Kalhagao alhah dah teng, Nangin kache na lampi nahei! Kache na ding lampia chun Mihon guh thimin thang eikampeh ui.
Jetlam kaven kamelchih vangin, Koimacha eikhohsah a aumpoi; Keidin kiselna ding la aumpon, Koimachan la eikhohsah poi.
O Pakai nahenga kataovin, “Nangma kakiselna, mihing gam akagou ding nahi,” kati.
Kataona khohsah tei teiyin, Eikisuneo behseh jeng tai! Eibol hesoh tea konin neihuhdoh-in, Keidin ahat’un atha nei behseh jengui!
Namin kathangvah theina din, Songkul sunga konin neipuidoh-in! Lolhingset’a neibol ding jeh-in, Jet le vaiya midih jeng dimset diu ahi.
O Pakai, kataona ngaiyin, Kathum ho hi nanan nga1
Nalhacha hi kachung thu tan din neigo hih beh-in, Ajeh chu mihing koima na-anga adih aumpoi.
Ijeh-inem itile melman eihin delpeh-in, Kahing laiyin tolgoi goi nan eineiyin, Sotpeh a thisa ho bangin Muthim lah a eitousah tai.
Hijeh chun kalungsung agim behseh jengin, Kalungthim laigil akiphalam lheh jeng tai.
Khanglui ni masa lai kageldoh-in, Nathilbol chengse ka-ngaito toi; Nakhut tenia natoh dohsa chu Kipah thanomin kagel gel’e.
Kakhut te nin naheng lam kasangin, Twi lha-ngai leiset poh-khi bangin nang ka-ngai chai. Selah
O Pakai, man gangin neihouvin, Kahinkho beipai tah bah ding ahitai; Kakoma namai heimang loujenin, Achutiloule lhankhuh a lutsa ho toh kabah ding ahi.
Jingkah teng nalungset long lou thu neijah sah-in, Ajeh chu nanga ki-ngai jing kahi. Kache na ding lampi neihil’in, Kahinkhoa nang jeng kavet jing ahibouve.
O Pakai, kamelmatea konin neihuhdoh-in, Nahenga kisel dia hung jam kahi!
Ka-Pathen nahiye nadei bolje neihil’in, Nalhagao nun nem chu lam janga neipuisah-in!
O Pakai, namin khohsahjal’in kahinkho hoidam in! Nadihna jal’in gim hesohna kon neipuidoh-in!
Nalungset long louvin kamelmate sumangin! Nalhacha kahi, eidou jouse sumangsoh-in!
Kakhut teni gabol hil’a, Kakhut jung jouse galmuna chalohje hilthem Pakai kei dia kasongpi tobang Nun nom jing hen!
Kasongpi le kakul pi, kagalpal eihuhdoh, Kiselna kanei kalum, chitin namtin anoiya sonkunji ahi.
O Pakai, mihem hi ipi hiya hibanga nagel khoh a, Mihem chapa hi ipi ham hibanga nakhohsah?
Mihem hi hai khatseh tobang hing ahin, Ahin nikhojat jong nisa lim kiheibeh ahibouve.
Vo Pakai navan mun jouse loikunin hung kumlhan, Molsang ho hi thamin meikhua leng diu ahi!
Keh kisesah-in lang abonchan thecheh soh-in, Nathalchang hinkap’in jamsah soh tan!
Chung sanga konin nakhut hinlhangin, Twipi lah a konin neiladoh-in namdangte khut’a neihuhdoh-in!
Akama jou jeng seiya, Akhut jetlama adih lou jeng bol paa konin.
Vo Pathen, nahenga lathah sange; Selangdah jangsom kisem chu nakoma saiyinge!
Leng ho gal josah a, Nalhacha David huhdoh jia nang koma.
Doulel chemjam hemhat’a konin neiladoh-in, Namdangte khut’a neihuhdoh-in; Akamun ajoujeng aseiyun, Akhut’in adih lou jeng abol’ui.
Kachateu gollhang ho chu Thingphung kikhan lhitsel bangu hen, Kachateu numeiho chu Leng inpi sahna dia kijong inning khomho tobang hen!
Kachangpang jouseu dimset set hen, Thil kholna dung jouse jong dimsoh hen; Kaloujao dunguva kakelngoiteu chun Asang sang, sang som cheng hing hen pungu hen!
Kaganchau gai pha thei hen lang, Aveisea le apengsol athol lha beihel hen! Kakholai dung uvajong Lung gim khoisat beihel hen!
Hitobang thilpha achunga lhung Mite chu nun nomu hen! A-Pathenu Pakai hikha Mite chu nun nomu hen!
Nang choian inge ka-Pathen kalengpa, Tonsot tonsot’in namin choian inge.
Niseh le nangma choian ing ting, Tonsot tonsot’a namin kavahchoi ding ahi.
Loupipen Pakai ahin, loupi tah a vahchoi ding ahi; Aloupina hi kholsoh joudan ahipoi.
Nanatoh ho hi khang khat’in khang khat geiya apachat’a, Nathilbol minthang tah tah aphonjal diu ahi.
Nalal loupina minthang tah le Nathilbol kidang ho hi kagel jing ding ahi.
Tijat kichat naumje mihemin seichoi len tin, Ken naloupina kaphonjal ding ahi.
Mihon naphatna lhingset kithang hi Twi kisung lha banga aseichoi diu, Ken jong nadihna Othongje jua la kasah ding ahi.
Pakai hi lungset them hepina lhingset, Lung hang vah lou, lungset long lou ahi.
Pakai hi mitin din anun nemin, Asemsa jouse chunga avoujang ana cheh-e.
O Pakai, nasemsa jousen nathangvah-un tin, Namitheng ten nachoiat diu ahi!
Namitheng ten nalenggam loupi aseiyuva, Nathahat je asei phong diu ahi.
Nathilbol minthang tah tah mihem chate ahetsah-uva, Nalenggam lal loupi natsat dan ahetsah diu ahi.
Nalenggam chu tonsot lenggam ahin, Navaihom nan khanglhum keiya athoh jing ahi. Pakai chu asei jousea akitah cheh-in, Atohna chana lungset them ahiye.
Pakaiyin alhu ho akaidingin, Akisonkun jouse jong aphong dinge.
Amit a nangma ve-lhi jing ho chu Nangin aphat chan aneh diu an napei.
Nakhut nalhangin, Ahing thei jouse aduchat cheh-in navah vai.
Pakai chu abolna atohna chana akitah jingin, Anatohna jousea khotona anei jinge.
Pakai chu ahenga taote koma anai jingin, Atah tah a taote henga anai jinge.
Ama gingte deichat jouse abulhit peh-in, Ataonau angaiyin ahuhhing jie.
Ama ngailu jouse Pakaiyin ahoidamin, Migilou jouse vang asuhmang ding ahi.
Kakam in Pakai vahchoina thu seiying ting, Kathanei chasun in tonsot’in amintheng choian inge.
Vahchoiyun Pakai! O kalhagao vahchoiyin Pakai!
Kahin laisen Pakai vahchoiying ting, Lim le mel kanei laisen ka-Pathen vahchoi la sange.
Leng chapate chunga kisong hih hel’un, Panpina neilou mihem cha chunga jong kisong hih-un.
Mihem cha chu ahaisam teng leh Leiset’a akilen leivui asoh jin, Hiche nima ma hileh Athilgon abonchan abeisoh ji tai.
Jacob Pathenin apanpia, Pakai A-Pathena kinem mi chu anun nome.
Hiche Pathen hin van le leiset asema, Twikhanglen le asunga cheng jouse asema, Tonsot kumkhoa dinga Tahsan tah a um jing ahiye.
Min abolset ho adih-in thu atanpeh-in; Agilkelte chu anneh apei. Pakaiyin songkul lut ho Alhadoh-in acham lhatsah tai.
Pakaiyin mitcho ho kho amusah-in, Min asotkun ho chu Pakaiyin akaithouve. Midih chu Pakaiyin angailui.
Pakaiyin khopem ho aching jingin, Meithai ho le chaga pabei ho akhohsah-in, Migiloute lamlhah vang chu Mangthahna lama apuilut jie.
Pakaiyin tonsot’a lengvai apoh ding ahi, Vo Zion, na-Pathenin khanglhum keiya Lengvai apoh ding ahitai. Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Vahchoiyun Pakai! I-Pathenu vahchoi la sah hi thilpha ahi; Ajeh chu ama lungset them ahin, Vahchoi la sah peh dia lomtah ahi.
Pakaiyin Jerusalem khopi asan, Paidohsa Israelte achom khome.
Alungna behseh jong adamsah jin, Mapu jong amaha aboldam peh-e.
Ahsite jat jong asimtoh soh keiyin, Abonchauvin amin asemsoh keiye.
I-Pathenu aloupin athahat alhinge; Ahet themdan jong tejou jai ahipoi.
Min apaljel jel ho Pakaiyin aphong dingin, Migiloute tolse nan aneiye.
Pakai thangvahna la sauvin, Semjang saiyin i-Pathenu henga langei sauvin!
Van mun jouse meilhangin atomin, Leiset’a ju ding go asemin, lhang le mol a hampa akesah-e.
Gamsa ho jong aneh diu apen, Va-ah nou peng peng ho jong avah vai.
Sakolte thahat akipapi pon, Mihem kal-hat jong alung lhaipi poi.
Pakaiyin ama ging ho bou alung lhaipin, Alungset longlouva kinem ho bou alung lhaiye.
Vo Jerusalem, vahchoiyun Pakai! Vo Zion, na-Pathen vahchoiyun!
Aman nakelkot gol ho alhousah-in, Nakhopi sunga nachate phatthei aboh-e.
Nagamgi dunga cham alensah-in, Suhlou chang phatah tah nadipset’in ahi.
Leiset thu apeh a ahileh Athu sei aman gang lheh-e.
Buhbang jong samul kisung lha abah sah-in, Daibang kai jong vutvam kithe abahsah-e.
Geltwi jong an kithuh lha abahsah-in, Hibang adap masanga hi koi dingjou ding ham?
Jol lha hen, tia aseileh ajolsoh jin, Huipi anunsah a ahileh twipin akitoljie.
Jacob henga athu aseipeh-in, Achondan ho le achonna dan ho Israel aseipeh tai.
Namdang mi hitin abolpon, Amahon jong achonna dan ho ahepouve. Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Vahchoiyun Pakai! Van mun jousea konin jong Pakai vahchoiyun, Munsang jousea konin ama vahchoiyun!
Avantil jousen ama vahchoiyun! Ami janel jousen ama vahchoiyun!
Nisa le Lhan jong ama vahchoiyun, Ahsi vah tah tah jousen Ama vahchoiyun!
Vanmun sangpen jousen jong vahchoiyun, Vanchung vuma twipinjong vahchoiyun!
Abonchauvin Pakai min vahchoiyu hen! Ajeh chu ama thusah-a kisem cheh ahiuve.
Pakaiyin tonsot’a um dia asemdoh ahiuvin, Apal galkai lou diu gamgi jong asempeh cheh-e.
Leiset’a konin Pakai vahchoiyun, Lithuh lai jousea ngapi len lai jousen!
Meikou le gel, buhbang le daibang in jong, Khopihui geiyin athupeh molsou hen!
Molsang jouse le thinglhang jouse, Thingphung ga thei jouse le cedar thing hon jong,
Gamsa jouse le gancha hon jong, Tola kithol hole alhaa leng thei hon!
Leiset lengho le amiteuvin jong, Leng chapate le leiset vaihom ten!
Gol-lhang ho le nu-ngah ho abonun! Upa ho le chapang ho gei geiyin!
Abonchauvin Pakai min vahchoi cheh-u hen! Ama minbou choiat achangin, Aloupina jong van le leiset Chunga akikhang sang tai.
Pakaiyin amite din aki khat atung doh tai, Amithengte jal’in vahchoiyun; Ahenga um jing Amite Israelte jal’in! Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Vahchoiyun Pakai! Pakai vahchoina lathah sauvin; Tahsan neite kikhopna Khoppi sunga avahchoi la sauvin!
Israel chu Asempa chunga kipah hen! Zion chate alengpau chunga kipah-u hen!
Lamto thon amin vahchoi la sau hen, Khongpi ging le semjang sai thon Pakaiya la-ngei sau hen!
Ajeh chu amite chunga Pakai alung lhaiyin, Mi nunnem chu gal ajosah jin ahi.
Tahsan neite loupin kichoi sangu hen, Ajalkhun dunguva jong kipah-in la sau hen!
Hemto chemjam akhut’uva kichoiyu hen, Alol homu poh keh deh deh-in Pathen vahchoi la sau hen!
Namtin vaipi chunga phu akilah theiya, Chitin namtin akisuh dih theina din.
Alengteu thih kol’a akikhisoh a, Amihat lai jouseu thih khaova akihenna din.
Achunguva sutsa thutanna akilhut khumna din! Hiche hi amite tahsan neiho loupina ahi! Vahchoiyun Pakai!
Vahchoiyun Pakai! Amuntheng phunga Pathen vahchoiyun! Avan thamjol minthang lah a Ama vahchoiyun!
Anatoh minthang ho jeh-in Vahchoiyun! Seitheilou aloupina jeh-in vahchoiyun!
Sumkon gin ngeito thon vahchoiyun! Theile mut le selangdah saito thon vahchoiyun!
Lam le khutbeh to thon vahchoiyun! Tumging thei le kuli mut to thon vahchoiyun!
Khutbeh behgin to thon vahchoiyun, Khutbeh hamlah lah to thon vahchoiyun!
Ijakai ahaisa thei jousen Pakai vahchoiyu hen! Vahchoiyun Pakai!
